```text
155	
156	interface SidebarProps {
157	  readonly isOpen: boolean;
158	  readonly onClose: () => void;
159	}
160	
161	function isActiveRoute(pathname: string, href: string): boolean {
162	  if (href === "/admin") {
163	    return pathname === "/admin";
164	  }
165	  return pathname.startsWith(href);
166	}
167	
168	export function Sidebar({ isOpen, onClose }: SidebarProps) {
169	  const pathname = usePathname();
170	
171	  return (
172	    <>
173	      {/* Mobile overlay */}
174	      {isOpen && (
175	        <div
176	          className="fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-black/50 lg:hidden"
177	          onClick={onClose}
178	          aria-hidden="true"
179	        />
180	      )}
181	
182	      {/* Sidebar */}
183	      <aside
184	        className={cn(
185	          "fixed top-0 left-0 z-50 flex h-full w-64 flex-col bg-navy text-cream transition-transform duration-200 lg:static lg:z-auto lg:translate-x-0",
186	          "md:w-64 lg:w-64",
187	          isOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "-translate-x-full",
188	        )}
189	      >
190	        {/* Logo / Brand */}
191	        <div className="flex h-16 shrink-0 items-center gap-3 border-b border-cream/10 px-4">
192	          <span className="text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-cream">
193	            MawarBiru
194	          </span>
195	          <button
196	            type="button"
197	            className="ml-auto text-cream/60 hover:text-cream lg:hidden"
198	            onClick={onClose}
199	            aria-label="Tutup menu"
200	          >
201	            <svg
202	              className="h-5 w-5"
203	              fill="none"
204	              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
205	              strokeWidth={1.5}
206	              stroke="currentColor"
207	              aria-hidden="true"
208	            >
209	              <path
210	                strokeLinecap="round"
211	                strokeLinejoin="round"
212	                d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"
213	              />
214	            </svg>
215	          </button>
216	        </div>
217	
218	        {/* Navigation */}
219	        <nav className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-3 py-4" aria-label="Admin">
220	          <ul className="flex flex-col gap-1">
221	            {NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => {
222	              const active = isActiveRoute(pathname, item.href);
223	              return (
224	                <li key={item.href}>
225	                  <a
226	                    href={item.href}
227	                    className={cn(
228	                      "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors",
229	                      active
230	                        ? "bg-cream/15 text-cream"
231	                        : "text-cream/70 hover:bg-cream/10 hover:text-cream",
232	                    )}
233	                    aria-current={active ? "page" : undefined}
234	                  >
235	                    {item.icon}
236	                    <span>{item.label}</span>
237	                  </a>
238	                </li>
239	              );
240	            })}
241	          </ul>
242	        </nav>
243	
244	        {/* Logout */}
245	        <div className="border-t border-cream/10 px-3 py-4">
246	          <form action={logoutAction}>
247	            <button
248	              type="submit"
249	              className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-cream/70 transition-colors hover:bg-cream/10 hover:text-cream"
250	            >
251	              <svg
252	                className="h-5 w-5"
253	                fill="none"
254	                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
255	                strokeWidth={1.5}
256	                stroke="currentColor"
257	                aria-hidden="true"
258	              >
259	                <path
260	                  strokeLinecap="round"
261	                  strokeLinejoin="round"
262	                  d="M15.75 9V5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 13.5 3h-6a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25v13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 7.5 21h6a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25V15m3 0 3-3m0 0-3-3m3 3H9"
263	                />
264	              </svg>
265	              <span>Log Keluar</span>
266	            </button>
267	          </form>
268	        </div>
269	      </aside>
270	    </>
271	  );
272	}
```

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-04-20 12:00:49Z)**_

You are working on the MawarBiru project at /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru. Build the admin dashboard page (task 6.2).

IMPORTANT: This is Next.js 16. Check `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` if unsure about conventions.

## Context
- Admin layout exists at `app/admin/layout.tsx` — uses `AdminShell` with sidebar + topbar
- Placeholder `app/admin/page.tsx` exists — replace it
- Prisma schema has: User, Pelanggan, SlotTemujanji, Temujanji, SlotTempahan, Tempahan, Pakej, PakejTier, PakejSection
- StatusSlot enum: TERSEDIA, DITEMPAH, DIBATALKAN
- Prisma client from `@/lib/db` exports `prisma`
- API response helpers from `@/lib/api`: `successResponse`, `errorResponse`, `withErrorHandling`
- UI components from `@/components/ui`: Card, CardHeader, CardBody, Badge, etc.

## Requirements

Replace `app/admin/page.tsx` with a server component dashboard:

### Count Cards (4 cards in a grid)
1. **Temujanji Hari Ini** — count of temujanji where slot tarikh = today
2. **Tempahan Bulan Ini** — count of tempahan where slot tarikh is in current month
3. **Jumlah Pelanggan** — total pelanggan count
4. **Jumlah Pakej** — total pakej count

Each card: title, count number (large), links to its respective admin page.

### Recent Activity (2 lists)
1. **5 most recent temujanji** — show nama (from pelanggan), tarikh (from slot), status (from slot)
2. **5 most recent tempahan** — show namaTempahan, tarikh (from slot), pakej name

### Technical
- Use server components — data fetched directly with Prisma
- Simple Prisma aggregate queries (`count`, `findMany` with `take: 5`, include relations)
- 2-column grid for cards on desktop, single column on mobile
- Use existing Card, Badge UI components
- Style: white cards, navy text, badges for status
- For "today" comparison with tarikh (Date field), create start/end of today in UTC

Write/edit the necessary files. Keep it simple — standard rigor.

```text
1	import { auth } from "@/lib/auth";
2	import { AdminShell } from "@/components/admin/admin-shell";
3	
4	export const metadata = {
5	  title: "Admin - MawarBiru",
6	};
7	
8	export default async function AdminLayout({
9	  children,
10	}: {
11	  children: React.ReactNode;
12	}) {
13	  const session = await auth();
14	
15	  // When there is no session (e.g. login page), render children without
16	  // the admin shell. The middleware already handles redirects for protected
17	  // routes, so this is only reached for public admin routes like /admin/login.
18	  if (!session?.user) {
19	    return <>{children}</>;
20	  }
21	
22	  return (
23	    <AdminShell nama={session.user.nama} email={session.user.email}>
24	      {children}
25	    </AdminShell>
26	  );
27	}
28
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { forwardRef, type HTMLAttributes } from 'react';
2	import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
3	
4	/* ─── Card Root ─── */
5	
6	type CardProps = HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & {
7	  hoverLift?: boolean;
8	  'data-testid'?: string;
9	};
10	
11	const Card = forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, CardProps>(
12	  ({ className, hoverLift = false, ...props }, ref) => {
13	    return (
14	      <div
15	        ref={ref}
16	        className={cn(
17	          'rounded-card bg-cream shadow-card',
18	          'transition-shadow duration-150',
19	          'motion-reduce:transition-none',
20	          hoverLift && 'hover:shadow-elevated',
21	          className,
22	        )}
23	        {...props}
24	      />
25	    );
26	  },
27	);
28	
29	Card.displayName = 'Card';
30	
31	/* ─── Card Header ─── */
32	
33	type CardHeaderProps = HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & {
34	  'data-testid'?: string;
35	};
36	
37	const CardHeader = forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, CardHeaderProps>(
38	  ({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
39	    return (
40	      <div
41	        ref={ref}
42	        className={cn('px-6 pt-6 pb-0', className)}
43	        {...props}
44	      />
45	    );
46	  },
47	);
48	
49	CardHeader.displayName = 'CardHeader';
50	
51	/* ─── Card Body ─── */
52	
53	type CardBodyProps = HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & {
54	  'data-testid'?: string;
55	};
56	
57	const CardBody = forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, CardBodyProps>(
58	  ({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
59	    return (
60	      <div ref={ref} className={cn('px-6 py-4', className)} {...props} />
61	    );
62	  },
63	);
64	
65	CardBody.displayName = 'CardBody';
66	
67	/* ─── Card Footer ─── */
68	
69	type CardFooterProps = HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & {
70	  'data-testid'?: string;
71	};
72	
73	const CardFooter = forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, CardFooterProps>(
74	  ({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
75	    return (
76	      <div
77	        ref={ref}
78	        className={cn('px-6 pt-0 pb-6', className)}
79	        {...props}
80	      />
81	    );
82	  },
83	);
84	
85	CardFooter.displayName = 'CardFooter';
86	
87	/* ─── Compound export ─── */
88	
89	const CardNamespace = Object.assign(Card, {
90	  Header: CardHeader,
91	  Body: CardBody,
92	  Footer: CardFooter,
93	});
94	
95	export { CardNamespace as Card, CardHeader, CardBody, CardFooter };
96	export type { CardProps, CardHeaderProps, CardBodyProps, CardFooterProps };
```

```text
1	import { forwardRef, type HTMLAttributes } from 'react';
2	import { cva, type VariantProps } from 'class-variance-authority';
3	import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
4	
5	const badgeVariants = cva(
6	  [
7	    'inline-flex items-center',
8	    'rounded-badge px-2.5 py-0.5',
9	    'text-xs font-medium',
10	    'transition-colors duration-150',
11	    'motion-reduce:transition-none',
12	  ],
13	  {
14	    variants: {
15	      variant: {
16	        default: 'bg-navy text-cream',
17	        success: 'bg-green-600 text-white',
18	        warning: 'bg-amber-500 text-navy',
19	        error: 'bg-red-600 text-white',
20	        custom: '',
21	      },
22	    },
23	    defaultVariants: {
24	      variant: 'default',
25	    },
26	  },
27	);
28	
29	type BadgeProps = HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement> &
30	  VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants> & {
31	    'data-testid'?: string;
32	  };
33	
34	const Badge = forwardRef<HTMLSpanElement, BadgeProps>(
35	  ({ className, variant, style, ...props }, ref) => {
36	    return (
37	      <span
38	        ref={ref}
39	        className={cn(badgeVariants({ variant }), className)}
40	        style={style}
41	        {...props}
42	      />
43	    );
44	  },
45	);
46	
47	Badge.displayName = 'Badge';
48	
49	export { Badge, badgeVariants };
50	export type { BadgeProps };
51
```

```text
10	enum StatusSlot {

16	model User {

22	
23	  @@map("users")

25

61
```

You are working on the MawarBiru project at /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru. Build the Slot Temujanji (Consultation Slot) admin CRUD module (task 6.3).

IMPORTANT: This is Next.js 16. Check `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` if unsure about conventions.

## Context
- Admin layout exists at `app/admin/layout.tsx` with sidebar navigation
- Prisma schema — `SlotTemujanji`: id (cuid), tarikh (DateTime @db.Date), masaMula (String), masaTamat (String), status (StatusSlot: TERSEDIA/DITEMPAH/DIBATALKAN), relation to Temujanji
- Prisma client: `import { prisma } from '@/lib/db'`
- API helpers: `import { successResponse, errorResponse, withErrorHandling, validateBody, createRateLimiter } from '@/lib/api'`
- UI components: `import { Button, Input, Label, Card, CardHeader, CardBody, Badge } from '@/components/ui'`
- Zod is available (used in `lib/validations/temujanji.ts` for reference)

## Files to create

### 1. API Routes
**`app/api/admin/slot-temujanji/route.ts`** — GET (list with pagination, search by date, filter by status) + POST (create single or bulk)
- GET: query params `page`, `limit` (default 20), `tarikh` (date filter), `status` (filter)
- GET response: `{ data: slots[], meta: { total, page, limit } }`
- POST body: `{ tarikh, masaMula, masaTamat }` for single, or `{ tarikh, slots: [{ masaMula, masaTamat }] }` for bulk
- Validation: masaTamat must be after masaMula, no overlapping slots on same tarikh
- Use Zod schemas for validation

**`app/api/admin/slot-temujanji/[id]/route.ts`** — PUT (update) + DELETE
- PUT: only if status is TERSEDIA
- DELETE: if TERSEDIA delete directly; if DITEMPAH require `force=true` query param and warn

### 2. Zod Validation
**`lib/validations/slot-temujanji.ts`** — schemas for create/update

### 3. Admin Page
**`app/admin/slot-temujanji/page.tsx`** — the main admin page

### 4. Client Components
**`components/admin/slot-temujanji/slot-temujanji-table.tsx`** — client component with:
- Table with columns: Tarikh, Masa Mula, Masa Tamat, Status, Tindakan
- Search by date input
- Filter by status dropdown
- Pagination controls
- Edit/Delete action buttons per row
- Status badges: Tersedia (green), Ditempah (amber)

**`components/admin/slot-temujanji/slot-temujanji-form.tsx`** — client component modal/form:
- Fields: Tarikh (date picker), Masa Mula (time input), Masa Tamat (auto-calculated as Mula + 2 hours, editable)
- Used for both create and edit
- Bulk create option: toggle to add multiple time slots for same date

### Technical notes
- Use SWR for data fetching in client components (`import useSWR from 'swr'`)
- Use `react-hook-form` with `@hookform/resolvers/zod` for forms
- Table styling: use basic HTML table with Tailwind classes (no DataTable library needed)
- Keep the modal simple — could be the existing Modal component from `@/components/ui`
- Standard rigor — functional, not fancy
- `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` on API routes

```text
1	import { auth } from "@/lib/auth";
2	import { AdminShell } from "@/components/admin/admin-shell";
3	
4	export const metadata = {
5	  title: "Admin - MawarBiru",
6	};
7	
8	export default async function AdminLayout({
9	  children,
10	}: {
11	  children: React.ReactNode;
12	}) {
13	  const session = await auth();
14	
15	  // When there is no session (e.g. login page), render children without
16	  // the admin shell. The middleware already handles redirects for protected
17	  // routes, so this is only reached for public admin routes like /admin/login.
18	  if (!session?.user) {
19	    return <>{children}</>;
20	  }
21	
22	  return (
23	    <AdminShell nama={session.user.nama} email={session.user.email}>
24	      {children}
25	    </AdminShell>
26	  );
27	}
```

You are working on the MawarBiru project at /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru. Build the Slot Tempahan (Venue Booking Slot) admin CRUD module (task 6.5).

IMPORTANT: This is Next.js 16. Check `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` if unsure about conventions.

## Context
- Admin layout exists at `app/admin/layout.tsx` with sidebar navigation
- Prisma schema — `SlotTempahan`: id (cuid), tarikh (DateTime @db.Date), status (StatusSlot: TERSEDIA/DITEMPAH/DIBATALKAN), relation to Tempahan
- Prisma client: `import { prisma } from '@/lib/db'`
- API helpers: `import { successResponse, errorResponse, withErrorHandling, validateBody } from '@/lib/api'`
- UI components: `import { Button, Input, Label, Card, CardHeader, CardBody, Badge } from '@/components/ui'`
- Zod available for validation

## Files to create

### 1. API Routes
**`app/api/admin/slot-tempahan/route.ts`** — GET (list slots for a month, query param `month=YYYY-MM`) + POST (create single or bulk date range)
- GET: return all slots for the given month with status
- POST single: `{ tarikh }` — creates one slot
- POST bulk: `{ startDate, endDate }` — creates one slot per day in range (skip existing dates)
- Response format: `{ data: slots[], meta: { total } }`

**`app/api/admin/slot-tempahan/[id]/route.ts`** — PUT (update status) + DELETE
- DELETE: only TERSEDIA slots; DITEMPAH slots need `force=true`

### 2. Zod Validation
**`lib/validations/slot-tempahan.ts`** — schemas for create/update/bulk

### 3. Admin Page
**`app/admin/slot-tempahan/page.tsx`** — main admin page with calendar + list toggle

### 4. Client Components
**`components/admin/slot-tempahan/slot-tempahan-calendar.tsx`** — interactive calendar view:
- Monthly grid showing all dates
- Colour-coded: Tersedia (green bg), Ditempah (amber/red bg), empty (grey/none)
- Click empty date → create new slot
- Click existing slot → show options (edit status, delete)
- Month navigation (prev/next)

**`components/admin/slot-tempahan/slot-tempahan-list.tsx`** — table/list view alternative:
- Table with columns: Tarikh, Status, Tindakan
- Filter by status, pagination

**`components/admin/slot-tempahan/slot-tempahan-form.tsx`** — form for creating slots:
- Single date picker OR date range picker (startDate/endDate for bulk)
- Submit creates slots via API

### Technical notes
- Use SWR for data fetching in client components
- Calendar: build a simple grid — 7 columns (days of week), rows for weeks of month
- Day headers in Malay: Isn, Sel, Rab, Kha, Jum, Sab, Ahd
- The calendar is an interactive admin tool (not the public read-only one)
- Use Modal from `@/components/ui` for forms
- Standard rigor — functional, not fancy
- `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` on API routes

```text
1	'use client';
2	
3	import {
4	  useEffect,
5	  useRef,
6	  useCallback,
7	  useId,
8	  type ReactNode,
9	  type KeyboardEvent,
10	} from 'react';
11	import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';
12	import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
13	
14	const sizeClasses = {
15	  sm: 'max-w-sm',
16	  md: 'max-w-lg',
17	  lg: 'max-w-2xl',
18	} as const;
19	
20	interface ModalProps {
21	  isOpen: boolean;
22	  onClose: () => void;
23	  title: string;
24	  children: ReactNode;
25	  size?: keyof typeof sizeClasses;
26	  'data-testid'?: string;
27	}
28	
29	function Modal({
30	  isOpen,
31	  onClose,
32	  title,
33	  children,
34	  size = 'md',
35	  ...props
36	}: ModalProps) {
37	  const titleId = useId();
38	  const dialogRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
39	  const previousFocusRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null);
40	
41	  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
42	    (e: KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
43	      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
44	        onClose();
45	        return;
46	      }
47	
48	      if (e.key === 'Tab') {
49	        const dialog = dialogRef.current;
50	        if (!dialog) return;
51	
52	        const focusable = dialog.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>(
53	          'a[href], button:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])',
54	        );
55	
56	        if (focusable.length === 0) {
57	          e.preventDefault();
58	          return;
59	        }
60	
61	        const first = focusable[0];
62	        const last = focusable[focusable.length - 1];
63	
64	        if (e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === first) {
65	          e.preventDefault();
66	          last.focus();
67	        } else if (!e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === last) {
68	          e.preventDefault();
69	          first.focus();
70	        }
71	      }
72	    },
73	    [onClose],
74	  );
75	
76	  useEffect(() => {
77	    if (isOpen) {
78	      previousFocusRef.current = document.activeElement as HTMLElement;
79	      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
80	
81	      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
82	        dialogRef.current?.focus();
83	      });
84	    }
85	
86	    return () => {
87	      document.body.style.overflow = '';
88	    };
89	  }, [isOpen]);
90	
91	  useEffect(() => {
92	    if (!isOpen && previousFocusRef.current) {
93	      previousFocusRef.current.focus();
94	      previousFocusRef.current = null;
95	    }
96	  }, [isOpen]);
97	
98	  if (!isOpen) return null;
99	
100	  return createPortal(
101	    <div
102	      className={cn(
103	        'fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4',
104	        'motion-safe:animate-[fadeIn_150ms_ease-out]',
105	      )}
106	      style={{ zIndex: 'var(--z-modal)' }}
107	    >
108	      {/* Backdrop */}
109	      <div
110	        className="absolute inset-0 bg-navy/50"
111	        onClick={onClose}
112	        aria-hidden="true"
113	      />
114	
115	      {/* Dialog */}
116	      <div
117	        ref={dialogRef}
118	        role="dialog"
119	        aria-modal="true"
120	        aria-labelledby={titleId}
121	        tabIndex={-1}
122	        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
123	        data-testid={props['data-testid']}
124	        className={cn(
125	          'relative w-full bg-cream rounded-card shadow-elevated',
126	          'p-6',
127	          'motion-safe:animate-[scaleIn_150ms_ease-out]',
128	          'focus:outline-none',
129	          sizeClasses[size],
130	        )}
131	      >
132	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
133	          <h2
134	            id={titleId}
135	            className="font-serif text-xl font-semibold text-navy"
136	          >
137	            {title}
138	          </h2>
139	          <button
140	            type="button"
141	            onClick={onClose}
142	            className={cn(
143	              'rounded-button p-1 text-navy/60 hover:text-navy',
144	              'transition-colors duration-150 motion-reduce:transition-none',
145	              'focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-dusty-rose',
146	            )}
147	            aria-label="Close"
148	          >
149	            <svg
150	              xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
151	              className="h-5 w-5"
152	              viewBox="0 0 20 20"
153	              fill="currentColor"
154	              aria-hidden="true"
155	            >
156	              <path
157	                fillRule="evenodd"
158	                d="M4.293 4.293a1 1 0 011.414 0L10 8.586l4.293-4.293a1 1 0 111.414 1.414L11.414 10l4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414 1.414L10 11.414l-4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414-1.414L8.586 10 4.293 5.707a1 1 0 010-1.414z"
159	                clipRule="evenodd"
160	              />
161	            </svg>
162	          </button>
163	        </div>
164	        <div>{children}</div>
165	      </div>
166	    </div>,
167	    document.body,
168	  );
169	}
170	
171	export { Modal };
172	export type { ModalProps };
173
```

```tsx
import Link from "next/link";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/db";
import { Card, CardHeader, CardBody } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

function getTodayRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
  const now = new Date();
  const start = new Date(
    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate()),
  );
  const end = new Date(
    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate() + 1),
  );
  return { start, end };
}

function getCurrentMonthRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
  const now = new Date();
  const start = new Date(
    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), 1),
  );
  const end = new Date(
    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth() + 1, 1),
  );
  return { start, end };
}

function formatTarikh(date: Date): string {
  return date.toLocaleDateString("ms-MY", {
    day: "numeric",
    month: "short",
    year: "numeric",
  });
}

function statusBadgeVariant(
  status: string,
): "default" | "success" | "warning" | "error" {
  switch (status) {
    case "TERSEDIA":
      return "success";
    case "DITEMPAH":
      return "default";
    case "DIBATALKAN":
      return "error";
    default:
      return "default";
  }
}

export default async function DashboardPage() {
  const { start: todayStart, end: todayEnd } = getTodayRange();
  const { start: monthStart, end: monthEnd } = getCurrentMonthRange();

  const [
    temujanjiHariIni,
    tempahanBulanIni,
    jumlahPelanggan,
    jumlahPakej,
    recentTemujanji,
    recentTempahan,
  ] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.temujanji.count({
      where: {
        slotTemujanji: {
          tarikh: { gte: todayStart, lt: todayEnd },
        },
      },
    }),
    prisma.tempahan.count({
      where: {
        slotTempahan: {
          tarikh: { gte: monthStart, lt: monthEnd },
        },
      },
    }),
    prisma.pelanggan.count(),
    prisma.pakej.count(),
    prisma.temujanji.findMany({
      take: 5,
      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      include: {
        pelanggan: { select: { nama: true } },
        slotTemujanji: { select: { tarikh: true, status: true } },
      },
    }),
    prisma.tempahan.findMany({
      take: 5,
      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      include: {
        slotTempahan: { select: { tarikh: true } },
        pakej: { select: { namaPakej: true } },
      },
    }),
  ]);

  const cards = [
    {
      title: "Temujanji Hari Ini",
      count: temujanjiHariIni,
      href: "/admin/temujanji",
    },
    {
      title: "Tempahan Bulan Ini",
      count: tempahanBulanIni,
      href: "/admin/tempahan",
    },
    {
      title: "Jumlah Pelanggan",
      count: jumlahPelanggan,
      href: "/admin/pelanggan",
    },
    {
      title: "Jumlah Pakej",
      count: jumlahPakej,
      href: "/admin/pakej",
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-8">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-navy">Dashboard</h1>

      {/* Count Cards */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
        {cards.map((card) => (
          <Link key={card.href} href={card.href}>
            <Card className="bg-white hover:shadow-elevated">
              <CardBody>
                <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">{card.title}</p>
                <p className="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-navy">
                  {card.count}
                </p>
              </CardBody>
            </Card>
          </Link>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Recent Activity */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 lg:grid-cols-2">
        {/* Recent Temujanji */}
        <Card className="bg-white">
          <CardHeader>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
              Temujanji Terkini
            </h2>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardBody>
            {recentTemujanji.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada temujanji.</p>
            ) : (
              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
                {recentTemujanji.map((t) => (
                  <li
                    key={t.id}
                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
                  >
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
                        {t.pelanggan.nama}
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTemujanji.tarikh)}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(t.slotTemujanji.status)}>
                      {t.slotTemujanji.status}
                    </Badge>
                  </li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            )}
          </CardBody>
        </Card>

        {/* Recent Tempahan */}
        <Card className="bg-white">
          <CardHeader>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
              Tempahan Terkini
            </h2>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardBody>
            {recentTempahan.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada tempahan.</p>
            ) : (
              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
                {recentTempahan.map((t) => (
                  <li
                    key={t.id}
                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
                  >
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
                        {t.namaTempahan}
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTempahan.tarikh)} &middot;{" "}
                        {t.pakej.namaPakej}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            )}
          </CardBody>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```text
1	import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';

3	type ApiResponse<T> = {
4	  readonly success: boolean;
5	  readonly data: T | null;
6	  readonly error: string | null;
7	};
8	
9	export function successResponse<T>(data: T, status = 200) {
10	  return NextResponse.json<ApiResponse<T>>(
11	    { success: true, data, error: null },
12	    { status },
13	  );
14	}
15	
16	export function errorResponse(message: string, status = 500) {
17	  return NextResponse.json<ApiResponse<null>>(
18	    { success: false, data: null, error: message },
19	    { status },
20	  );
21	}
```

 `./lib/api/handler.ts`

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { errorResponse } from './response';
3	import { ValidationError } from './validate';
4	import { Prisma } from '@prisma/client';
5	
6	// Map Prisma error codes to Bahasa Malaysia messages
7	const prismaErrorMessages: Readonly<
8	  Record<string, { readonly message: string; readonly status: number }>
9	> = {
10	  P2002: { message: 'Rekod sudah wujud', status: 409 },
11	  P2025: { message: 'Rekod tidak dijumpai', status: 404 },
12	};
13	
14	type RouteHandler = (req: NextRequest, context?: unknown) => Promise<Response>;
15	
16	export function withErrorHandling(handler: RouteHandler): RouteHandler {
17	  return async (req, context) => {
18	    try {
19	      return await handler(req, context);
20	    } catch (error) {
21	      console.error('[API Error]', error);
22	
23	      if (error instanceof Prisma.PrismaClientKnownRequestError) {
24	        const mapped = prismaErrorMessages[error.code];
25	        if (mapped) {
26	          return errorResponse(mapped.message, mapped.status);
27	        }
28	      }
29	
30	      if (error instanceof ValidationError) {
31	        return errorResponse(error.message, 400);
32	      }
33	
34	      return errorResponse('Ralat dalaman pelayan', 500);
35	    }
36	  };
37	}
38
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { z } from 'zod';
2	
3	export class ValidationError extends Error {
4	  constructor(message: string) {
5	    super(message);
6	    this.name = 'ValidationError';
7	  }
8	}
9	
10	export function validateBody<T>(schema: z.ZodSchema<T>, body: unknown): T {
11	  const result = schema.safeParse(body);
12	  if (!result.success) {
13	    const firstIssue = result.error.issues[0];
14	    throw new ValidationError(firstIssue?.message ?? 'Data tidak sah');
15	  }
16	  return result.data;
17	}
18
```

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-04-20 12:01:40Z)**_

You are working on the MawarBiru project at /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru. Build the Pakej (Package) admin CRUD module (task 6.7).

IMPORTANT: This is Next.js 16. Check `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` if unsure about conventions.

## Context
- Admin layout exists at `app/admin/layout.tsx`
- Prisma schema:
  - `Pakej`: id, namaPakej (unique), warna (hex colour string), gambar (optional string), createdAt. Relations: tiers[], sections[], tempahan[]
  - `PakejTier`: id, pakejId, namaTier, bilanganPax (Int), harga (Decimal @db.Decimal(10,2)), createdAt
  - `PakejSection`: id, pakejId, tajuk, items (Json — array of strings), createdAt
- Prisma client: `import { prisma } from '@/lib/db'`
- API helpers: `import { successResponse, errorResponse, withErrorHandling, validateBody } from '@/lib/api'`
- UI components: `import { Button, Input, Label, Card, CardHeader, CardBody, Badge, Modal } from '@/components/ui'`
- Zod available

## Files to create

### 1. API Routes
**`app/api/admin/pakej/route.ts`** — GET (list all with tier count) + POST (create with tiers + sections)
- GET: include `_count: { tiers: true, sections: true, tempahan: true }`
- POST body: `{ namaPakej, warna, tiers: [{ namaTier, bilanganPax, harga }], sections: [{ tajuk, items: string[] }] }`
- Create pakej + tiers + sections in a transaction

**`app/api/admin/pakej/[id]/route.ts`** — GET (single with tiers+sections) + PUT (update) + DELETE
- PUT: update pakej fields + delete all existing tiers/sections and recreate (simpler than diffing)
- DELETE: only if no Tempahan references it. Check `_count.tempahan > 0` and return error if so

### 2. Zod Validation
**`lib/validations/pakej.ts`** — schemas for create/update

### 3. Admin Page
**`app/admin/pakej/page.tsx`** — list page

### 4. Admin Create/Edit Pages
**`app/admin/pakej/baru/page.tsx`** — create new pakej (full-page form, not modal — too complex for modal)
**`app/admin/pakej/[id]/edit/page.tsx`** — edit existing pakej

### 5. Client Components
**`components/admin/pakej/pakej-table.tsx`** — list table with columns:
- Nama Pakej, Warna (colour swatch), Bilangan Tier, Gambar (thumbnail if exists), Tindakan (edit/delete)

**`components/admin/pakej/pakej-form.tsx`** — form component used by both create and edit:
- Fields: Nama Pakej (text), Warna (color picker input + preview swatch)
- Dynamic Tiers section: add/remove rows, each row has namaTier + bilanganPax + harga fields. Min 1 tier.
- Dynamic Sections section: add/remove rows, each row has tajuk + items (textarea, one item per line)
- Gambar: skip for now (task 6.8 handles upload separately), just show a placeholder
- Submit button

### Technical notes
- Use SWR for list fetching
- Use `react-hook-form` with Zod for the form
- Dynamic fields: use `useFieldArray` from react-hook-form for tiers and sections
- Colour picker: `<input type="color">` with a hex text input beside it
- For sections items: textarea where each line = one item, convert to/from string[] on submit/load
- Harga displayed with "RM" prefix
- Standard rigor — functional over fancy
- `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` on API routes

```text
1	import { LRUCache } from 'lru-cache';
2	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
3	import { errorResponse } from './response';
4	
5	type RateLimitConfig = {
6	  readonly interval: number; // ms
7	  readonly maxRequests: number;
8	};
9	
10	export function createRateLimiter(config: RateLimitConfig) {
11	  const cache = new LRUCache<string, readonly number[]>({
12	    max: 500,
13	    ttl: config.interval,
14	  });
15	
16	  return function rateLimit(req: NextRequest): Response | null {
17	    const ip =
18	      req.headers.get('x-forwarded-for') ??
19	      req.headers.get('x-real-ip') ??
20	      'unknown';
21	    const now = Date.now();
22	    const windowStart = now - config.interval;
23	
24	    const timestamps = cache.get(ip) ?? [];
25	    const recentTimestamps = timestamps.filter((t) => t > windowStart);
26	
27	    if (recentTimestamps.length >= config.maxRequests) {
28	      return errorResponse(
29	        'Terlalu banyak permintaan. Sila cuba sebentar lagi.',
30	        429,
31	      );
32	    }
33	
34	    cache.set(ip, [...recentTimestamps, now]);
35	    return null; // not rate limited
36	  };
37	}
38
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	
4	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
5	import {
6	  successResponse,
7	  withErrorHandling,
8	  createRateLimiter,
9	} from '@/lib/api';
10	
11	const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
12	  interval: 60_000,
13	  maxRequests: 30,
14	});
15	
16	export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
17	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
18	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
19	
20	  const today = new Date();
21	  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
22	
23	  const maxDate = new Date(today);
24	  maxDate.setDate(maxDate.getDate() + 14);
25	
26	  const slots = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
27	    where: {
28	      status: 'TERSEDIA',
29	      tarikh: {
30	        gte: today,
31	        lt: maxDate,
32	      },
33	    },
34	    orderBy: [{ tarikh: 'asc' }, { masaMula: 'asc' }],
35	  });
36	
37	  return successResponse(slots);
38	});
39
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { forwardRef, type HTMLAttributes } from 'react';
2	import { cva, type VariantProps } from 'class-variance-authority';
3	import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
4	
5	const badgeVariants = cva(
6	  [
7	    'inline-flex items-center',
8	    'rounded-badge px-2.5 py-0.5',
9	    'text-xs font-medium',
10	    'transition-colors duration-150',
11	    'motion-reduce:transition-none',
12	  ],
13	  {
14	    variants: {
15	      variant: {
16	        default: 'bg-navy text-cream',
17	        success: 'bg-green-600 text-white',
18	        warning: 'bg-amber-500 text-navy',
19	        error: 'bg-red-600 text-white',
20	        custom: '',
21	      },
22	    },
23	    defaultVariants: {
24	      variant: 'default',
25	    },
26	  },
27	);
28	
29	type BadgeProps = HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement> &
30	  VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants> & {
31	    'data-testid'?: string;
32	  };
33	
34	const Badge = forwardRef<HTMLSpanElement, BadgeProps>(
35	  ({ className, variant, style, ...props }, ref) => {
36	    return (
37	      <span
38	        ref={ref}
39	        className={cn(badgeVariants({ variant }), className)}
40	        style={style}
41	        {...props}
42	      />
43	    );
44	  },
45	);
46	
47	Badge.displayName = 'Badge';
48	
49	export { Badge, badgeVariants };
50	export type { BadgeProps };
51
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import Link from "next/link";
2	import { prisma } from "@/lib/db";
3	import { Card, CardHeader, CardBody } from "@/components/ui/card";
4	import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
5	
6	function getTodayRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
7	  const now = new Date();
8	  const start = new Date(
9	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate()),
10	  );
11	  const end = new Date(
12	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate() + 1),
13	  );
14	  return { start, end };
15	}
16	
17	function getCurrentMonthRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
18	  const now = new Date();
19	  const start = new Date(
20	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), 1),
21	  );
22	  const end = new Date(
23	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth() + 1, 1),
24	  );
25	  return { start, end };
26	}
27	
28	function formatTarikh(date: Date): string {
29	  return date.toLocaleDateString("ms-MY", {
30	    day: "numeric",
31	    month: "short",
32	    year: "numeric",
33	  });
34	}
35	
36	function statusBadgeVariant(
37	  status: string,
38	): "default" | "success" | "warning" | "error" {
39	  switch (status) {
40	    case "TERSEDIA":
41	      return "success";
42	    case "DITEMPAH":
43	      return "default";
44	    case "DIBATALKAN":
45	      return "error";
46	    default:
47	      return "default";
48	  }
49	}
50	
51	export default async function DashboardPage() {
52	  const { start: todayStart, end: todayEnd } = getTodayRange();
53	  const { start: monthStart, end: monthEnd } = getCurrentMonthRange();
54	
55	  const [
56	    temujanjiHariIni,
57	    tempahanBulanIni,
58	    jumlahPelanggan,
59	    jumlahPakej,
60	    recentTemujanji,
61	    recentTempahan,
62	  ] = await Promise.all([
63	    prisma.temujanji.count({
64	      where: {
65	        slotTemujanji: {
66	          tarikh: { gte: todayStart, lt: todayEnd },
67	        },
68	      },
69	    }),
70	    prisma.tempahan.count({
71	      where: {
72	        slotTempahan: {
73	          tarikh: { gte: monthStart, lt: monthEnd },
74	        },
75	      },
76	    }),
77	    prisma.pelanggan.count(),
78	    prisma.pakej.count(),
79	    prisma.temujanji.findMany({
80	      take: 5,
81	      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
82	      include: {
83	        pelanggan: { select: { nama: true } },
84	        slotTemujanji: { select: { tarikh: true, status: true } },
85	      },
86	    }),
87	    prisma.tempahan.findMany({
88	      take: 5,
89	      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
90	      include: {
91	        slotTempahan: { select: { tarikh: true } },
92	        pakej: { select: { namaPakej: true } },
93	      },
94	    }),
95	  ]);
96	
97	  const cards = [
98	    {
99	      title: "Temujanji Hari Ini",
100	      count: temujanjiHariIni,
101	      href: "/admin/temujanji",
102	    },
103	    {
104	      title: "Tempahan Bulan Ini",
105	      count: tempahanBulanIni,
106	      href: "/admin/tempahan",
107	    },
108	    {
109	      title: "Jumlah Pelanggan",
110	      count: jumlahPelanggan,
111	      href: "/admin/pelanggan",
112	    },
113	    {
114	      title: "Jumlah Pakej",
115	      count: jumlahPakej,
116	      href: "/admin/pakej",
117	    },
118	  ];
119	
120	  return (
121	    <div className="space-y-8">
122	      <h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-navy">Dashboard</h1>
123	
124	      {/* Count Cards */}
125	      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
126	        {cards.map((card) => (
127	          <Link key={card.href} href={card.href}>
128	            <Card className="bg-white hover:shadow-elevated">
129	              <CardBody>
130	                <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">{card.title}</p>
131	                <p className="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-navy">
132	                  {card.count}
133	                </p>
134	              </CardBody>
135	            </Card>
136	          </Link>
137	        ))}
138	      </div>
139	
140	      {/* Recent Activity */}
141	      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 lg:grid-cols-2">
142	        {/* Recent Temujanji */}
143	        <Card className="bg-white">
144	          <CardHeader>
145	            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
146	              Temujanji Terkini
147	            </h2>
148	          </CardHeader>
149	          <CardBody>
150	            {recentTemujanji.length === 0 ? (
151	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada temujanji.</p>
152	            ) : (
153	              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
154	                {recentTemujanji.map((t) => (
155	                  <li
156	                    key={t.id}
157	                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
158	                  >
159	                    <div>
160	                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
161	                        {t.pelanggan.nama}
162	                      </p>
163	                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
164	                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTemujanji.tarikh)}
165	                      </p>
166	                    </div>
167	                    <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(t.slotTemujanji.status)}>
168	                      {t.slotTemujanji.status}
169	                    </Badge>
170	                  </li>
171	                ))}
172	              </ul>
173	            )}
174	          </CardBody>
175	        </Card>
176	
177	        {/* Recent Tempahan */}
178	        <Card className="bg-white">
179	          <CardHeader>
180	            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
181	              Tempahan Terkini
182	            </h2>
183	          </CardHeader>
184	          <CardBody>
185	            {recentTempahan.length === 0 ? (
186	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada tempahan.</p>
187	            ) : (
188	              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
189	                {recentTempahan.map((t) => (
190	                  <li
191	                    key={t.id}
192	                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
193	                  >
194	                    <div>
195	                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
196	                        {t.namaTempahan}
197	                      </p>
198	                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
199	                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTempahan.tarikh)} &middot;{" "}
200	                        {t.pakej.namaPakej}
201	                      </p>
202	                    </div>
203	                  </li>
204	                ))}
205	              </ul>
206	            )}
207	          </CardBody>
208	        </Card>
209	      </div>
210	    </div>
211	  );
212	}
213
```

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-04-20 12:01:52Z)**_

You are working on the MawarBiru project at /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru. Build the image upload utility for Pakej (task 6.8).

IMPORTANT: This is Next.js 16. Check `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` if unsure about conventions.

## Context
- Prisma schema — `Pakej` has `gambar String?` field for image path
- API helpers: `import { successResponse, errorResponse } from '@/lib/api'`
- `.gitignore` exists — check if `public/uploads/` is already ignored, add it if not

## Files to create

### 1. API Route
**`app/api/admin/upload/route.ts`** — POST endpoint for file upload
- Accept multipart form data (use Web API `Request.formData()`)
- Validate file type: only JPG, PNG (check MIME type)
- Validate file size: max 5MB
- Generate unique filename: `{crypto.randomUUID()}.{extension}`
- Save to `public/uploads/pakej/` directory
- Create the directory if it doesn't exist (`fs.mkdir` with recursive)
- Return `{ success: true, data: { url: "/uploads/pakej/{filename}" } }`
- If `oldImage` field is provided in the form data, delete the old file from disk
- Handle errors gracefully: missing file, wrong type, too large, disk write failure

### 2. Upload Helper Component
**`components/admin/pakej/image-upload.tsx`** — client component:
- File input (accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png")
- Preview of current image (if editing and image exists)
- Preview of selected new image before upload
- Upload button / auto-upload on file select
- Loading state during upload
- Error display for validation failures
- Returns the uploaded URL to parent via callback prop

### Technical notes
- Use native `fs` module (Node.js runtime) — NOT edge runtime
- Do NOT use formidable or multer — Next.js 16 supports `req.formData()` natively
- Ensure `public/uploads/` is in `.gitignore`
- Use `import { writeFile, mkdir, unlink } from 'fs/promises'`
- Use `import { join } from 'path'`
- The API route needs `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'`
- Standard rigor — keep it simple and functional

**Summary of changes:**

File modified: `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/page.tsx`

The admin dashboard is now a server component that:

1. **Count Cards (4-card grid):**
   - Temujanji Hari Ini -- counts temujanji where slot tarikh = today (UTC)
   - Tempahan Bulan Ini -- counts tempahan where slot tarikh is in current month
   - Jumlah Pelanggan -- total pelanggan count
   - Jumlah Pakej -- total pakej count
   - Each card links to its respective admin page

2. **Recent Activity (2 lists in 2-column grid):**
   - 5 most recent temujanji -- shows pelanggan nama, slot tarikh, status badge
   - 5 most recent tempahan -- shows namaTempahan, slot tarikh, pakej name

3. **Technical details:**
   - All data fetched server-side with `Promise.all` for parallel queries
   - Uses UTC date ranges for today/month comparisons
   - Responsive grid: 1 col mobile, 2 cols sm, 4 cols lg for cards; 1/2 col for activity lists
   - Uses existing `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardBody`, `Badge` components
   - Status badges use color variants (success/default/error) for TERSEDIA/DITEMPAH/DIBATALKAN
   - Passes TypeScript check cleanly

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>

`cat /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/prisma/schema.prisma 2>/dev/null || echo "no prisma"`

```text
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "mysql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

enum StatusSlot {
  TERSEDIA
  DITEMPAH
  DIBATALKAN
}

model User {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  email        String   @unique
  passwordHash String
  nama         String
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  @@map("users")
}

model Pelanggan {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  nama      String
  noTelefon String   @unique
  nota      String?  @db.Text
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  temujanji Temujanji[]
  tempahan  Tempahan[]

  @@map("pelanggan")
}

model SlotTemujanji {
  id        String     @id @default(cuid())
  tarikh    DateTime   @db.Date
  masaMula  String
  masaTamat String
  status    StatusSlot @default(TERSEDIA)
  createdAt DateTime   @default(now())

  temujanji Temujanji?

  @@map("slot_temujanji")
}

model Temujanji {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  pelangganId     String
  slotTemujanjiId String   @unique
  nota            String?  @db.Text
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())

  pelanggan     Pelanggan     @relation(fields: [pelangganId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  slotTemujanji SlotTemujanji @relation(fields: [slotTemujanjiId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("temujanji")
}

model SlotTempahan {
  id        String     @id @default(cuid())
  tarikh    DateTime   @db.Date
  status    StatusSlot @default(TERSEDIA)
  createdAt DateTime   @default(now())

  tempahan Tempahan?

  @@map("slot_tempahan")
}

model Tempahan {
  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
  namaTempahan   String
  slotTempahanId String   @unique
  pakejId        String
  pelangganId    String
  nota           String?  @db.Text
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())

  slotTempahan SlotTempahan @relation(fields: [slotTempahanId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  pakej        Pakej        @relation(fields: [pakejId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  pelanggan    Pelanggan    @relation(fields: [pelangganId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@map("tempahan")
}

model Pakej {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  namaPakej String   @unique
  warna     String
  gambar    String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tiers    PakejTier[]
  sections PakejSection[]
  tempahan Tempahan[]

  @@map("pakej")
}

model PakejTier {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  pakejId     String
  namaTier    String
  bilanganPax Int
  harga       Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  pakej Pakej @relation(fields: [pakejId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("pakej_tier")
}

model PakejSection {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  pakejId   String
  tajuk     String
  items     Json
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  pakej Pakej @relation(fields: [pakejId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("pakej_section")
}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { auth } from "@/lib/auth";
2	import { AdminShell } from "@/components/admin/admin-shell";
3	
4	export const metadata = {
5	  title: "Admin - MawarBiru",
6	};
7	
8	export default async function AdminLayout({
9	  children,
10	}: {
11	  children: React.ReactNode;
12	}) {
13	  const session = await auth();
14	
15	  // When there is no session (e.g. login page), render children without
16	  // the admin shell. The middleware already handles redirects for protected
17	  // routes, so this is only reached for public admin routes like /admin/login.
18	  if (!session?.user) {
19	    return <>{children}</>;
20	  }
21	
22	  return (
23	    <AdminShell nama={session.user.nama} email={session.user.email}>
24	      {children}
25	    </AdminShell>
26	  );
27	}
28
```

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-04-20 12:02:06Z)**_

You are working on the MawarBiru project at /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru. Build the Pelanggan (Customer) admin CRUD module (task 6.9).

IMPORTANT: This is Next.js 16. Check `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` if unsure about conventions.

## Context
- Admin layout exists at `app/admin/layout.tsx` with sidebar navigation
- Prisma schema — `Pelanggan`: id (cuid), nama (String), noTelefon (String @unique), nota (String? @db.Text), createdAt. Relations: temujanji[], tempahan[]
- Phone validation regex already exists at `lib/validations/temujanji.ts`: `/^(\+?60)?0?1[0-9]-?[0-9]{7,8}$/`
- Prisma client: `import { prisma } from '@/lib/db'`
- API helpers: `import { successResponse, errorResponse, withErrorHandling, validateBody } from '@/lib/api'`
- UI components: `import { Button, Input, Label, Card, CardHeader, CardBody, Badge, Modal, Textarea } from '@/components/ui'`
- Zod available

## Files to create

### 1. API Routes
**`app/api/admin/pelanggan/route.ts`** — GET (list with pagination + search) + POST (create)
- GET: query params `page`, `limit` (default 20), `search` (search by nama or noTelefon)
- Include relation counts: `_count: { temujanji: true, tempahan: true }`
- POST: create pelanggan. On create, check if noTelefon already exists and return warning (409 with message)

**`app/api/admin/pelanggan/[id]/route.ts`** — GET (single with relations) + PUT (update) + DELETE
- GET: include temujanji (with slot details) and tempahan (with pakej details) — for detail view
- DELETE: only if no linked temujanji or tempahan. Return error with counts if referenced.

### 2. Zod Validation
**`lib/validations/pelanggan.ts`** — schemas for create/update
- Reuse the Malaysian phone regex pattern
- nama: required, min 2, max 100
- noTelefon: required, Malaysian format
- nota: optional, max 500

### 3. Admin Page
**`app/admin/pelanggan/page.tsx`** — list page

### 4. Client Components
**`components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-table.tsx`** — list table:
- Columns: Nama, No. Telefon, Nota (truncated to ~50 chars), Jml Temujanji, Jml Tempahan, Tindakan
- Search input (searches nama or phone)
- Pagination controls

**`components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-form.tsx`** — create/edit form (in Modal):
- Fields: Nama, No. Telefon, Nota (textarea)
- Phone validation with Malaysian format
- Used for both create and edit

**`components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-detail.tsx`** — detail view (in Modal or slide-over):
- Full pelanggan info
- List of linked temujanji (nama, tarikh, status)
- List of linked tempahan (namaTempahan, tarikh, pakej)

### Technical notes
- Use SWR for data fetching
- Use `react-hook-form` with Zod
- Phone normalization: strip dashes before saving
- Standard rigor — functional over fancy
- `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` on API routes

```text
7	};
8	
9	export function successResponse<T>(data: T, status = 200) {
10	  return NextResponse.json<ApiResponse<T>>(
11	    { success: true, data, error: null },
12	    { status },
13	  );
14	}
15	
16	export function errorResponse(message: string, status = 500) {
17	  return NextResponse.json<ApiResponse<null>>(
18	    { success: false, data: null, error: message },
19	    { status },
20	  );
21	}
22
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { z } from 'zod';
2	
3	export class ValidationError extends Error {
4	  constructor(message: string) {
5	    super(message);
6	    this.name = 'ValidationError';
7	  }
8	}
9	
10	export function validateBody<T>(schema: z.ZodSchema<T>, body: unknown): T {
11	  const result = schema.safeParse(body);
12	  if (!result.success) {
13	    const firstIssue = result.error.issues[0];
14	    throw new ValidationError(firstIssue?.message ?? 'Data tidak sah');
15	  }
16	  return result.data;
17	}
18
```

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { errorResponse } from './response';
3	import { ValidationError } from './validate';
4	import { Prisma } from '@prisma/client';
5	
6	// Map Prisma error codes to Bahasa Malaysia messages
7	const prismaErrorMessages: Readonly<
8	  Record<string, { readonly message: string; readonly status: number }>
9	> = {
10	  P2002: { message: 'Rekod sudah wujud', status: 409 },
11	  P2025: { message: 'Rekod tidak dijumpai', status: 404 },
12	};
13	
14	type RouteHandler = (req: NextRequest, context?: unknown) => Promise<Response>;
15	
16	export function withErrorHandling(handler: RouteHandler): RouteHandler {
17	  return async (req, context) => {
18	    try {
19	      return await handler(req, context);
20	    } catch (error) {
21	      console.error('[API Error]', error);
22	
23	      if (error instanceof Prisma.PrismaClientKnownRequestError) {
24	        const mapped = prismaErrorMessages[error.code];
25	        if (mapped) {
26	          return errorResponse(mapped.message, mapped.status);
27	        }
28	      }
29	
30	      if (error instanceof ValidationError) {
31	        return errorResponse(error.message, 400);
32	      }
33	
34	      return errorResponse('Ralat dalaman pelayan', 500);
35	    }
36	  };
37	}
38
```
</details></tool-use>

<result>TypeScript compiles cleanly with no errors. The dashboard page is complete.

**Summary of changes:**

File modified: `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/page.tsx`

The admin dashboard is now a server component that:

1. **Count Cards (4-card grid):**
   - Temujanji Hari Ini -- counts temujanji where slot tarikh = today (UTC)
   - Tempahan Bulan Ini -- counts tempahan where slot tarikh is in current month
   - Jumlah Pelanggan -- total pelanggan count
   - Jumlah Pakej -- total pakej count
   - Each card links to its respective admin page

2. **Recent Activity (2 lists in 2-column grid):**
   - 5 most recent temujanji -- shows pelanggan nama, slot tarikh, status badge
   - 5 most recent tempahan -- shows namaTempahan, slot tarikh, pakej name

3. **Technical details:**
   - All data fetched server-side with `Promise.all` for parallel queries
   - Uses UTC date ranges for today/month comparisons
   - Responsive grid: 1 col mobile, 2 cols sm, 4 cols lg for cards; 1/2 col for activity lists
   - Uses existing `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardBody`, `Badge` components
   - Status badges use color variants (success/default/error) for TERSEDIA/DITEMPAH/DIBATALKAN
   - Passes TypeScript check cleanly</result>

```text
1	'use client';
2	
3	import {
4	  useEffect,
5	  useRef,
6	  useCallback,
7	  useId,
8	  type ReactNode,
9	  type KeyboardEvent,
10	} from 'react';
11	import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';
12	import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
13	
14	const sizeClasses = {
15	  sm: 'max-w-sm',
16	  md: 'max-w-lg',
17	  lg: 'max-w-2xl',
18	} as const;
19	
20	interface ModalProps {
21	  isOpen: boolean;
22	  onClose: () => void;
23	  title: string;
24	  children: ReactNode;
25	  size?: keyof typeof sizeClasses;
26	  'data-testid'?: string;
27	}
28	
29	function Modal({
30	  isOpen,
31	  onClose,
32	  title,
33	  children,
34	  size = 'md',
35	  ...props
36	}: ModalProps) {
37	  const titleId = useId();
38	  const dialogRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
39	  const previousFocusRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null);
40	
41	  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
42	    (e: KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
43	      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
44	        onClose();
45	        return;
46	      }
47	
48	      if (e.key === 'Tab') {
49	        const dialog = dialogRef.current;
50	        if (!dialog) return;
51	
52	        const focusable = dialog.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>(
53	          'a[href], button:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])',
54	        );
55	
56	        if (focusable.length === 0) {
57	          e.preventDefault();
58	          return;
59	        }
60	
61	        const first = focusable[0];
62	        const last = focusable[focusable.length - 1];
63	
64	        if (e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === first) {
65	          e.preventDefault();
66	          last.focus();
67	        } else if (!e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === last) {
68	          e.preventDefault();
69	          first.focus();
70	        }
71	      }
72	    },
73	    [onClose],
74	  );
75	
76	  useEffect(() => {
77	    if (isOpen) {
78	      previousFocusRef.current = document.activeElement as HTMLElement;
79	      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
80	
81	      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
82	        dialogRef.current?.focus();
83	      });
84	    }
85	
86	    return () => {
87	      document.body.style.overflow = '';
88	    };
89	  }, [isOpen]);
90	
91	  useEffect(() => {
92	    if (!isOpen && previousFocusRef.current) {
93	      previousFocusRef.current.focus();
94	      previousFocusRef.current = null;
95	    }
96	  }, [isOpen]);
97	
98	  if (!isOpen) return null;
99	
100	  return createPortal(
101	    <div
102	      className={cn(
103	        'fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4',
104	        'motion-safe:animate-[fadeIn_150ms_ease-out]',
105	      )}
106	      style={{ zIndex: 'var(--z-modal)' }}
107	    >
108	      {/* Backdrop */}
109	      <div
110	        className="absolute inset-0 bg-navy/50"
111	        onClick={onClose}
112	        aria-hidden="true"
113	      />
114	
115	      {/* Dialog */}
116	      <div
117	        ref={dialogRef}
118	        role="dialog"
119	        aria-modal="true"
120	        aria-labelledby={titleId}
121	        tabIndex={-1}
122	        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
123	        data-testid={props['data-testid']}
124	        className={cn(
125	          'relative w-full bg-cream rounded-card shadow-elevated',
126	          'p-6',
127	          'motion-safe:animate-[scaleIn_150ms_ease-out]',
128	          'focus:outline-none',
129	          sizeClasses[size],
130	        )}
131	      >
132	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
133	          <h2
134	            id={titleId}
135	            className="font-serif text-xl font-semibold text-navy"
136	          >
137	            {title}
138	          </h2>
139	          <button
140	            type="button"
141	            onClick={onClose}
142	            className={cn(
143	              'rounded-button p-1 text-navy/60 hover:text-navy',
144	              'transition-colors duration-150 motion-reduce:transition-none',
145	              'focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-dusty-rose',
146	            )}
147	            aria-label="Close"
148	          >
149	            <svg
150	              xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
151	              className="h-5 w-5"
152	              viewBox="0 0 20 20"
153	              fill="currentColor"
154	              aria-hidden="true"
155	            >
156	              <path
157	                fillRule="evenodd"
158	                d="M4.293 4.293a1 1 0 011.414 0L10 8.586l4.293-4.293a1 1 0 111.414 1.414L11.414 10l4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414 1.414L10 11.414l-4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414-1.414L8.586 10 4.293 5.707a1 1 0 010-1.414z"
159	                clipRule="evenodd"
160	              />
161	            </svg>
162	          </button>
163	        </div>
164	        <div>{children}</div>
165	      </div>
166	    </div>,
167	    document.body,
168	  );
169	}
170	
171	export { Modal };
172	export type { ModalProps };
173
```
</details></tool-use>

```typescript
import { z } from 'zod';

const timeRegex = /^([01]\d|2[0-3]):[0-5]\d$/;

const timeString = z
  .string({ error: 'Masa diperlukan' })
  .regex(timeRegex, 'Format masa tidak sah (cth: 09:00)');

export const createSlotSchema = z
  .object({
    tarikh: z
      .string({ error: 'Tarikh diperlukan' })
      .date('Format tarikh tidak sah (cth: 2026-01-15)'),
    masaMula: timeString,
    masaTamat: timeString,
  })
  .refine((data) => data.masaTamat > data.masaMula, {
    message: 'Masa tamat mestilah selepas masa mula',
    path: ['masaTamat'],
  });

export type CreateSlotInput = z.infer<typeof createSlotSchema>;

const slotEntry = z.object({
  masaMula: timeString,
  masaTamat: timeString,
});

export const bulkCreateSlotSchema = z
  .object({
    tarikh: z
      .string({ error: 'Tarikh diperlukan' })
      .date('Format tarikh tidak sah (cth: 2026-01-15)'),
    slots: z
      .array(slotEntry, { error: 'Senarai slot diperlukan' })
      .min(1, 'Sekurang-kurangnya satu slot diperlukan'),
  })
  .refine(
    (data) => data.slots.every((s) => s.masaTamat > s.masaMula),
    {
      message: 'Masa tamat mestilah selepas masa mula untuk semua slot',
      path: ['slots'],
    },
  );

export type BulkCreateSlotInput = z.infer<typeof bulkCreateSlotSchema>;

export const updateSlotSchema = z
  .object({
    tarikh: z
      .string()
      .date('Format tarikh tidak sah (cth: 2026-01-15)')
      .optional(),
    masaMula: timeString.optional(),
    masaTamat: timeString.optional(),
  })
  .refine(
    (data) => {
      if (data.masaMula && data.masaTamat) {
        return data.masaTamat > data.masaMula;
      }
      return true;
    },
    {
      message: 'Masa tamat mestilah selepas masa mula',
      path: ['masaTamat'],
    },
  );

export type UpdateSlotInput = z.infer<typeof updateSlotSchema>;
```

```text
1	import { auth } from "@/lib/auth";
2	import { AdminShell } from "@/components/admin/admin-shell";
3	
4	export const metadata = {
5	  title: "Admin - MawarBiru",
6	};
7	
8	export default async function AdminLayout({
9	  children,
10	}: {
11	  children: React.ReactNode;
12	}) {
13	  const session = await auth();
14	
15	  // When there is no session (e.g. login page), render children without
16	  // the admin shell. The middleware already handles redirects for protected
17	  // routes, so this is only reached for public admin routes like /admin/login.
18	  if (!session?.user) {
19	    return <>{children}</>;
20	  }
21	
22	  return (
23	    <AdminShell nama={session.user.nama} email={session.user.email}>
24	      {children}
25	    </AdminShell>
26	  );
27	}
28
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';
2	
3	type ApiResponse<T> = {
4	  readonly success: boolean;
5	  readonly data: T | null;
6	  readonly error: string | null;
7	};
8	
9	export function successResponse<T>(data: T, status = 200) {
10	  return NextResponse.json<ApiResponse<T>>(
11	    { success: true, data, error: null },
12	    { status },
13	  );
14	}
15	
16	export function errorResponse(message: string, status = 500) {
17	  return NextResponse.json<ApiResponse<null>>(
18	    { success: false, data: null, error: message },
19	    { status },
20	  );
21	}
22
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	generator client {
2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"
3	}
4	
5	datasource db {
6	  provider = "mysql"
7	  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
8	}
9	
10	enum StatusSlot {
11	  TERSEDIA
12	  DITEMPAH
13	  DIBATALKAN
14	}
15	
16	model User {
17	  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
18	  email        String   @unique
19	  passwordHash String
20	  nama         String
21	  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
22	
23	  @@map("users")
24	}
25	
26	model Pelanggan {
27	  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
28	  nama      String
29	  noTelefon String   @unique
30	  nota      String?  @db.Text
31	  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
32	
33	  temujanji Temujanji[]
34	  tempahan  Tempahan[]
35	
36	  @@map("pelanggan")
37	}
38	
39	model SlotTemujanji {
40	  id        String     @id @default(cuid())
41	  tarikh    DateTime   @db.Date
42	  masaMula  String
43	  masaTamat String
44	  status    StatusSlot @default(TERSEDIA)
45	  createdAt DateTime   @default(now())
46	
47	  temujanji Temujanji?
48	
49	  @@map("slot_temujanji")
50	}
51	
52	model Temujanji {
53	  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
54	  pelangganId     String
55	  slotTemujanjiId String   @unique
56	  nota            String?  @db.Text
57	  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
58	
59	  pelanggan     Pelanggan     @relation(fields: [pelangganId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
60	  slotTemujanji SlotTemujanji @relation(fields: [slotTemujanjiId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
61	
62	  @@map("temujanji")
63	}
64	
65	model SlotTempahan {
66	  id        String     @id @default(cuid())
67	  tarikh    DateTime   @db.Date
68	  status    StatusSlot @default(TERSEDIA)
69	  createdAt DateTime   @default(now())
70	
71	  tempahan Tempahan?
72	
73	  @@map("slot_tempahan")
74	}
75	
76	model Tempahan {
77	  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
78	  namaTempahan   String
79	  slotTempahanId String   @unique
80	  pakejId        String
```

```text
1	import { z } from 'zod';
2	
3	export class ValidationError extends Error {
4	  constructor(message: string) {
5	    super(message);
6	    this.name = 'ValidationError';
7	  }
8	}
9	
10	export function validateBody<T>(schema: z.ZodSchema<T>, body: unknown): T {
11	  const result = schema.safeParse(body);
12	  if (!result.success) {
13	    const firstIssue = result.error.issues[0];
14	    throw new ValidationError(firstIssue?.message ?? 'Data tidak sah');
15	  }
16	  return result.data;
17	}
18
```

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { errorResponse } from './response';
3	import { ValidationError } from './validate';
4	import { Prisma } from '@prisma/client';
5	
6	// Map Prisma error codes to Bahasa Malaysia messages
7	const prismaErrorMessages: Readonly<
8	  Record<string, { readonly message: string; readonly status: number }>
9	> = {
10	  P2002: { message: 'Rekod sudah wujud', status: 409 },
11	  P2025: { message: 'Rekod tidak dijumpai', status: 404 },
12	};
13	
14	type RouteHandler = (req: NextRequest, context?: unknown) => Promise<Response>;
15	
16	export function withErrorHandling(handler: RouteHandler): RouteHandler {
17	  return async (req, context) => {
18	    try {
19	      return await handler(req, context);
20	    } catch (error) {
21	      console.error('[API Error]', error);
22	
23	      if (error instanceof Prisma.PrismaClientKnownRequestError) {
24	        const mapped = prismaErrorMessages[error.code];
25	        if (mapped) {
26	          return errorResponse(mapped.message, mapped.status);
27	        }
28	      }
29	
30	      if (error instanceof ValidationError) {
31	        return errorResponse(error.message, 400);
32	      }
33	
34	      return errorResponse('Ralat dalaman pelayan', 500);
35	    }
36	  };
37	}
38
```

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
  createRateLimiter,
} from '@/lib/api';
import {
  createSlotSchema,
  bulkCreateSlotSchema,
} from '@/lib/validations/slot-temujanji';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
  interval: 60_000,
  maxRequests: 60,
});

export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
  const page = Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('page') ?? '1'));
  const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20')));
  const tarikh = searchParams.get('tarikh');
  const status = searchParams.get('status');

  const where: Record<string, unknown> = {};

  if (tarikh) {
    const date = new Date(tarikh);
    if (!isNaN(date.getTime())) {
      where.tarikh = date;
    }
  }

  if (status && ['TERSEDIA', 'DITEMPAH', 'DIBATALKAN'].includes(status)) {
    where.status = status;
  }

  const [slots, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
      where,
      orderBy: [{ tarikh: 'desc' }, { masaMula: 'asc' }],
      skip: (page - 1) * limit,
      take: limit,
    }),
    prisma.slotTemujanji.count({ where }),
  ]);

  return successResponse({ data: slots, meta: { total, page, limit } });
});

export const POST = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const body = await req.json();

  // Determine if bulk or single create
  const isBulk = Array.isArray(body.slots);

  if (isBulk) {
    const validated = validateBody(bulkCreateSlotSchema, body);
    const tarikh = new Date(validated.tarikh);

    // Check for overlapping slots
    const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
      where: { tarikh, status: { not: 'DIBATALKAN' } },
      select: { masaMula: true, masaTamat: true },
    });

    for (const slot of validated.slots) {
      const hasOverlap = existing.some(
        (e) => slot.masaMula < e.masaTamat && slot.masaTamat > e.masaMula,
      );
      if (hasOverlap) {
        return errorResponse(
          `Slot ${slot.masaMula} - ${slot.masaTamat} bertindih dengan slot sedia ada`,
          409,
        );
      }
    }

    // Check for overlaps within the submitted batch
    for (let i = 0; i < validated.slots.length; i++) {
      for (let j = i + 1; j < validated.slots.length; j++) {
        const a = validated.slots[i];
        const b = validated.slots[j];
        if (a.masaMula < b.masaTamat && a.masaTamat > b.masaMula) {
          return errorResponse(
            `Slot ${a.masaMula} - ${a.masaTamat} bertindih dengan ${b.masaMula} - ${b.masaTamat}`,
            409,
          );
        }
      }
    }

    const created = await prisma.slotTemujanji.createMany({
      data: validated.slots.map((s) => ({
        tarikh,
        masaMula: s.masaMula,
        masaTamat: s.masaTamat,
        status: 'TERSEDIA' as const,
      })),
    });

    return successResponse({ count: created.count }, 201);
  }

  // Single create
  const validated = validateBody(createSlotSchema, body);
  const tarikh = new Date(validated.tarikh);

  // Check for overlapping slots
  const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
    where: { tarikh, status: { not: 'DIBATALKAN' } },
    select: { masaMula: true, masaTamat: true },
  });

  const hasOverlap = existing.some(
    (e) => validated.masaMula < e.masaTamat && validated.masaTamat > e.masaMula,
  );
  if (hasOverlap) {
    return errorResponse('Slot bertindih dengan slot sedia ada', 409);
  }

  const slot = await prisma.slotTemujanji.create({
    data: {
      tarikh,
      masaMula: validated.masaMula,
      masaTamat: validated.masaTamat,
      status: 'TERSEDIA',
    },
  });

  return successResponse(slot, 201);
});

```


<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/api/temujanji/route.ts`

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	
4	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
5	import {
6	  successResponse,
7	  errorResponse,
8	  withErrorHandling,
9	  validateBody,
10	  createRateLimiter,
11	} from '@/lib/api';
12	import { temujanjiSchema } from '@/lib/validations/temujanji';
13	
14	const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
15	  interval: 60_000,
16	  maxRequests: 5,
17	});
18	
19	type TransactionError = {
20	  readonly ok: false;
21	  readonly error: string;
22	  readonly status: number;
23	};
24	
25	type TransactionSuccess = {
26	  readonly ok: true;
27	  readonly temujanji: { readonly id: string };
28	  readonly pelanggan: { readonly id: string };
29	};
30	
31	type TransactionResult = TransactionError | TransactionSuccess;
32	
33	export const POST = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
34	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
35	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
36	
37	  const body: unknown = await req.json();
38	  const data = validateBody(temujanjiSchema, body);
39	
40	  const noTelefonNormalized = data.noTelefon.replace(/-/g, '');
41	
42	  const result: TransactionResult = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
43	    const slot = await tx.slotTemujanji.findUnique({
44	      where: { id: data.slotTemujanjiId },
45	    });
46	
47	    if (!slot) {
48	      return { ok: false, error: 'Slot temujanji tidak dijumpai', status: 404 };
49	    }
50	
51	    if (slot.status === 'DITEMPAH') {
52	      return { ok: false, error: 'Slot ini telah ditempah', status: 409 };
53	    }
54	
55	    const pelanggan = await tx.pelanggan.upsert({
56	      where: { noTelefon: noTelefonNormalized },
57	      update: { nama: data.nama },
58	      create: {
59	        nama: data.nama,
60	        noTelefon: noTelefonNormalized,
61	      },
62	    });
63	
64	    const temujanji = await tx.temujanji.create({
65	      data: {
66	        pelangganId: pelanggan.id,
67	        slotTemujanjiId: data.slotTemujanjiId,
68	        nota: data.nota ?? null,
69	      },
70	    });
71	
72	    await tx.slotTemujanji.update({
73	      where: { id: data.slotTemujanjiId },
74	      data: { status: 'DITEMPAH' },
75	    });
76	
77	    return { ok: true, temujanji, pelanggan };
78	  });
79	
80	  if (!result.ok) {
81	    return errorResponse(result.error, result.status);
82	  }
83	
84	  return successResponse(
85	    { temujanji: result.temujanji, pelanggan: result.pelanggan },
86	    201,
87	  );
88	});
89
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { z } from 'zod';
2	
3	export class ValidationError extends Error {
4	  constructor(message: string) {
5	    super(message);
6	    this.name = 'ValidationError';
7	  }
8	}
9	
10	export function validateBody<T>(schema: z.ZodSchema<T>, body: unknown): T {
11	  const result = schema.safeParse(body);
12	  if (!result.success) {
13	    const firstIssue = result.error.issues[0];
14	    throw new ValidationError(firstIssue?.message ?? 'Data tidak sah');
15	  }
16	  return result.data;
17	}
18
```
</details></tool-use>
