<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/api/admin/slot-temujanji/route.ts`

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	import {
4	  successResponse,
5	  errorResponse,
6	  withErrorHandling,
7	  validateBody,
8	  createRateLimiter,
9	} from '@/lib/api';
10	import {
11	  createSlotSchema,
12	  bulkCreateSlotSchema,
13	} from '@/lib/validations/slot-temujanji';
14	
15	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
16	
17	const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
18	  interval: 60_000,
19	  maxRequests: 60,
20	});
21	
22	export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
23	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
24	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
25	
26	  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
27	  const page = Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('page') ?? '1'));
28	  const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20')));
29	  const tarikh = searchParams.get('tarikh');
30	  const status = searchParams.get('status');
31	
32	  const where: Record<string, unknown> = {};
33	
34	  if (tarikh) {
35	    const date = new Date(tarikh);
36	    if (!isNaN(date.getTime())) {
37	      where.tarikh = date;
38	    }
39	  }
40	
41	  if (status && ['TERSEDIA', 'DITEMPAH', 'DIBATALKAN'].includes(status)) {
42	    where.status = status;
43	  }
44	
45	  const [slots, total] = await Promise.all([
46	    prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
47	      where,
48	      orderBy: [{ tarikh: 'desc' }, { masaMula: 'asc' }],
49	      skip: (page - 1) * limit,
50	      take: limit,
51	    }),
52	    prisma.slotTemujanji.count({ where }),
53	  ]);
54	
55	  return successResponse({ data: slots, meta: { total, page, limit } });
56	});
57	
58	export const POST = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
59	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
60	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
61	
62	  const body = await req.json();
63	
64	  // Determine if bulk or single create
65	  const isBulk = Array.isArray(body.slots);
66	
67	  if (isBulk) {
68	    const validated = validateBody(bulkCreateSlotSchema, body);
69	    const tarikh = new Date(validated.tarikh);
70	
71	    // Check for overlapping slots
72	    const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
73	      where: { tarikh, status: { not: 'DIBATALKAN' } },
74	      select: { masaMula: true, masaTamat: true },
75	    });
76	
77	    for (const slot of validated.slots) {
78	      const hasOverlap = existing.some(
79	        (e) => slot.masaMula < e.masaTamat && slot.masaTamat > e.masaMula,
80	      );
81	      if (hasOverlap) {
82	        return errorResponse(
83	          `Slot ${slot.masaMula} - ${slot.masaTamat} bertindih dengan slot sedia ada`,
84	          409,
85	        );
86	      }
87	    }
88	
89	    // Check for overlaps within the submitted batch
90	    for (let i = 0; i < validated.slots.length; i++) {
91	      for (let j = i + 1; j < validated.slots.length; j++) {
92	        const a = validated.slots[i];
93	        const b = validated.slots[j];
94	        if (a.masaMula < b.masaTamat && a.masaTamat > b.masaMula) {
95	          return errorResponse(
96	            `Slot ${a.masaMula} - ${a.masaTamat} bertindih dengan ${b.masaMula} - ${b.masaTamat}`,
97	            409,
98	          );
99	        }
100	      }
101	    }
102	
103	    const created = await prisma.slotTemujanji.createMany({
104	      data: validated.slots.map((s) => ({
105	        tarikh,
106	        masaMula: s.masaMula,
107	        masaTamat: s.masaTamat,
108	        status: 'TERSEDIA' as const,
109	      })),
110	    });
111	
112	    return successResponse({ count: created.count }, 201);
113	  }
114	
115	  // Single create
116	  const validated = validateBody(createSlotSchema, body);
117	  const tarikh = new Date(validated.tarikh);
118	
119	  // Check for overlapping slots
120	  const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
121	    where: { tarikh, status: { not: 'DIBATALKAN' } },
122	    select: { masaMula: true, masaTamat: true },
123	  });
124	
125	  const hasOverlap = existing.some(
126	    (e) => validated.masaMula < e.masaTamat && validated.masaTamat > e.masaMula,
127	  );
128	  if (hasOverlap) {
129	    return errorResponse('Slot bertindih dengan slot sedia ada', 409);
130	  }
131	
132	  const slot = await prisma.slotTemujanji.create({
133	    data: {
134	      tarikh,
135	      masaMula: validated.masaMula,
136	      masaTamat: validated.masaTamat,
137	      status: 'TERSEDIA',
138	    },
139	  });
140	
141	  return successResponse(slot, 201);
142	});
143
```
</details></tool-use>

1	import { auth } from "@/lib/auth";
2	import { AdminShell } from "@/components/admin/admin-shell";
3	
4	export const metadata = {
5	  title: "Admin - MawarBiru",
6	};
7	
8	export default async function AdminLayout({
9	  children,
10	}: {
11	  children: React.ReactNode;
12	}) {
13	  const session = await auth();
14	
15	  // When there is no session (e.g. login page), render children without
16	  // the admin shell. The middleware already handles redirects for protected
17	  // routes, so this is only reached for public admin routes like /admin/login.
18	  if (!session?.user) {
19	    return <>{children}</>;
20	  }
21	
22	  return (
23	    <AdminShell nama={session.user.nama} email={session.user.email}>
24	      {children}
25	    </AdminShell>
26	  );
27	}
28
```

1	import Link from "next/link";
2	import { prisma } from "@/lib/db";
3	import { Card, CardHeader, CardBody } from "@/components/ui/card";
4	import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
5	
6	function getTodayRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
7	  const now = new Date();
8	  const start = new Date(
9	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate()),
10	  );
11	  const end = new Date(
12	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate() + 1),
13	  );
14	  return { start, end };
15	}
16	
17	function getCurrentMonthRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
18	  const now = new Date();
19	  const start = new Date(
20	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), 1),
21	  );
22	  const end = new Date(
23	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth() + 1, 1),
24	  );
25	  return { start, end };
26	}
27	
28	function formatTarikh(date: Date): string {
29	  return date.toLocaleDateString("ms-MY", {
30	    day: "numeric",
31	    month: "short",
32	    year: "numeric",
33	  });
34	}
35	
36	function statusBadgeVariant(
37	  status: string,
38	): "default" | "success" | "warning" | "error" {
39	  switch (status) {
40	    case "TERSEDIA":
41	      return "success";
42	    case "DITEMPAH":
43	      return "default";
44	    case "DIBATALKAN":
45	      return "error";
46	    default:
47	      return "default";
48	  }
49	}
50	
51	export default async function DashboardPage() {
52	  const { start: todayStart, end: todayEnd } = getTodayRange();
53	  const { start: monthStart, end: monthEnd } = getCurrentMonthRange();
54	
55	  const [
56	    temujanjiHariIni,
57	    tempahanBulanIni,
58	    jumlahPelanggan,
59	    jumlahPakej,
60	    recentTemujanji,
61	    recentTempahan,
62	  ] = await Promise.all([
63	    prisma.temujanji.count({
64	      where: {
65	        slotTemujanji: {
66	          tarikh: { gte: todayStart, lt: todayEnd },
67	        },
68	      },
69	    }),
70	    prisma.tempahan.count({
71	      where: {
72	        slotTempahan: {
73	          tarikh: { gte: monthStart, lt: monthEnd },
74	        },
75	      },
76	    }),
77	    prisma.pelanggan.count(),
78	    prisma.pakej.count(),
79	    prisma.temujanji.findMany({
80	      take: 5,
81	      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
82	      include: {
83	        pelanggan: { select: { nama: true } },
84	        slotTemujanji: { select: { tarikh: true, status: true } },
85	      },
86	    }),
87	    prisma.tempahan.findMany({
88	      take: 5,
89	      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
90	      include: {
91	        slotTempahan: { select: { tarikh: true } },
92	        pakej: { select: { namaPakej: true } },
93	      },
94	    }),
95	  ]);
96	
97	  const cards = [
98	    {
99	      title: "Temujanji Hari Ini",
100	      count: temujanjiHariIni,
101	      href: "/admin/temujanji",
102	    },
103	    {
104	      title: "Tempahan Bulan Ini",
105	      count: tempahanBulanIni,
106	      href: "/admin/tempahan",
107	    },
108	    {
109	      title: "Jumlah Pelanggan",
110	      count: jumlahPelanggan,
111	      href: "/admin/pelanggan",
112	    },
113	    {
114	      title: "Jumlah Pakej",
115	      count: jumlahPakej,
116	      href: "/admin/pakej",
117	    },
118	  ];
119	
120	  return (
121	    <div className="space-y-8">
122	      <h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-navy">Dashboard</h1>
123	
124	      {/* Count Cards */}
125	      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
126	        {cards.map((card) => (
127	          <Link key={card.href} href={card.href}>
128	            <Card className="bg-white hover:shadow-elevated">
129	              <CardBody>
130	                <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">{card.title}</p>
131	                <p className="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-navy">
132	                  {card.count}
133	                </p>
134	              </CardBody>
135	            </Card>
136	          </Link>
137	        ))}
138	      </div>
139	
140	      {/* Recent Activity */}
141	      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 lg:grid-cols-2">
142	        {/* Recent Temujanji */}
143	        <Card className="bg-white">
144	          <CardHeader>
145	            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
146	              Temujanji Terkini
147	            </h2>
148	          </CardHeader>
149	          <CardBody>
150	            {recentTemujanji.length === 0 ? (
151	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada temujanji.</p>
152	            ) : (
153	              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
154	                {recentTemujanji.map((t) => (
155	                  <li
156	                    key={t.id}
157	                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
158	                  >
159	                    <div>
160	                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
161	                        {t.pelanggan.nama}
162	                      </p>
163	                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
164	                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTemujanji.tarikh)}
165	                      </p>
166	                    </div>
167	                    <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(t.slotTemujanji.status)}>
168	                      {t.slotTemujanji.status}
169	                    </Badge>
170	                  </li>
171	                ))}
172	              </ul>
173	            )}
174	          </CardBody>
175	        </Card>
176	
177	        {/* Recent Tempahan */}
178	        <Card className="bg-white">
179	          <CardHeader>
180	            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
181	              Tempahan Terkini
182	            </h2>
183	          </CardHeader>
184	          <CardBody>
185	            {recentTempahan.length === 0 ? (
186	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada tempahan.</p>
187	            ) : (
188	              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
189	                {recentTempahan.map((t) => (
190	                  <li
191	                    key={t.id}
192	                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
193	                  >
194	                    <div>
195	                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
196	                        {t.namaTempahan}
197	                      </p>
198	                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
199	                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTempahan.tarikh)} &middot;{" "}
200	                        {t.pakej.namaPakej}
201	                      </p>
202	                    </div>
203	                  </li>
204	                ))}
205	              </ul>
206	            )}
207	          </CardBody>
208	        </Card>
209	      </div>
210	    </div>
211	  );
212	}
213

155	
156	interface SidebarProps {
157	  readonly isOpen: boolean;
158	  readonly onClose: () => void;
159	}
160	
161	function isActiveRoute(pathname: string, href: string): boolean {
162	  if (href === "/admin") {
163	    return pathname === "/admin";
164	  }
165	  return pathname.startsWith(href);
166	}
167	
168	export function Sidebar({ isOpen, onClose }: SidebarProps) {
169	  const pathname = usePathname();
170	
171	  return (
172	    <>
173	      {/* Mobile overlay */}
174	      {isOpen && (
175	        <div
176	          className="fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-black/50 lg:hidden"
177	          onClick={onClose}
178	          aria-hidden="true"
179	        />
180	      )}
181	
182	      {/* Sidebar */}
183	      <aside
184	        className={cn(
185	          "fixed top-0 left-0 z-50 flex h-full w-64 flex-col bg-navy text-cream transition-transform duration-200 lg:static lg:z-auto lg:translate-x-0",
186	          "md:w-64 lg:w-64",
187	          isOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "-translate-x-full",
188	        )}
189	      >
190	        {/* Logo / Brand */}
191	        <div className="flex h-16 shrink-0 items-center gap-3 border-b border-cream/10 px-4">
192	          <span className="text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-cream">
193	            MawarBiru
194	          </span>
195	          <button
196	            type="button"
197	            className="ml-auto text-cream/60 hover:text-cream lg:hidden"
198	            onClick={onClose}
199	            aria-label="Tutup menu"
200	          >
201	            <svg
202	              className="h-5 w-5"
203	              fill="none"
204	              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
205	              strokeWidth={1.5}
206	              stroke="currentColor"
207	              aria-hidden="true"
208	            >
209	              <path
210	                strokeLinecap="round"
211	                strokeLinejoin="round"
212	                d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"
213	              />
214	            </svg>
215	          </button>
216	        </div>
217	
218	        {/* Navigation */}
219	        <nav className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-3 py-4" aria-label="Admin">
220	          <ul className="flex flex-col gap-1">
221	            {NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => {
222	              const active = isActiveRoute(pathname, item.href);
223	              return (
224	                <li key={item.href}>
225	                  <a
226	                    href={item.href}
227	                    className={cn(
228	                      "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors",
229	                      active
230	                        ? "bg-cream/15 text-cream"
231	                        : "text-cream/70 hover:bg-cream/10 hover:text-cream",
232	                    )}
233	                    aria-current={active ? "page" : undefined}
234	                  >
235	                    {item.icon}
236	                    <span>{item.label}</span>
237	                  </a>
238	                </li>
239	              );
240	            })}
241	          </ul>
242	        </nav>
243	
244	        {/* Logout */}
245	        <div className="border-t border-cream/10 px-3 py-4">
246	          <form action={logoutAction}>
247	            <button
248	              type="submit"
249	              className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-cream/70 transition-colors hover:bg-cream/10 hover:text-cream"
250	            >
251	              <svg
252	                className="h-5 w-5"
253	                fill="none"

 `./app/api/temujanji/route.ts`

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	
4	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
5	import {
6	  successResponse,
7	  errorResponse,
8	  withErrorHandling,
9	  validateBody,
10	  createRateLimiter,
11	} from '@/lib/api';
12	import { temujanjiSchema } from '@/lib/validations/temujanji';
13	
14	const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
15	  interval: 60_000,
16	  maxRequests: 5,
17	});
18	
19	type TransactionError = {
20	  readonly ok: false;
21	  readonly error: string;
22	  readonly status: number;
23	};
24	
25	type TransactionSuccess = {
26	  readonly ok: true;
27	  readonly temujanji: { readonly id: string };
28	  readonly pelanggan: { readonly id: string };
29	};
30	
31	type TransactionResult = TransactionError | TransactionSuccess;
32	
33	export const POST = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
34	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
35	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
36	
37	  const body: unknown = await req.json();
38	  const data = validateBody(temujanjiSchema, body);
39	
40	  const noTelefonNormalized = data.noTelefon.replace(/-/g, '');
41	
42	  const result: TransactionResult = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
43	    const slot = await tx.slotTemujanji.findUnique({
44	      where: { id: data.slotTemujanjiId },
45	    });
46	
47	    if (!slot) {
48	      return { ok: false, error: 'Slot temujanji tidak dijumpai', status: 404 };
49	    }
50	
51	    if (slot.status === 'DITEMPAH') {
52	      return { ok: false, error: 'Slot ini telah ditempah', status: 409 };
53	    }
54	
55	    const pelanggan = await tx.pelanggan.upsert({
56	      where: { noTelefon: noTelefonNormalized },
57	      update: { nama: data.nama },
58	      create: {
59	        nama: data.nama,
60	        noTelefon: noTelefonNormalized,
61	      },
62	    });
63	
64	    const temujanji = await tx.temujanji.create({
65	      data: {
66	        pelangganId: pelanggan.id,
67	        slotTemujanjiId: data.slotTemujanjiId,
68	        nota: data.nota ?? null,
69	      },
70	    });
71	
72	    await tx.slotTemujanji.update({
73	      where: { id: data.slotTemujanjiId },
74	      data: { status: 'DITEMPAH' },
75	    });
76	
77	    return { ok: true, temujanji, pelanggan };
78	  });
79	
80	  if (!result.ok) {
81	    return errorResponse(result.error, result.status);
82	  }
83	
84	  return successResponse(
85	    { temujanji: result.temujanji, pelanggan: result.pelanggan },
86	    201,
87	  );
88	});
89
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	---
2	title: route.js
3	description: API reference for the route.js special file.
4	---
5	
6	Route Handlers allow you to create custom request handlers for a given route using the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) and [Response](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Response) APIs.
7	
8	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
9	export async function GET() {
10	  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })
11	}
12	```
13	
14	```js filename="route.js" switcher
15	export async function GET() {
16	  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })
17	}
18	```
19	
20	## Reference
21	
22	### HTTP Methods
23	
24	A **route** file allows you to create custom request handlers for a given route. The following [HTTP methods](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods) are supported: `GET`, `POST`, `PUT`, `PATCH`, `DELETE`, `HEAD`, and `OPTIONS`.
25	
26	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
27	export async function GET(request: Request) {}
28	
29	export async function HEAD(request: Request) {}
30	
31	export async function POST(request: Request) {}
32	
33	export async function PUT(request: Request) {}
34	
35	export async function DELETE(request: Request) {}
36	
37	export async function PATCH(request: Request) {}
38	
39	// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.
40	export async function OPTIONS(request: Request) {}
41	```
42	
43	```js filename="route.js" switcher
44	export async function GET(request) {}
45	
46	export async function HEAD(request) {}
47	
48	export async function POST(request) {}
49	
50	export async function PUT(request) {}
51	
52	export async function DELETE(request) {}
53	
54	export async function PATCH(request) {}
55	
56	// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.
57	export async function OPTIONS(request) {}
58	```
59	
60	### Parameters
61	
62	#### `request` (optional)
63	
64	The `request` object is a [NextRequest](/docs/app/api-reference/functions/next-request) object, which is an extension of the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) API. `NextRequest` gives you further control over the incoming request, including easily accessing `cookies` and an extended, parsed, URL object `nextUrl`.
65	
66	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
67	import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
68	
69	export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
70	  const url = request.nextUrl
71	}
72	```
73	
74	```js filename="route.js" switcher
75	export async function GET(request) {
76	  const url = request.nextUrl
77	}
78	```
79	
80	#### `context` (optional)
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
  createRateLimiter,
} from '@/lib/api';
import { updateSlotSchema } from '@/lib/validations/slot-temujanji';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
  interval: 60_000,
  maxRequests: 60,
});

export const PUT = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context: unknown) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { id } = (context as { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }).params
    ? await (context as { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }).params
    : { id: '' };

  if (!id) {
    return errorResponse('ID diperlukan', 400);
  }

  const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) {
    return errorResponse('Slot tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  if (existing.status !== 'TERSEDIA') {
    return errorResponse(
      'Hanya slot dengan status TERSEDIA boleh dikemaskini',
      400,
    );
  }

  const body = await req.json();
  const validated = validateBody(updateSlotSchema, body);

  const tarikh = validated.tarikh ? new Date(validated.tarikh) : existing.tarikh;
  const masaMula = validated.masaMula ?? existing.masaMula;
  const masaTamat = validated.masaTamat ?? existing.masaTamat;

  // Validate masaTamat > masaMula after merging
  if (masaTamat <= masaMula) {
    return errorResponse('Masa tamat mestilah selepas masa mula', 400);
  }

  // Check for overlapping slots (excluding this one)
  const others = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
    where: {
      tarikh,
      status: { not: 'DIBATALKAN' },
      id: { not: id },
    },
    select: { masaMula: true, masaTamat: true },
  });

  const hasOverlap = others.some(
    (e) => masaMula < e.masaTamat && masaTamat > e.masaMula,
  );
  if (hasOverlap) {
    return errorResponse('Slot bertindih dengan slot sedia ada', 409);
  }

  const updated = await prisma.slotTemujanji.update({
    where: { id },
    data: { tarikh, masaMula, masaTamat },
  });

  return successResponse(updated);
});

export const DELETE = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context: unknown) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { id } = (context as { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }).params
    ? await (context as { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }).params
    : { id: '' };

  if (!id) {
    return errorResponse('ID diperlukan', 400);
  }

  const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) {
    return errorResponse('Slot tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  if (existing.status === 'DITEMPAH') {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
    const force = searchParams.get('force');
    if (force !== 'true') {
      return errorResponse(
        'Slot ini telah ditempah. Gunakan force=true untuk memadamkan.',
        400,
      );
    }
  }

  await prisma.slotTemujanji.delete({ where: { id } });

  return successResponse({ deleted: true });
});

```

```

1	import { z } from 'zod';
2	
3	const timeRegex = /^([01]\d|2[0-3]):[0-5]\d$/;
4	
5	const timeString = z
6	  .string({ error: 'Masa diperlukan' })
7	  .regex(timeRegex, 'Format masa tidak sah (cth: 09:00)');
8	
9	export const createSlotSchema = z
10	  .object({
11	    tarikh: z
12	      .string({ error: 'Tarikh diperlukan' })
13	      .date('Format tarikh tidak sah (cth: 2026-01-15)'),
14	    masaMula: timeString,
15	    masaTamat: timeString,
16	  })
17	  .refine((data) => data.masaTamat > data.masaMula, {
18	    message: 'Masa tamat mestilah selepas masa mula',
19	    path: ['masaTamat'],
20	  });
21	
22	export type CreateSlotInput = z.infer<typeof createSlotSchema>;
23	
24	const slotEntry = z.object({
25	  masaMula: timeString,
26	  masaTamat: timeString,
27	});
28	
29	export const bulkCreateSlotSchema = z
30	  .object({
31	    tarikh: z
32	      .string({ error: 'Tarikh diperlukan' })
33	      .date('Format tarikh tidak sah (cth: 2026-01-15)'),
34	    slots: z
35	      .array(slotEntry, { error: 'Senarai slot diperlukan' })
36	      .min(1, 'Sekurang-kurangnya satu slot diperlukan'),
37	  })
38	  .refine(
39	    (data) => data.slots.every((s) => s.masaTamat > s.masaMula),
40	    {
41	      message: 'Masa tamat mestilah selepas masa mula untuk semua slot',
42	      path: ['slots'],
43	    },
44	  );
45	
46	export type BulkCreateSlotInput = z.infer<typeof bulkCreateSlotSchema>;
47	
48	export const updateSlotSchema = z
49	  .object({
50	    tarikh: z
51	      .string()
52	      .date('Format tarikh tidak sah (cth: 2026-01-15)')
53	      .optional(),
54	    masaMula: timeString.optional(),
55	    masaTamat: timeString.optional(),
56	  })
57	  .refine(
58	    (data) => {
59	      if (data.masaMula && data.masaTamat) {
60	        return data.masaTamat > data.masaMula;
61	      }
62	      return true;
63	    },
64	    {
65	      message: 'Masa tamat mestilah selepas masa mula',
66	      path: ['masaTamat'],
67	    },
68	  );
69	
70	export type UpdateSlotInput = z.infer<typeof updateSlotSchema>;
71

7	  const now = new Date();
8	  const start = new Date(
9	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate()),
10	  );

26	}
27	
28	function formatTarikh(date: Date): string {
29	  return date.toLocaleDateString("ms-MY", {
30	    day: "numeric",
31	    month: "short",
32	    year: "numeric",
33	  });
34	}
35	
36	function statusBadgeVariant(
37	  status: string,
38	): "default" | "success" | "warning" | "error" {
39	  switch (status) {
40	    case "TERSEDIA":
41	      return "success";
42	    case "DITEMPAH":
43	      return "default";
44	    case "DIBATALKAN":
45	      return "error";
46	    default:
47	      return "default";
48	  }
49	}
50	
51	export default async function DashboardPage() {
52	  const { start: todayStart, end: todayEnd } = getTodayRange();
53	  const { start: monthStart, end: monthEnd } = getCurrentMonthRange();
54	
55	  const [
56	    temujanjiHariIni,
57	    tempahanBulanIni,
58	    jumlahPelanggan,
59	    jumlahPakej,
60	    recentTemujanji,
61	    recentTempahan,
62	  ] = await Promise.all([
63	    prisma.temujanji.count({
64	      where: {
65	        slotTemujanji: {
66	          tarikh: { gte: todayStart, lt: todayEnd },
67	        },
68	      },
69	    }),
70	    prisma.tempahan.count({
71	      where: {
72	        slotTempahan: {
73	          tarikh: { gte: monthStart, lt: monthEnd },
74	        },
75	      },
76	    }),
77	    prisma.pelanggan.count(),
78	    prisma.pakej.count(),
79	    prisma.temujanji.findMany({
80	      take: 5,
81	      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
82	      include: {
83	        pelanggan: { select: { nama: true } },
84	        slotTemujanji: { select: { tarikh: true, status: true } },
85	      },
86	    }),
87	    prisma.tempahan.findMany({
88	      take: 5,
89	      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
90	      include: {
91	        slotTempahan: { select: { tarikh: true } },
92	        pakej: { select: { namaPakej: true } },
93	      },
94	    }),
95	  ]);
96	
97	  const cards = [
98	    {
99	      title: "Temujanji Hari Ini",
100	      count: temujanjiHariIni,
101	      href: "/admin/temujanji",
102	    },
103	    {
104	      title: "Tempahan Bulan Ini",
105	      count: tempahanBulanIni,
106	      href: "/admin/tempahan",
107	    },
108	    {
109	      title: "Jumlah Pelanggan",
110	      count: jumlahPelanggan,
111	      href: "/admin/pelanggan",
112	    },
113	    {
114	      title: "Jumlah Pakej",
115	      count: jumlahPakej,
116	      href: "/admin/pakej",
117	    },
118	  ];
119	
120	  return (
121	    <div className="space-y-8">
122	      <h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-navy">Dashboard</h1>
123	
124	      {/* Count Cards */}
125	      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
126	        {cards.map((card) => (
127	          <Link key={card.href} href={card.href}>
128	            <Card className="bg-white hover:shadow-elevated">
129	              <CardBody>
130	                <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">{card.title}</p>
131	                <p className="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-navy">
132	                  {card.count}
133	                </p>
134	              </CardBody>
135	            </Card>
136	          </Link>
137	        ))}
138	      </div>
139	
140	      {/* Recent Activity */}
141	      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 lg:grid-cols-2">
142	        {/* Recent Temujanji */}
143	        <Card className="bg-white">
144	          <CardHeader>
145	            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
146	              Temujanji Terkini
147	            </h2>
148	          </CardHeader>
149	          <CardBody>
150	            {recentTemujanji.length === 0 ? (
151	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada temujanji.</p>
152	            ) : (
153	              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
154	                {recentTemujanji.map((t) => (
155	                  <li
156	                    key={t.id}
157	                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
158	                  >
159	                    <div>
160	                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
161	                        {t.pelanggan.nama}
162	                      </p>
163	                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
164	                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTemujanji.tarikh)}
165	                      </p>
166	                    </div>
167	                    <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(t.slotTemujanji.status)}>
168	                      {t.slotTemujanji.status}
169	                    </Badge>
170	                  </li>
171	                ))}
172	              </ul>
173	            )}
174	          </CardBody>
175	        </Card>
176	
177	        {/* Recent Tempahan */}
178	        <Card className="bg-white">
179	          <CardHeader>
180	            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
181	              Tempahan Terkini
182	            </h2>
183	          </CardHeader>
184	          <CardBody>
185	            {recentTempahan.length === 0 ? (
186	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada tempahan.</p>
187	            ) : (
188	              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
189	                {recentTempahan.map((t) => (
190	                  <li
191	                    key={t.id}
192	                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
193	                  >
194	                    <div>
195	                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
196	                        {t.namaTempahan}
197	                      </p>
198	                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
199	                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTempahan.tarikh)} &middot;{" "}
200	                        {t.pakej.namaPakej}
201	                      </p>
202	                    </div>
203	                  </li>
204	                ))}
205	              </ul>
206	            )}
207	          </CardBody>
208	        </Card>
209	      </div>
210	    </div>
211	  );
212	}
213
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./components/ui/modal.tsx`

```text
1	'use client';
2	
3	import {
4	  useEffect,
5	  useRef,
6	  useCallback,
7	  useId,
8	  type ReactNode,
9	  type KeyboardEvent,
10	} from 'react';
11	import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';
12	import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
13	
14	const sizeClasses = {
15	  sm: 'max-w-sm',
16	  md: 'max-w-lg',
17	  lg: 'max-w-2xl',
18	} as const;
19	
20	interface ModalProps {
21	  isOpen: boolean;
22	  onClose: () => void;
23	  title: string;
24	  children: ReactNode;
25	  size?: keyof typeof sizeClasses;
26	  'data-testid'?: string;
27	}
28	
29	function Modal({
30	  isOpen,
31	  onClose,
32	  title,
33	  children,
34	  size = 'md',
35	  ...props
36	}: ModalProps) {
37	  const titleId = useId();
38	  const dialogRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
39	  const previousFocusRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null);
40	
41	  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
42	    (e: KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
43	      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
44	        onClose();
45	        return;
46	      }
47	
48	      if (e.key === 'Tab') {
49	        const dialog = dialogRef.current;
50	        if (!dialog) return;
51	
52	        const focusable = dialog.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>(
53	          'a[href], button:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])',
54	        );
55	
56	        if (focusable.length === 0) {
57	          e.preventDefault();
58	          return;
59	        }
60	
61	        const first = focusable[0];
62	        const last = focusable[focusable.length - 1];
63	
64	        if (e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === first) {
65	          e.preventDefault();
66	          last.focus();
67	        } else if (!e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === last) {
68	          e.preventDefault();
69	          first.focus();
70	        }
71	      }
72	    },
73	    [onClose],
74	  );
75	
76	  useEffect(() => {
77	    if (isOpen) {
78	      previousFocusRef.current = document.activeElement as HTMLElement;
79	      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
80	
81	      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
82	        dialogRef.current?.focus();
83	      });
84	    }
85	
86	    return () => {
87	      document.body.style.overflow = '';
88	    };
89	  }, [isOpen]);
90	
91	  useEffect(() => {
92	    if (!isOpen && previousFocusRef.current) {
93	      previousFocusRef.current.focus();
94	      previousFocusRef.current = null;
95	    }
96	  }, [isOpen]);
97	
98	  if (!isOpen) return null;
99	
100	  return createPortal(
101	    <div
102	      className={cn(
103	        'fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4',
104	        'motion-safe:animate-[fadeIn_150ms_ease-out]',
105	      )}
106	      style={{ zIndex: 'var(--z-modal)' }}
107	    >
108	      {/* Backdrop */}
109	      <div
110	        className="absolute inset-0 bg-navy/50"
111	        onClick={onClose}
112	        aria-hidden="true"
113	      />
114	
115	      {/* Dialog */}
116	      <div
117	        ref={dialogRef}
118	        role="dialog"
119	        aria-modal="true"
120	        aria-labelledby={titleId}
121	        tabIndex={-1}
122	        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
123	        data-testid={props['data-testid']}
124	        className={cn(
125	          'relative w-full bg-cream rounded-card shadow-elevated',
126	          'p-6',
127	          'motion-safe:animate-[scaleIn_150ms_ease-out]',
128	          'focus:outline-none',
129	          sizeClasses[size],
130	        )}
131	      >
132	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
133	          <h2
134	            id={titleId}
135	            className="font-serif text-xl font-semibold text-navy"
136	          >
137	            {title}
138	          </h2>
139	          <button
140	            type="button"
141	            onClick={onClose}
142	            className={cn(
143	              'rounded-button p-1 text-navy/60 hover:text-navy',
144	              'transition-colors duration-150 motion-reduce:transition-none',
145	              'focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-dusty-rose',
146	            )}
147	            aria-label="Close"
148	          >
149	            <svg
150	              xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
151	              className="h-5 w-5"
152	              viewBox="0 0 20 20"
153	              fill="currentColor"
154	              aria-hidden="true"
155	            >
156	              <path
157	                fillRule="evenodd"
158	                d="M4.293 4.293a1 1 0 011.414 0L10 8.586l4.293-4.293a1 1 0 111.414 1.414L11.414 10l4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414 1.414L10 11.414l-4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414-1.414L8.586 10 4.293 5.707a1 1 0 010-1.414z"
159	                clipRule="evenodd"
160	              />
161	            </svg>
162	          </button>
163	        </div>
164	        <div>{children}</div>
165	      </div>
166	    </div>,
167	    document.body,
168	  );
169	}
170	
171	export { Modal };
172	export type { ModalProps };
173
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/route.md`

```text
80	#### `context` (optional)
81	
82	- **`params`**: a promise that resolves to an object containing the [dynamic route parameters](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/dynamic-routes) for the current route.
83	
84	```ts filename="app/dashboard/[team]/route.ts" switcher
85	export async function GET(
86	  request: Request,
87	  { params }: { params: Promise<{ team: string }> }
88	) {
89	  const { team } = await params
90	}
91	```
92	
93	```js filename="app/dashboard/[team]/route.js" switcher
94	export async function GET(request, { params }) {
95	  const { team } = await params
96	}
97	```
98	
99	| Example                          | URL            | `params`                           |
100	| -------------------------------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------- |
101	| `app/dashboard/[team]/route.js`  | `/dashboard/1` | `Promise<{ team: '1' }>`           |
102	| `app/shop/[tag]/[item]/route.js` | `/shop/1/2`    | `Promise<{ tag: '1', item: '2' }>` |
103	| `app/blog/[...slug]/route.js`    | `/blog/1/2`    | `Promise<{ slug: ['1', '2'] }>`    |
104	
105	### Route Context Helper
106	
107	You can type the Route Handler context using `RouteContext` to get strongly typed `params` from a route literal. `RouteContext` is a globally available helper.
108	
109	```ts filename="app/users/[id]/route.ts"
110	import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
111	
112	export async function GET(_req: NextRequest, ctx: RouteContext<'/users/[id]'>) {
113	  const { id } = await ctx.params
114	  return Response.json({ id })
115	}
116	```
117	
118	> **Good to know**
119	>
120	> - Types are generated during `next dev`, `next build` or `next typegen`.
121	> - After type generation, the `RouteContext` helper is globally available. It doesn't need to be imported.
122	
123	## Examples
124	
125	### Cookies
126	
127	You can read or set cookies with [`cookies`](/docs/app/api-reference/functions/cookies) from `next/headers`.
128	
129	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
130	import { cookies } from 'next/headers'
131	
132	export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
133	  const cookieStore = await cookies()
134	
135	  const a = cookieStore.get('a')
136	  const b = cookieStore.set('b', '1')
137	  const c = cookieStore.delete('c')
138	}
139	```
```
</details></tool-use>

```typescript
import { writeFile, mkdir, unlink } from 'fs/promises';
import { join } from 'path';
import crypto from 'crypto';
import { successResponse, errorResponse } from '@/lib/api';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

const ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png'] as const;
const MAX_FILE_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024; // 5MB
const UPLOAD_DIR = join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'uploads', 'pakej');

function getExtensionFromMime(mime: string): string {
  const map: Record<string, string> = {
    'image/jpeg': 'jpg',
    'image/png': 'png',
  };
  return map[mime] ?? 'bin';
}

export async function POST(request: Request) {
  try {
    const formData = await request.formData();
    const file = formData.get('file');
    const oldImage = formData.get('oldImage');

    if (!file || !(file instanceof File)) {
      return errorResponse('No file provided', 400);
    }

    if (!ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES.includes(file.type as (typeof ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES)[number])) {
      return errorResponse('Invalid file type. Only JPG and PNG are allowed.', 400);
    }

    if (file.size > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
      return errorResponse('File too large. Maximum size is 5MB.', 400);
    }

    const extension = getExtensionFromMime(file.type);
    const filename = `${crypto.randomUUID()}.${extension}`;

    await mkdir(UPLOAD_DIR, { recursive: true });

    const buffer = Buffer.from(await file.arrayBuffer());
    const filePath = join(UPLOAD_DIR, filename);
    await writeFile(filePath, buffer);

    // Delete old image if provided
    if (oldImage && typeof oldImage === 'string' && oldImage.startsWith('/uploads/pakej/')) {
      const oldFilePath = join(process.cwd(), 'public', oldImage);
      try {
        await unlink(oldFilePath);
      } catch {
        // Old file may not exist — ignore silently
      }
    }

    const url = `/uploads/pakej/${filename}`;
    return successResponse({ url });
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Upload failed';
    return errorResponse(message, 500);
  }
}

```

```text
import Link from "next/link";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/db";
import { Card, CardHeader, CardBody } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

function getTodayRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
  const now = new Date();
  const start = new Date(
    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate()),
  );
  const end = new Date(
    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate() + 1),
  );
  return { start, end };
}

function getCurrentMonthRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
  const now = new Date();
  const start = new Date(
    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), 1),
  );
  const end = new Date(
    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth() + 1, 1),
  );
  return { start, end };
}

function formatTarikh(date: Date): string {
  return date.toLocaleDateString("ms-MY", {
    day: "numeric",
    month: "short",
    year: "numeric",
  });
}

function statusBadgeVariant(
  status: string,
): "default" | "success" | "warning" | "error" {
  switch (status) {
    case "TERSEDIA":
      return "success";
    case "DITEMPAH":
      return "default";
    case "DIBATALKAN":
      return "error";
    default:
      return "default";
  }
}

export default async function DashboardPage() {
  const { start: todayStart, end: todayEnd } = getTodayRange();
  const { start: monthStart, end: monthEnd } = getCurrentMonthRange();

  const [
    temujanjiHariIni,
    tempahanBulanIni,
    jumlahPelanggan,
    jumlahPakej,
    recentTemujanji,
    recentTempahan,
  ] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.temujanji.count({
      where: {
        slotTemujanji: {
          tarikh: { gte: todayStart, lt: todayEnd },
        },
      },
    }),
    prisma.tempahan.count({
      where: {
        slotTempahan: {
          tarikh: { gte: monthStart, lt: monthEnd },
        },
      },
    }),
    prisma.pelanggan.count(),
    prisma.pakej.count(),
    prisma.temujanji.findMany({
      take: 5,
      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      include: {
        pelanggan: { select: { nama: true } },
        slotTemujanji: { select: { tarikh: true, status: true } },
      },
    }),
    prisma.tempahan.findMany({
      take: 5,
      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      include: {
        slotTempahan: { select: { tarikh: true } },
        pakej: { select: { namaPakej: true } },
      },
    }),
  ]);

  const cards = [
    {
      title: "Temujanji Hari Ini",
      count: temujanjiHariIni,
      href: "/admin/temujanji",
    },
    {
      title: "Tempahan Bulan Ini",
      count: tempahanBulanIni,
      href: "/admin/tempahan",
    },
    {
      title: "Jumlah Pelanggan",
      count: jumlahPelanggan,
      href: "/admin/pelanggan",
    },
    {
      title: "Jumlah Pakej",
      count: jumlahPakej,
      href: "/admin/pakej",
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-8">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-navy">Dashboard</h1>

      {/* Count Cards */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
        {cards.map((card) => (
          <Link key={card.href} href={card.href}>
            <Card className="bg-white hover:shadow-elevated">
              <CardBody>
                <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">{card.title}</p>
                <p className="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-navy">
                  {card.count}
                </p>
              </CardBody>
            </Card>
          </Link>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Recent Activity */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 lg:grid-cols-2">
        {/* Recent Temujanji */}
        <Card className="bg-white">
          <CardHeader>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
              Temujanji Terkini
            </h2>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardBody>
            {recentTemujanji.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada temujanji.</p>
            ) : (
              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
                {recentTemujanji.map((t) => (
                  <li
                    key={t.id}
                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
                  >
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
                        {t.pelanggan.nama}
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTemujanji.tarikh)}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(t.slotTemujanji.status)}>
                      {t.slotTemujanji.status}
                    </Badge>
                  </li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            )}
          </CardBody>
        </Card>

        {/* Recent Tempahan */}
        <Card className="bg-white">
          <CardHeader>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
              Tempahan Terkini
            </h2>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardBody>
            {recentTempahan.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada tempahan.</p>
            ) : (
              <ul className="divide-y divide-navy/10">
                {recentTempahan.map((t) => (
                  <li
                    key={t.id}
                    className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0"
                  >
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
                        {t.namaTempahan}
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
                        {formatTarikh(t.slotTempahan.tarikh)} &middot;{" "}
                        {t.pakej.namaPakej}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            )}
          </CardBody>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

155	
156	interface SidebarProps {
157	  readonly isOpen: boolean;
158	  readonly onClose: () => void;
159	}
160	
161	function isActiveRoute(pathname: string, href: string): boolean {
162	  if (href === "/admin") {
163	    return pathname === "/admin";
164	  }
165	  return pathname.startsWith(href);
166	}
167	
168	export function Sidebar({ isOpen, onClose }: SidebarProps) {
169	  const pathname = usePathname();
170	
171	  return (
172	    <>
173	      {/* Mobile overlay */}
174	      {isOpen && (
175	        <div
176	          className="fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-black/50 lg:hidden"
177	          onClick={onClose}
178	          aria-hidden="true"
179	        />
180	      )}
181	
182	      {/* Sidebar */}
183	      <aside
184	        className={cn(
185	          "fixed top-0 left-0 z-50 flex h-full w-64 flex-col bg-navy text-cream transition-transform duration-200 lg:static lg:z-auto lg:translate-x-0",
186	          "md:w-64 lg:w-64",
187	          isOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "-translate-x-full",
188	        )}
189	      >
190	        {/* Logo / Brand */}
191	        <div className="flex h-16 shrink-0 items-center gap-3 border-b border-cream/10 px-4">
192	          <span className="text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-cream">
193	            MawarBiru
194	          </span>
195	          <button
196	            type="button"
197	            className="ml-auto text-cream/60 hover:text-cream lg:hidden"
198	            onClick={onClose}
199	            aria-label="Tutup menu"
200	          >
201	            <svg
202	              className="h-5 w-5"
203	              fill="none"
204	              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
205	              strokeWidth={1.5}
206	              stroke="currentColor"
207	              aria-hidden="true"
208	            >
209	              <path
210	                strokeLinecap="round"
211	                strokeLinejoin="round"
212	                d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"
213	              />
214	            </svg>
215	          </button>
216	        </div>
217	
218	        {/* Navigation */}
219	        <nav className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-3 py-4" aria-label="Admin">
220	          <ul className="flex flex-col gap-1">
221	            {NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => {
222	              const active = isActiveRoute(pathname, item.href);
223	              return (
224	                <li key={item.href}>
225	                  <a
226	                    href={item.href}
227	                    className={cn(
228	                      "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors",
229	                      active
230	                        ? "bg-cream/15 text-cream"
231	                        : "text-cream/70 hover:bg-cream/10 hover:text-cream",
232	                    )}
233	                    aria-current={active ? "page" : undefined}
234	                  >
235	                    {item.icon}
236	                    <span>{item.label}</span>
237	                  </a>
238	                </li>
239	              );
240	            })}
241	          </ul>
242	        </nav>
243	
244	        {/* Logout */}
245	        <div className="border-t border-cream/10 px-3 py-4">
246	          <form action={logoutAction}>
247	            <button
248	              type="submit"
249	              className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-cream/70 transition-colors hover:bg-cream/10 hover:text-cream"
250	            >
251	              <svg
252	                className="h-5 w-5"
253	                fill="none"
254	                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
255	                strokeWidth={1.5}
256	                stroke="currentColor"
257	                aria-hidden="true"
258	              >
259	                <path
260	                  strokeLinecap="round"
261	                  strokeLinejoin="round"
262	                  d="M15.75 9V5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 13.5 3h-6a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25v13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 7.5 21h6a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25V15m3 0 3-3m0 0-3-3m3 3H9"
263	                />
264	              </svg>
265	              <span>Log Keluar</span>
266	            </button>
267	          </form>
268	        </div>
269	      </aside>
270	    </>
271	  );
272	}

 `./node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/route.md`

```text
1	---
2	title: route.js
3	description: API reference for the route.js special file.
4	---
5	
6	Route Handlers allow you to create custom request handlers for a given route using the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) and [Response](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Response) APIs.
7	
8	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
9	export async function GET() {
10	  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })
11	}
12	```
13	
14	```js filename="route.js" switcher
15	export async function GET() {
16	  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })
17	}
18	```
19	
20	## Reference
21	
22	### HTTP Methods
23	
24	A **route** file allows you to create custom request handlers for a given route. The following [HTTP methods](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods) are supported: `GET`, `POST`, `PUT`, `PATCH`, `DELETE`, `HEAD`, and `OPTIONS`.
25	
26	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
27	export async function GET(request: Request) {}
28	
29	export async function HEAD(request: Request) {}
30	
31	export async function POST(request: Request) {}
32	
33	export async function PUT(request: Request) {}
34	
35	export async function DELETE(request: Request) {}
36	
37	export async function PATCH(request: Request) {}
38	
39	// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.
40	export async function OPTIONS(request: Request) {}
41	```
42	
43	```js filename="route.js" switcher
44	export async function GET(request) {}
45	
46	export async function HEAD(request) {}
47	
48	export async function POST(request) {}
49	
50	export async function PUT(request) {}
51	
52	export async function DELETE(request) {}
53	
54	export async function PATCH(request) {}
55	
56	// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.
57	export async function OPTIONS(request) {}
58	```
59	
60	### Parameters
61	
62	#### `request` (optional)
63	
64	The `request` object is a [NextRequest](/docs/app/api-reference/functions/next-request) object, which is an extension of the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) API. `NextRequest` gives you further control over the incoming request, including easily accessing `cookies` and an extended, parsed, URL object `nextUrl`.
65	
66	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
67	import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
68	
69	export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
70	  const url = request.nextUrl
71	}
72	```
73	
74	```js filename="route.js" switcher
75	export async function GET(request) {
76	  const url = request.nextUrl
77	}
78	```
79	
80	#### `context` (optional)
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import Image from 'next/image';

interface ImageUploadProps {
  readonly currentImage?: string | null;
  readonly onUploaded: (url: string) => void;
}

export function ImageUpload({ currentImage, onUploaded }: ImageUploadProps) {
  const [preview, setPreview] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  const handleFileChange = useCallback(
    async (event: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      const file = event.target.files?.[0];
      if (!file) return;

      setError(null);

      // Client-side validation
      const allowedTypes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png'];
      if (!allowedTypes.includes(file.type)) {
        setError('Only JPG and PNG files are allowed.');
        return;
      }

      const maxSize = 5 * 1024 * 1024;
      if (file.size > maxSize) {
        setError('File too large. Maximum size is 5MB.');
        return;
      }

      // Show local preview
      const objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file);
      setPreview(objectUrl);

      // Upload
      setIsUploading(true);
      try {
        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('file', file);
        if (currentImage) {
          formData.append('oldImage', currentImage);
        }

        const response = await fetch('/api/admin/upload', {
          method: 'POST',
          body: formData,
        });

        const result = await response.json();

        if (!response.ok || !result.success) {
          setError(result.error ?? 'Upload failed');
          setPreview(null);
          return;
        }

        onUploaded(result.data.url);
      } catch {
        setError('Network error. Please try again.');
        setPreview(null);
      } finally {
        setIsUploading(false);
        URL.revokeObjectURL(objectUrl);
      }
    },
    [currentImage, onUploaded],
  );

  const displayImage = preview ?? currentImage;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {displayImage && (
        <div className="relative h-40 w-40 overflow-hidden rounded-md border">
          <Image
            src={displayImage}
            alt="Preview"
            fill
            className="object-cover"
            unoptimized={preview !== null}
          />
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        <input
          ref={inputRef}
          type="file"
          accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png"
          onChange={handleFileChange}
          className="text-sm file:mr-3 file:rounded-md file:border-0 file:bg-blue-50 file:px-3 file:py-1.5 file:text-sm file:font-medium file:text-blue-700 hover:file:bg-blue-100"
          disabled={isUploading}
        />
        {isUploading && (
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">Uploading...</span>
        )}
      </div>

      {error && (
        <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{error}</p>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

 `./node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/route.md`

```text
80	#### `context` (optional)
81	
82	- **`params`**: a promise that resolves to an object containing the [dynamic route parameters](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/dynamic-routes) for the current route.
83	
84	```ts filename="app/dashboard/[team]/route.ts" switcher
85	export async function GET(
86	  request: Request,
87	  { params }: { params: Promise<{ team: string }> }
88	) {
89	  const { team } = await params
90	}
91	```
92	
93	```js filename="app/dashboard/[team]/route.js" switcher
94	export async function GET(request, { params }) {
95	  const { team } = await params
96	}
97	```
98	
99	| Example                          | URL            | `params`                           |
100	| -------------------------------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------- |
101	| `app/dashboard/[team]/route.js`  | `/dashboard/1` | `Promise<{ team: '1' }>`           |
102	| `app/shop/[tag]/[item]/route.js` | `/shop/1/2`    | `Promise<{ tag: '1', item: '2' }>` |
103	| `app/blog/[...slug]/route.js`    | `/blog/1/2`    | `Promise<{ slug: ['1', '2'] }>`    |
104	
105	### Route Context Helper
106	
107	You can type the Route Handler context using `RouteContext` to get strongly typed `params` from a route literal. `RouteContext` is a globally available helper.
108	
109	```ts filename="app/users/[id]/route.ts"
110	import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
111	
112	export async function GET(_req: NextRequest, ctx: RouteContext<'/users/[id]'>) {
113	  const { id } = await ctx.params
114	  return Response.json({ id })
115	}
116	```
117	
118	> **Good to know**
119	>
```
</details></tool-use>

6	function getTodayRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
7	  const now = new Date();
8	  const start = new Date(
9	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate()),
10	  );
11	  const end = new Date(
12	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), now.getUTCDate() + 1),
13	  );
14	  return { start, end };
15	}

17	function getCurrentMonthRange(): { start: Date; end: Date } {
18	  const now = new Date();
19	  const start = new Date(
20	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth(), 1),
21	  );
22	  const end = new Date(
23	    Date.UTC(now.getUTCFullYear(), now.getUTCMonth() + 1, 1),
24	  );

31	    month: "short",

33	  });

import { z } from 'zod';

const MALAYSIAN_PHONE_REGEX = /^(\+?60)?0?1[0-9]-?[0-9]{7,8}$/;

export const pelangganCreateSchema = z.object({
  nama: z
    .string({ error: 'Nama diperlukan' })
    .min(2, 'Nama mestilah sekurang-kurangnya 2 aksara')
    .max(100, 'Nama mestilah tidak melebihi 100 aksara'),
  noTelefon: z
    .string({ error: 'No. telefon diperlukan' })
    .regex(
      MALAYSIAN_PHONE_REGEX,
      'Sila masukkan nombor telefon Malaysia yang sah (cth: 0121234567)',
    ),
  nota: z
    .string()
    .max(500, 'Nota mestilah tidak melebihi 500 aksara')
    .optional(),
});

export const pelangganUpdateSchema = pelangganCreateSchema.partial();

export type PelangganCreateInput = z.infer<typeof pelangganCreateSchema>;
export type PelangganUpdateInput = z.infer<typeof pelangganUpdateSchema>;

```

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
  createRateLimiter,
} from '@/lib/api';
import { updateSlotSchema } from '@/lib/validations/slot-temujanji';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
  interval: 60_000,
  maxRequests: 60,
});

type RouteParams = { params: Promise<{ id: string }> };

export const PUT = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context: unknown) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { id } = await (context as RouteParams).params;

  if (!id) {
    return errorResponse('ID diperlukan', 400);
  }

  const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) {
    return errorResponse('Slot tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  if (existing.status !== 'TERSEDIA') {
    return errorResponse(
      'Hanya slot dengan status TERSEDIA boleh dikemaskini',
      400,
    );
  }

  const body = await req.json();
  const validated = validateBody(updateSlotSchema, body);

  const tarikh = validated.tarikh ? new Date(validated.tarikh) : existing.tarikh;
  const masaMula = validated.masaMula ?? existing.masaMula;
  const masaTamat = validated.masaTamat ?? existing.masaTamat;

  // Validate masaTamat > masaMula after merging
  if (masaTamat <= masaMula) {
    return errorResponse('Masa tamat mestilah selepas masa mula', 400);
  }

  // Check for overlapping slots (excluding this one)
  const others = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
    where: {
      tarikh,
      status: { not: 'DIBATALKAN' },
      id: { not: id },
    },
    select: { masaMula: true, masaTamat: true },
  });

  const hasOverlap = others.some(
    (e) => masaMula < e.masaTamat && masaTamat > e.masaMula,
  );
  if (hasOverlap) {
    return errorResponse('Slot bertindih dengan slot sedia ada', 409);
  }

  const updated = await prisma.slotTemujanji.update({
    where: { id },
    data: { tarikh, masaMula, masaTamat },
  });

  return successResponse(updated);
});

export const DELETE = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context: unknown) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { id } = await (context as RouteParams).params;

  if (!id) {
    return errorResponse('ID diperlukan', 400);
  }

  const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) {
    return errorResponse('Slot tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  if (existing.status === 'DITEMPAH') {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
    const force = searchParams.get('force');
    if (force !== 'true') {
      return errorResponse(
        'Slot ini telah ditempah. Gunakan force=true untuk memadamkan.',
        400,
      );
    }
  }

  await prisma.slotTemujanji.delete({ where: { id } });

  return successResponse({ deleted: true });
});

```

```text
1	---
2	title: route.js
3	description: API reference for the route.js special file.
4	---
5	
6	Route Handlers allow you to create custom request handlers for a given route using the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) and [Response](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Response) APIs.
7	
8	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
9	export async function GET() {
10	  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })
11	}
12	```
13	
14	```js filename="route.js" switcher
15	export async function GET() {
16	  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })
17	}
18	```
19	
20	## Reference
21	
22	### HTTP Methods
23	
24	A **route** file allows you to create custom request handlers for a given route. The following [HTTP methods](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods) are supported: `GET`, `POST`, `PUT`, `PATCH`, `DELETE`, `HEAD`, and `OPTIONS`.
25	
26	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
27	export async function GET(request: Request) {}
28	
29	export async function HEAD(request: Request) {}
30	
31	export async function POST(request: Request) {}
32	
33	export async function PUT(request: Request) {}
34	
35	export async function DELETE(request: Request) {}
36	
37	export async function PATCH(request: Request) {}
38	
39	// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.
40	export async function OPTIONS(request: Request) {}
41	```
42	
43	```js filename="route.js" switcher
44	export async function GET(request) {}
45	
46	export async function HEAD(request) {}
47	
48	export async function POST(request) {}
49	
50	export async function PUT(request) {}
51	
52	export async function DELETE(request) {}
53	
54	export async function PATCH(request) {}
55	
56	// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.
57	export async function OPTIONS(request) {}
58	```
59	
60	### Parameters
61	
62	#### `request` (optional)
63	
64	The `request` object is a [NextRequest](/docs/app/api-reference/functions/next-request) object, which is an extension of the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) API. `NextRequest` gives you further control over the incoming request, including easily accessing `cookies` and an extended, parsed, URL object `nextUrl`.
65	
66	```ts filename="route.ts" switcher
67	import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
68	
69	export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
70	  const url = request.nextUrl
71	}
72	```
73	
74	```js filename="route.js" switcher
75	export async function GET(request) {
76	  const url = request.nextUrl
77	}
78	```
79	
80	#### `context` (optional)
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/dynamic-routes.md`

```text
1	---
2	title: Dynamic Route Segments
3	nav_title: Dynamic Segments
4	description: Dynamic Route Segments can be used to programmatically generate route segments from dynamic data.
5	related:
6	  title: Next Steps
7	  description: For more information on what to do next, we recommend the following sections
8	  links:
9	    - app/api-reference/functions/generate-static-params
10	---
11	
12	When you don't know the exact route segment names ahead of time and want to create routes from dynamic data, you can use Dynamic Segments that are filled in at request time or prerendered at build time.
13	
14	## Convention
15	
16	A Dynamic Segment can be created by wrapping a folder's name in square brackets: `[folderName]`. For example, a blog could include the following route `app/blog/[slug]/page.js` where `[slug]` is the Dynamic Segment for blog posts.
17	
18	```tsx filename="app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx" switcher
19	export default async function Page({
20	  params,
21	}: {
22	  params: Promise<{ slug: string }>
23	}) {
24	  const { slug } = await params
25	  return <div>My Post: {slug}</div>
26	}
27	```
28	
29	```jsx filename="app/blog/[slug]/page.js" switcher
30	export default async function Page({ params }) {
31	  const { slug } = await params
32	  return <div>My Post: {slug}</div>
33	}
34	```
35	
36	Dynamic Segments are passed as the `params` prop to [`layout`](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/layout), [`page`](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/page), [`route`](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/route), and [`generateMetadata`](/docs/app/api-reference/functions/generate-metadata#generatemetadata-function) functions.
37	
38	| Route                     | Example URL | `params`        |
39	| ------------------------- | ----------- | --------------- |
40	| `app/blog/[slug]/page.js` | `/blog/a`   | `{ slug: 'a' }` |
41	| `app/blog/[slug]/page.js` | `/blog/b`   | `{ slug: 'b' }` |

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
} from '@/lib/api';
import { pelangganCreateSchema } from '@/lib/validations/pelanggan';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
  const page = Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('page') ?? '1'));
  const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20')));
  const search = searchParams.get('search')?.trim() ?? '';

  const where = search
    ? {
        OR: [
          { nama: { contains: search } },
          { noTelefon: { contains: search } },
        ],
      }
    : {};

  const [pelanggan, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.pelanggan.findMany({
      where,
      include: {
        _count: { select: { temujanji: true, tempahan: true } },
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      skip: (page - 1) * limit,
      take: limit,
    }),
    prisma.pelanggan.count({ where }),
  ]);

  return successResponse({
    items: pelanggan,
    meta: { total, page, limit },
  });
});

export const POST = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const body: unknown = await req.json();
  const data = validateBody(pelangganCreateSchema, body);

  const noTelefonNormalized = data.noTelefon.replace(/-/g, '');

  const existing = await prisma.pelanggan.findUnique({
    where: { noTelefon: noTelefonNormalized },
  });

  if (existing) {
    return errorResponse(
      `Pelanggan dengan nombor telefon ${noTelefonNormalized} sudah wujud`,
      409,
    );
  }

  const pelanggan = await prisma.pelanggan.create({
    data: {
      nama: data.nama,
      noTelefon: noTelefonNormalized,
      nota: data.nota ?? null,
    },
    include: {
      _count: { select: { temujanji: true, tempahan: true } },
    },
  });

  return successResponse(pelanggan, 201);
});

```

80	#### `context` (optional)
81	
82	- **`params`**: a promise that resolves to an object containing the [dynamic route parameters](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/dynamic-routes) for the current route.
83	
84	```ts filename="app/dashboard/[team]/route.ts" switcher

96	}

98	
99	| Example                          | URL            | `params`                           |
100	| -------------------------------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------- |
101	| `app/dashboard/[team]/route.js`  | `/dashboard/1` | `Promise<{ team: '1' }>`           |
102	| `app/shop/[tag]/[item]/route.js` | `/shop/1/2`    | `Promise<{ tag: '1', item: '2' }>` |
103	| `app/blog/[...slug]/route.js`    | `/blog/1/2`    | `Promise<{ slug: ['1', '2'] }>`    |
104	
105	### Route Context Helper
106	
107	You can type the Route Handler context using `RouteContext` to get strongly typed `params` from a route literal. `RouteContext` is a globally available helper.
108	
109	```ts filename="app/users/[id]/route.ts"
110	import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
111	
112	export async function GET(_req: NextRequest, ctx: RouteContext<'/users/[id]'>) {
113	  const { id } = await ctx.params
114	  return Response.json({ id })
115	}
116	```

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
} from '@/lib/api';
import { pelangganUpdateSchema } from '@/lib/validations/pelanggan';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

function extractId(req: NextRequest): string {
  const segments = new URL(req.url).pathname.split('/');
  return segments[segments.length - 1];
}

export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const id = extractId(req);

  const pelanggan = await prisma.pelanggan.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    include: {
      temujanji: {
        include: {
          slotTemujanji: { select: { tarikh: true, masaMula: true, masaTamat: true, status: true } },
        },
        orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      },
      tempahan: {
        include: {
          pakej: { select: { namaPakej: true } },
          slotTempahan: { select: { tarikh: true } },
        },
        orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      },
    },
  });

  if (!pelanggan) {
    return errorResponse('Pelanggan tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  return successResponse(pelanggan);
});

export const PUT = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const id = extractId(req);
  const body: unknown = await req.json();
  const data = validateBody(pelangganUpdateSchema, body);

  const existing = await prisma.pelanggan.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) {
    return errorResponse('Pelanggan tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};

  if (data.nama !== undefined) {
    updateData.nama = data.nama;
  }

  if (data.noTelefon !== undefined) {
    const noTelefonNormalized = data.noTelefon.replace(/-/g, '');

    if (noTelefonNormalized !== existing.noTelefon) {
      const duplicate = await prisma.pelanggan.findUnique({
        where: { noTelefon: noTelefonNormalized },
      });
      if (duplicate) {
        return errorResponse(
          `Pelanggan dengan nombor telefon ${noTelefonNormalized} sudah wujud`,
          409,
        );
      }
      updateData.noTelefon = noTelefonNormalized;
    }
  }

  if (data.nota !== undefined) {
    updateData.nota = data.nota ?? null;
  }

  const pelanggan = await prisma.pelanggan.update({
    where: { id },
    data: updateData,
    include: {
      _count: { select: { temujanji: true, tempahan: true } },
    },
  });

  return successResponse(pelanggan);
});

export const DELETE = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const id = extractId(req);

  const pelanggan = await prisma.pelanggan.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    include: {
      _count: { select: { temujanji: true, tempahan: true } },
    },
  });

  if (!pelanggan) {
    return errorResponse('Pelanggan tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  const temujanjiCount = pelanggan._count.temujanji;
  const tempahanCount = pelanggan._count.tempahan;

  if (temujanjiCount > 0 || tempahanCount > 0) {
    return errorResponse(
      `Tidak dapat memadam pelanggan ini kerana masih mempunyai ${temujanjiCount} temujanji dan ${tempahanCount} tempahan`,
      409,
    );
  }

  await prisma.pelanggan.delete({ where: { id } });

  return successResponse({ deleted: true });
});

```

export const createSlotTempahanSchema = z.object({
  tarikh: z
    .string({ error: 'Tarikh diperlukan' })
    .date('Format tarikh tidak sah (cth: 2026-01-15)'),
});

export const bulkCreateSlotTempahanSchema = z
  .object({
    startDate: z
      .string({ error: 'Tarikh mula diperlukan' })
      .date('Format tarikh tidak sah (cth: 2026-01-15)'),
    endDate: z
      .string({ error: 'Tarikh akhir diperlukan' })
      .date('Format tarikh tidak sah (cth: 2026-01-15)'),
  })
  .refine((data) => data.endDate >= data.startDate, {
    message: 'Tarikh akhir mestilah sama atau selepas tarikh mula',
    path: ['endDate'],
  });

export type BulkCreateSlotTempahanInput = z.infer<typeof bulkCreateSlotTempahanSchema>;

export const updateSlotTempahanSchema = z.object({
  status: z.enum(['TERSEDIA', 'DITEMPAH', 'DIBATALKAN'], {
    error: 'Status tidak sah',
  }),
});

export type UpdateSlotTempahanInput = z.infer<typeof updateSlotTempahanSchema>;

import { z } from 'zod';

const tierSchema = z.object({
  namaTier: z
    .string({ message: 'Nama tier diperlukan' })
    .min(1, 'Nama tier diperlukan')
    .max(100, 'Nama tier mestilah tidak melebihi 100 aksara'),
  bilanganPax: z
    .number({ message: 'Bilangan pax diperlukan' })
    .int('Bilangan pax mestilah nombor bulat')
    .min(0, 'Bilangan pax mestilah 0 atau lebih'),
  harga: z
    .number({ message: 'Harga diperlukan' })
    .min(0, 'Harga mestilah 0 atau lebih'),
});

const sectionSchema = z.object({
  tajuk: z
    .string({ message: 'Tajuk diperlukan' })
    .min(1, 'Tajuk diperlukan')
    .max(200, 'Tajuk mestilah tidak melebihi 200 aksara'),
  items: z
    .array(z.string().min(1, 'Item tidak boleh kosong'))
    .min(1, 'Sekurang-kurangnya 1 item diperlukan'),
});

export const createPakejSchema = z.object({
  namaPakej: z
    .string({ message: 'Nama pakej diperlukan' })
    .min(1, 'Nama pakej diperlukan')
    .max(200, 'Nama pakej mestilah tidak melebihi 200 aksara'),
  warna: z
    .string({ message: 'Warna diperlukan' })
    .regex(/^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/, 'Warna mestilah format hex yang sah (cth: #FF0000)'),
  tiers: z
    .array(tierSchema)
    .min(1, 'Sekurang-kurangnya 1 tier diperlukan'),
  sections: z.array(sectionSchema).default([]),
});

export const updatePakejSchema = createPakejSchema;

export type CreatePakejInput = z.infer<typeof createPakejSchema>;
export type UpdatePakejInput = z.infer<typeof updatePakejSchema>;
export type TierInput = z.infer<typeof tierSchema>;
export type SectionInput = z.infer<typeof sectionSchema>;
