```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import useSWR from 'swr';
import { Card, CardBody, Badge, Button } from '@/components/ui';
import { toast } from '@/components/ui';

interface SlotTempahan {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly tarikh: string;
  readonly status: 'TERSEDIA' | 'DITEMPAH' | 'DIBATALKAN';
  readonly tempahan?: { readonly id: string; readonly namaTempahan: string } | null;
}

interface ApiResponse {
  readonly success: boolean;
  readonly data: {
    readonly data: readonly SlotTempahan[];
    readonly meta: { readonly total: number };
  } | null;
}

type StatusFilter = 'ALL' | 'TERSEDIA' | 'DITEMPAH' | 'DIBATALKAN';

const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((r) => r.json());

const PAGE_SIZE = 20;

function statusBadgeVariant(status: string): 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' {
  switch (status) {
    case 'TERSEDIA':
      return 'success';
    case 'DITEMPAH':
      return 'warning';
    case 'DIBATALKAN':
      return 'error';
    default:
      return 'success';
  }
}

function formatMonth(year: number, month: number): string {
  return `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

export function SlotTempahanList() {
  const now = new Date();
  const [year, setYear] = useState(now.getFullYear());
  const [month, setMonth] = useState(now.getMonth());
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<StatusFilter>('ALL');
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);

  const monthParam = formatMonth(year, month);

  const { data, mutate, isLoading } = useSWR<ApiResponse>(
    `/api/admin/slot-tempahan?month=${monthParam}`,
    fetcher,
  );

  const allSlots = data?.data?.data ?? [];

  // Client-side filtering and pagination
  const filtered =
    statusFilter === 'ALL'
      ? allSlots
      : allSlots.filter((s) => s.status === statusFilter);

  const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filtered.length / PAGE_SIZE));
  const safePageVal = Math.min(page, totalPages);
  const paginated = filtered.slice(
    (safePageVal - 1) * PAGE_SIZE,
    safePageVal * PAGE_SIZE,
  );

  const goToPrevMonth = useCallback(() => {
    if (month === 0) {
      setYear((y) => y - 1);
      setMonth(11);
    } else {
      setMonth((m) => m - 1);
    }
    setPage(1);
  }, [month]);

  const goToNextMonth = useCallback(() => {
    if (month === 11) {
      setYear((y) => y + 1);
      setMonth(0);
    } else {
      setMonth((m) => m + 1);
    }
    setPage(1);
  }, [month]);

  const handleUpdateStatus = async (id: string, status: string) => {
    const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/slot-tempahan/${id}`, {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ status }),
    });
    const result = await res.json();
    if (result.success) {
      toast.success('Status berjaya dikemaskini');
      mutate();
    } else {
      toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal mengemaskini status');
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id: string, force = false) => {
    const url = force
      ? `/api/admin/slot-tempahan/${id}?force=true`
      : `/api/admin/slot-tempahan/${id}`;
    const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'DELETE' });
    const result = await res.json();
    if (result.success) {
      toast.success('Slot berjaya dipadam');
      mutate();
    } else {
      toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal memadam slot');
    }
  };

  const getMonthLabel = () => {
    const date = new Date(year, month, 1);
    return date.toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
  };

  return (
    <Card className="bg-white">
      <CardBody>
        {/* Month navigation and filter */}
        <div className="mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={goToPrevMonth}
              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
              aria-label="Bulan sebelumnya"
            >
              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15.75 19.5 8.25 12l7.5-7.5" />
              </svg>
            </button>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">{getMonthLabel()}</h2>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={goToNextMonth}
              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
              aria-label="Bulan seterusnya"
            >
              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
              </svg>
            </button>
          </div>

          <select
            value={statusFilter}
            onChange={(e) => {
              setStatusFilter(e.target.value as StatusFilter);
              setPage(1);
            }}
            className="rounded-md border border-navy/20 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-navy"
          >
            <option value="ALL">Semua Status</option>
            <option value="TERSEDIA">Tersedia</option>
            <option value="DITEMPAH">Ditempah</option>
            <option value="DIBATALKAN">Dibatalkan</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Table */}
        {isLoading ? (
          <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center">
            <p className="text-navy/60">Memuatkan...</p>
          </div>
        ) : paginated.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center">
            <p className="text-navy/60">Tiada slot untuk bulan ini.</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
            <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr className="border-b border-navy/10">
                  <th className="px-3 py-2 font-semibold text-navy/60">Tarikh</th>
                  <th className="px-3 py-2 font-semibold text-navy/60">Status</th>
                  <th className="px-3 py-2 font-semibold text-navy/60">Tindakan</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {paginated.map((slot) => (
                  <tr key={slot.id} className="border-b border-navy/5">
                    <td className="px-3 py-2.5 text-navy">
                      {new Date(slot.tarikh).toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
                        weekday: 'short',
                        day: 'numeric',
                        month: 'short',
                        year: 'numeric',
                      })}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2.5">
                      <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(slot.status)}>
                        {slot.status}
                      </Badge>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2.5">
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        {slot.status === 'TERSEDIA' && (
                          <Button
                            size="sm"
                            variant="outline"
                            onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(slot.id, 'DIBATALKAN')}
                          >
                            Batalkan
                          </Button>
                        )}
                        {slot.status === 'DIBATALKAN' && (
                          <Button
                            size="sm"
                            variant="outline"
                            onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(slot.id, 'TERSEDIA')}
                          >
                            Aktifkan
                          </Button>
                        )}
                        <Button
                          size="sm"
                          variant="outline"
                          onClick={() => handleDelete(slot.id, slot.status === 'DITEMPAH')}
                          className="text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50"
                        >
                          Padam
                        </Button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Pagination */}
        {totalPages > 1 && (
          <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-between border-t border-navy/10 pt-3">
            <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
              {filtered.length} slot dijumpai
            </p>
            <div className="flex gap-1">
              <Button
                size="sm"
                variant="outline"
                onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.max(1, p - 1))}
                disabled={safePageVal <= 1}
              >
                Sebelum
              </Button>
              <span className="flex items-center px-2 text-sm text-navy">
                {safePageVal} / {totalPages}
              </span>
              <Button
                size="sm"
                variant="outline"
                onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.min(totalPages, p + 1))}
                disabled={safePageVal >= totalPages}
              >
                Seterusnya
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </CardBody>
    </Card>
  );
}

```

```text
File created successfully at: /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/slot-tempahan/slot-tempahan-list.tsx
```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-20 12:05:55Z)**_

All files are in place. Here is a summary of what was created:

---

## Files Created (7 files)

### 1. Zod Validation
- **`lib/validations/pelanggan.ts`** -- `pelangganCreateSchema` and `pelangganUpdateSchema` (partial). Reuses the Malaysian phone regex pattern. Fields: nama (2-100 chars), noTelefon (Malaysian format), nota (optional, max 500).

### 2. API Routes
- **`app/api/admin/pelanggan/route.ts`** -- GET (paginated list with search by nama/noTelefon, includes `_count` for temujanji and tempahan) + POST (create with phone uniqueness check, returns 409 on duplicate, normalizes dashes)
- **`app/api/admin/pelanggan/[id]/route.ts`** -- GET (single with full temujanji/tempahan relations including slot and pakej details) + PUT (update with phone duplicate check) + DELETE (blocks deletion if pelanggan has linked temujanji or tempahan, returning counts in error message)

Both routes use `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` and the existing `withErrorHandling`, `validateBody`, `successResponse`, `errorResponse` helpers.

### 3. Admin Page
- **`app/admin/pelanggan/page.tsx`** -- Server component that renders the PelangganTable client component. The sidebar already has a "Pelanggan" nav item pointing to `/admin/pelanggan`.

### 4. Client Components
- **`components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-table.tsx`** -- SWR-powered table with columns (Nama, No. Telefon, Nota truncated to 50 chars, Jml Temujanji, Jml Tempahan, Tindakan). Includes debounced search input, pagination controls, and action buttons (Lihat/Edit/Padam). Delete has a confirmation prompt.
- **`components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-form.tsx`** -- Modal form using react-hook-form + zodResolver for both create and edit. Shows server errors (e.g. 409 duplicate phone).
- **`components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-detail.tsx`** -- Modal detail view fetched via SWR. Shows full pelanggan info plus lists of linked temujanji (with tarikh, masa, status badge) and tempahan (with namaTempahan, tarikh, pakej).

### Key decisions
- Button variant uses `secondary` (not `outline`) to match the existing CVA button variants
- Phone normalization strips dashes before saving, consistent with the existing temujanji route
- All UI text is in Bahasa Malaysia, consistent with the rest of the admin interface
- Debounce uses a ref + cleanup effect pattern for proper teardown

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Button, Input, Label } from '@/components/ui';
import { toast } from '@/components/ui';

interface SlotTempahanFormProps {
  readonly defaultDate?: string | null;
  readonly onSuccess: () => void;
  readonly onCancel: () => void;
}

type FormMode = 'single' | 'range';

export function SlotTempahanForm({
  defaultDate,
  onSuccess,
  onCancel,
}: SlotTempahanFormProps) {
  const [mode, setMode] = useState<FormMode>(defaultDate ? 'single' : 'range');
  const [tarikh, setTarikh] = useState(defaultDate ?? '');
  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState('');
  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState('');
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsSubmitting(true);

    try {
      const body =
        mode === 'single' ? { tarikh } : { startDate, endDate };

      const res = await fetch('/api/admin/slot-tempahan', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(body),
      });

      const result = await res.json();

      if (result.success) {
        if (mode === 'range') {
          const { count, skipped } = result.data;
          toast.success(
            `${count} slot berjaya dicipta${skipped > 0 ? ` (${skipped} dilangkau)` : ''}`,
          );
        } else {
          toast.success('Slot berjaya dicipta');
        }
        onSuccess();
      } else {
        toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal mencipta slot');
      }
    } catch {
      toast.error('Ralat rangkaian');
    } finally {
      setIsSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
      {/* Mode toggle */}
      {!defaultDate && (
        <div className="flex gap-1 rounded-lg bg-navy/5 p-1">
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => setMode('single')}
            className={`flex-1 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
              mode === 'single'
                ? 'bg-white text-navy shadow-sm'
                : 'text-navy/60 hover:text-navy'
            }`}
          >
            Tarikh Tunggal
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => setMode('range')}
            className={`flex-1 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
              mode === 'range'
                ? 'bg-white text-navy shadow-sm'
                : 'text-navy/60 hover:text-navy'
            }`}
          >
            Julat Tarikh
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      {mode === 'single' ? (
        <div>
          <Label htmlFor="tarikh">Tarikh</Label>
          <Input
            id="tarikh"
            type="date"
            value={tarikh}
            onChange={(e) => setTarikh(e.target.value)}
            required
          />
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="startDate">Tarikh Mula</Label>
            <Input
              id="startDate"
              type="date"
              value={startDate}
              onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}
              required
            />
          </div>
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="endDate">Tarikh Akhir</Label>
            <Input
              id="endDate"
              type="date"
              value={endDate}
              onChange={(e) => setEndDate(e.target.value)}
              min={startDate}
              required
            />
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {mode === 'range' && (
        <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
          Slot sedia ada dalam julat tarikh akan dilangkau secara automatik.
        </p>
      )}

      <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-2">
        <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={onCancel}>
          Batal
        </Button>
        <Button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting}>
          {isSubmitting ? 'Mencipta...' : 'Cipta'}
        </Button>
      </div>
    </form>
  );
}

```

<result>All files are in place. Here is a summary of what was created:

---

## Files Created (7 files)

### 1. Zod Validation
- **`lib/validations/pelanggan.ts`** -- `pelangganCreateSchema` and `pelangganUpdateSchema` (partial). Reuses the Malaysian phone regex pattern. Fields: nama (2-100 chars), noTelefon (Malaysian format), nota (optional, max 500).

### 2. API Routes
- **`app/api/admin/pelanggan/route.ts`** -- GET (paginated list with search by nama/noTelefon, includes `_count` for temujanji and tempahan) + POST (create with phone uniqueness check, returns 409 on duplicate, normalizes dashes)
- **`app/api/admin/pelanggan/[id]/route.ts`** -- GET (single with full temujanji/tempahan relations including slot and pakej details) + PUT (update with phone duplicate check) + DELETE (blocks deletion if pelanggan has linked temujanji or tempahan, returning counts in error message)

Both routes use `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` and the existing `withErrorHandling`, `validateBody`, `successResponse`, `errorResponse` helpers.

### 3. Admin Page
- **`app/admin/pelanggan/page.tsx`** -- Server component that renders the PelangganTable client component. The sidebar already has a "Pelanggan" nav item pointing to `/admin/pelanggan`.

### 4. Client Components
- **`components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-table.tsx`** -- SWR-powered table with columns (Nama, No. Telefon, Nota truncated to 50 chars, Jml Temujanji, Jml Tempahan, Tindakan). Includes debounced search input, pagination controls, and action buttons (Lihat/Edit/Padam). Delete has a confirmation prompt.
- **`components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-form.tsx`** -- Modal form using react-hook-form + zodResolver for both create and edit. Shows server errors (e.g. 409 duplicate phone).
- **`components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-detail.tsx`** -- Modal detail view fetched via SWR. Shows full pelanggan info plus lists of linked temujanji (with tarikh, masa, status badge) and tempahan (with namaTempahan, tarikh, pakej).

### Key decisions
- Button variant uses `secondary` (not `outline`) to match the existing CVA button variants
- Phone normalization strips dashes before saving, consistent with the existing temujanji route
- All UI text is in Bahasa Malaysia, consistent with the rest of the admin interface
- Debounce uses a ref + cleanup effect pattern for proper teardown</result>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { useForm, useFieldArray } from 'react-hook-form';
import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Card, CardHeader, CardBody } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { toast } from '@/components/ui/toast';
import { createPakejSchema, type CreatePakejInput } from '@/lib/validations/pakej';

interface PakejFormInitialData {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly namaPakej: string;
  readonly warna: string;
  readonly tiers: ReadonlyArray<{
    readonly namaTier: string;
    readonly bilanganPax: number;
    readonly harga: number;
  }>;
  readonly sections: ReadonlyArray<{
    readonly tajuk: string;
    readonly items: readonly string[];
  }>;
}

interface PakejFormProps {
  readonly initialData?: PakejFormInitialData;
}

type FormValues = {
  namaPakej: string;
  warna: string;
  tiers: Array<{
    namaTier: string;
    bilanganPax: number;
    harga: number;
  }>;
  sections: Array<{
    tajuk: string;
    itemsText: string;
  }>;
};

function toFormValues(data?: PakejFormInitialData): FormValues {
  if (!data) {
    return {
      namaPakej: '',
      warna: '#000000',
      tiers: [{ namaTier: '', bilanganPax: 0, harga: 0 }],
      sections: [],
    };
  }

  return {
    namaPakej: data.namaPakej,
    warna: data.warna,
    tiers: data.tiers.map((t) => ({
      namaTier: t.namaTier,
      bilanganPax: t.bilanganPax,
      harga: t.harga,
    })),
    sections: data.sections.map((s) => ({
      tajuk: s.tajuk,
      itemsText: s.items.join('\n'),
    })),
  };
}

function toApiPayload(values: FormValues): CreatePakejInput {
  return {
    namaPakej: values.namaPakej,
    warna: values.warna,
    tiers: values.tiers,
    sections: values.sections.map((s) => ({
      tajuk: s.tajuk,
      items: s.itemsText
        .split('\n')
        .map((line) => line.trim())
        .filter((line) => line.length > 0),
    })),
  };
}

export function PakejForm({ initialData }: PakejFormProps) {
  const router = useRouter();
  const isEditing = Boolean(initialData);

  const {
    register,
    handleSubmit,
    control,
    watch,
    formState: { errors, isSubmitting },
  } = useForm<FormValues>({
    defaultValues: toFormValues(initialData),
  });

  const {
    fields: tierFields,
    append: appendTier,
    remove: removeTier,
  } = useFieldArray({ control, name: 'tiers' });

  const {
    fields: sectionFields,
    append: appendSection,
    remove: removeSection,
  } = useFieldArray({ control, name: 'sections' });

  const warnaValue = watch('warna');

  async function onSubmit(values: FormValues) {
    const payload = toApiPayload(values);

    // Client-side validation with Zod
    const parsed = createPakejSchema.safeParse(payload);
    if (!parsed.success) {
      const firstIssue = parsed.error.issues[0];
      toast.error(firstIssue?.message ?? 'Data tidak sah');
      return;
    }

    const url = isEditing
      ? `/api/admin/pakej/${initialData!.id}`
      : '/api/admin/pakej';
    const method = isEditing ? 'PUT' : 'POST';

    try {
      const res = await fetch(url, {
        method,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(parsed.data),
      });

      const json = await res.json();

      if (!res.ok) {
        toast.error(json.error ?? 'Gagal menyimpan pakej');
        return;
      }

      toast.success(
        isEditing ? 'Pakej berjaya dikemaskini' : 'Pakej berjaya ditambah',
      );
      router.push('/admin/pakej');
      router.refresh();
    } catch {
      toast.error('Ralat rangkaian');
    }
  }

  return (
    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-6">
      {/* Basic Info */}
      <Card className="bg-white">
        <CardHeader>
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">Maklumat Asas</h2>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardBody className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="namaPakej">Nama Pakej</Label>
            <Input
              id="namaPakej"
              {...register('namaPakej', { required: 'Nama pakej diperlukan' })}
              placeholder="cth: Night Wedding"
            />
            {errors.namaPakej && (
              <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">
                {errors.namaPakej.message}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>

          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="warna">Warna</Label>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <input
                type="color"
                id="warna-picker"
                {...register('warna')}
                className="h-10 w-14 cursor-pointer rounded border border-navy/20"
              />
              <Input
                id="warna"
                {...register('warna', {
                  required: 'Warna diperlukan',
                  pattern: {
                    value: /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/,
                    message: 'Format hex tidak sah',
                  },
                })}
                placeholder="#000000"
                className="max-w-40 font-mono"
              />
              <span
                className="inline-block h-10 w-10 rounded border border-navy/20"
                style={{ backgroundColor: warnaValue }}
              />
            </div>
            {errors.warna && (
              <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">
                {errors.warna.message}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>

          <div>
            <Label>Gambar</Label>
            <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">
              Muat naik gambar akan ditambah kemudian.
            </p>
          </div>
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      {/* Tiers */}
      <Card className="bg-white">
        <CardHeader>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">Tier Harga</h2>
            <Button
              type="button"
              variant="secondary"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() =>
                appendTier({ namaTier: '', bilanganPax: 0, harga: 0 })
              }
            >
              + Tambah Tier
            </Button>
          </div>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardBody className="space-y-4">
          {tierFields.length === 0 && (
            <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">
              Sekurang-kurangnya 1 tier diperlukan.
            </p>
          )}
          {tierFields.map((field, index) => (
            <div
              key={field.id}
              className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-3 rounded border border-navy/10 p-3"
            >
              <div className="flex-1 min-w-[150px]">
                <Label htmlFor={`tiers.${index}.namaTier`}>Nama Tier</Label>
                <Input
                  id={`tiers.${index}.namaTier`}
                  {...register(`tiers.${index}.namaTier`, {
                    required: 'Nama tier diperlukan',
                  })}
                  placeholder="cth: 300 PAX"
                />
                {errors.tiers?.[index]?.namaTier && (
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">
                    {errors.tiers[index].namaTier?.message}
                  </p>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="w-32">
                <Label htmlFor={`tiers.${index}.bilanganPax`}>
                  Bilangan Pax
                </Label>
                <Input
                  id={`tiers.${index}.bilanganPax`}
                  type="number"
                  {...register(`tiers.${index}.bilanganPax`, {
                    valueAsNumber: true,
                    required: 'Bilangan pax diperlukan',
                    min: { value: 0, message: 'Mestilah 0 atau lebih' },
                  })}
                  placeholder="0"
                />
                {errors.tiers?.[index]?.bilanganPax && (
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">
                    {errors.tiers[index].bilanganPax?.message}
                  </p>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="w-40">
                <Label htmlFor={`tiers.${index}.harga`}>Harga (RM)</Label>
                <Input
                  id={`tiers.${index}.harga`}
                  type="number"
                  step="0.01"
                  {...register(`tiers.${index}.harga`, {
                    valueAsNumber: true,
                    required: 'Harga diperlukan',
                    min: { value: 0, message: 'Mestilah 0 atau lebih' },
                  })}
                  placeholder="0.00"
                />
                {errors.tiers?.[index]?.harga && (
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">
                    {errors.tiers[index].harga?.message}
                  </p>
                )}
              </div>
              {tierFields.length > 1 && (
                <Button
                  type="button"
                  variant="danger"
                  size="sm"
                  onClick={() => removeTier(index)}
                >
                  Buang
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      {/* Sections */}
      <Card className="bg-white">
        <CardHeader>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">Seksyen</h2>
            <Button
              type="button"
              variant="secondary"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => appendSection({ tajuk: '', itemsText: '' })}
            >
              + Tambah Seksyen
            </Button>
          </div>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardBody className="space-y-4">
          {sectionFields.length === 0 && (
            <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">
              Tiada seksyen. Klik &quot;Tambah Seksyen&quot; untuk menambah.
            </p>
          )}
          {sectionFields.map((field, index) => (
            <div
              key={field.id}
              className="space-y-3 rounded border border-navy/10 p-3"
            >
              <div className="flex items-end gap-3">
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <Label htmlFor={`sections.${index}.tajuk`}>Tajuk</Label>
                  <Input
                    id={`sections.${index}.tajuk`}
                    {...register(`sections.${index}.tajuk`, {
                      required: 'Tajuk diperlukan',
                    })}
                    placeholder="cth: Menu Kenduri"
                  />
                  {errors.sections?.[index]?.tajuk && (
                    <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">
                      {errors.sections[index].tajuk?.message}
                    </p>
                  )}
                </div>
                <Button
                  type="button"
                  variant="danger"
                  size="sm"
                  onClick={() => removeSection(index)}
                >
                  Buang
                </Button>
              </div>
              <div>
                <Label htmlFor={`sections.${index}.itemsText`}>
                  Item (satu per baris)
                </Label>
                <Textarea
                  id={`sections.${index}.itemsText`}
                  {...register(`sections.${index}.itemsText`, {
                    required: 'Sekurang-kurangnya 1 item diperlukan',
                  })}
                  rows={5}
                  placeholder={
                    'Nasi Putih\nAyam Masak Merah\nDaging Rendang'
                  }
                />
                {errors.sections?.[index]?.itemsText && (
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">
                    {errors.sections[index].itemsText?.message}
                  </p>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      {/* Actions */}
      <div className="flex gap-3">
        <Button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting}>
          {isSubmitting
            ? 'Menyimpan...'
            : isEditing
              ? 'Kemaskini Pakej'
              : 'Tambah Pakej'}
        </Button>
        <Button
          type="button"
          variant="secondary"
          onClick={() => router.push('/admin/pakej')}
          disabled={isSubmitting}
        >
          Batal
        </Button>
      </div>
    </form>
  );
}

```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-20 12:07:11Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
} from '@/lib/api';
import { updatePakejSchema } from '@/lib/validations/pakej';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

function getIdFromContext(context: unknown): string {
  const ctx = context as { params: Promise<{ id: string }> };
  // params is a Promise in Next.js 16 — we await it in each handler
  return '' ; // placeholder; actual extraction is async
}

async function extractId(context: unknown): Promise<string> {
  const ctx = context as { params: Promise<{ id: string }> };
  const { id } = await ctx.params;
  return id;
}

export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (_req: NextRequest, context) => {
  const id = await extractId(context);

  const pakej = await prisma.pakej.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    include: {
      tiers: { orderBy: { createdAt: 'asc' } },
      sections: { orderBy: { createdAt: 'asc' } },
    },
  });

  if (!pakej) {
    return errorResponse('Pakej tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  return successResponse(pakej);
});

export const PUT = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context) => {
  const id = await extractId(context);
  const body: unknown = await req.json();
  const data = validateBody(updatePakejSchema, body);

  const pakej = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    // Verify pakej exists
    const existing = await tx.pakej.findUnique({ where: { id } });
    if (!existing) {
      throw new Error('NOT_FOUND');
    }

    // Delete existing tiers and sections
    await tx.pakejTier.deleteMany({ where: { pakejId: id } });
    await tx.pakejSection.deleteMany({ where: { pakejId: id } });

    // Update pakej and recreate tiers + sections
    const updated = await tx.pakej.update({
      where: { id },
      data: {
        namaPakej: data.namaPakej,
        warna: data.warna,
        tiers: {
          create: data.tiers.map((tier) => ({
            namaTier: tier.namaTier,
            bilanganPax: tier.bilanganPax,
            harga: tier.harga,
          })),
        },
        sections: {
          create: data.sections.map((section) => ({
            tajuk: section.tajuk,
            items: section.items,
          })),
        },
      },
      include: {
        tiers: true,
        sections: true,
      },
    });

    return updated;
  });

  return successResponse(pakej);
});

export const DELETE = withErrorHandling(async (_req: NextRequest, context) => {
  const id = await extractId(context);

  const pakej = await prisma.pakej.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    include: {
      _count: { select: { tempahan: true } },
    },
  });

  if (!pakej) {
    return errorResponse('Pakej tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  if (pakej._count.tempahan > 0) {
    return errorResponse(
      'Pakej tidak boleh dipadam kerana masih ada tempahan yang berkaitan',
      409,
    );
  }

  await prisma.pakej.delete({ where: { id } });

  return successResponse({ deleted: true });
});

```


<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
  createRateLimiter,
} from '@/lib/api';
import { updateSlotTempahanSchema } from '@/lib/validations/slot-tempahan';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
  interval: 60_000,
  maxRequests: 60,
});

export const PUT = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context?: unknown) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { id } = await (context as { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }).params;
  const body = await req.json();
  const validated = validateBody(updateSlotTempahanSchema, body);

  const existing = await prisma.slotTempahan.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    include: { tempahan: { select: { id: true } } },
  });

  if (!existing) {
    return errorResponse('Slot tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  // Cannot change status of a booked slot to TERSEDIA
  if (existing.status === 'DITEMPAH' && validated.status === 'TERSEDIA') {
    return errorResponse(
      'Tidak boleh menukar status slot yang telah ditempah kepada TERSEDIA',
      400,
    );
  }

  const updated = await prisma.slotTempahan.update({
    where: { id },
    data: { status: validated.status },
  });

  return successResponse(updated);
});

export const DELETE = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context?: unknown) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { id } = await (context as { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }).params;
  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
  const force = searchParams.get('force') === 'true';

  const existing = await prisma.slotTempahan.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    include: { tempahan: { select: { id: true } } },
  });

  if (!existing) {
    return errorResponse('Slot tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  if (existing.status === 'DITEMPAH' && !force) {
    return errorResponse(
      'Slot telah ditempah. Gunakan force=true untuk memadam.',
      400,
    );
  }

  await prisma.slotTempahan.delete({ where: { id } });

  return successResponse({ deleted: true });
});

```

---

**Slot Tempahan (Venue Booking Slot) Admin CRUD Module -- Complete**

### Files Created

1. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/lib/validations/slot-tempahan.ts`** -- Zod schemas for:
   - `createSlotTempahanSchema` (single date)
   - `bulkCreateSlotTempahanSchema` (startDate/endDate range with validation)
   - `updateSlotTempahanSchema` (status enum)

2. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/slot-tempahan/route.ts`** -- API routes:
   - GET: list slots for a month (`?month=YYYY-MM`), includes tempahan relation
   - POST single: `{ tarikh }` creates one slot (rejects duplicate dates)
   - POST bulk: `{ startDate, endDate }` creates one slot per day, skips existing dates, max 90 days

3. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/slot-tempahan/[id]/route.ts`** -- API routes:
   - PUT: update status (prevents DITEMPAH -> TERSEDIA)
   - DELETE: only TERSEDIA slots; DITEMPAH requires `?force=true`

4. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/slot-tempahan/page.tsx`** -- Admin page with calendar/list toggle

5. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/slot-tempahan/slot-tempahan-calendar.tsx`** -- Interactive monthly calendar grid:
   - 7-column grid with Malay day headers (Isn, Sel, Rab, Kha, Jum, Sab, Ahd)
   - Colour-coded slots (green=Tersedia, amber=Ditempah, red=Dibatalkan)
   - Click empty date to create slot, click existing slot for actions (update status, delete)
   - Month navigation, legend, SWR data fetching

6. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/slot-tempahan/slot-tempahan-list.tsx`** -- Table/list view:
   - Columns: Tarikh, Status, Tindakan
   - Status filter dropdown, client-side pagination
   - Month navigation, SWR data fetching

7. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/slot-tempahan/slot-tempahan-form.tsx`** -- Form component:
   - Toggle between single date and date range mode
   - Default date pre-fills when clicking an empty calendar cell
   - Info text about auto-skipping existing dates in range mode

All files pass `tsc --noEmit` with zero errors. Uses existing project patterns (rate limiting, `withErrorHandling`, `successResponse`/`errorResponse`, SWR, Modal, existing UI component variants).

Here is a summary of the Pakej admin CRUD module (task 6.7) implementation:

## Files Created (8 files)

### Zod Validation
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/lib/validations/pakej.ts` -- Schemas for `createPakejSchema` and `updatePakejSchema` with tier and section sub-schemas. Validates hex colour, min 1 tier, and string array items for sections.

### API Routes
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/pakej/route.ts` -- GET (list all with `_count` for tiers/sections/tempahan) + POST (create pakej with tiers + sections in a transaction). Uses `withErrorHandling` wrapper.
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/pakej/[id]/route.ts` -- GET (single with tiers+sections), PUT (update by deleting all existing tiers/sections then recreating in a transaction), DELETE (blocks deletion if `_count.tempahan > 0`). Uses `await extractId(context)` to handle Next.js 16's `Promise<params>` pattern.

### Admin Pages
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/pakej/page.tsx` -- Server component list page that queries Prisma directly and renders `PakejTable`.
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/pakej/baru/page.tsx` -- Create page rendering `PakejForm` with no initial data.
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/pakej/[id]/edit/page.tsx` -- Edit page that loads pakej from DB (with `await params` per Next.js 16), converts Decimal harga to Number, and passes `initialData` to `PakejForm`.

### Client Components
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/pakej/pakej-table.tsx` -- Table with columns: Nama Pakej (with tempahan badge), Warna (colour swatch + hex), Bilangan Tier, Gambar (thumbnail or "Tiada"), Tindakan (edit/delete). Delete uses confirmation modal and checks API response for tempahan conflict.
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/pakej/pakej-form.tsx` -- Full form used by both create and edit pages. Uses `react-hook-form` + `useFieldArray` for dynamic tiers (min 1) and sections. Colour picker is `<input type="color">` + hex text input + preview swatch. Section items use textarea (one item per line, converted to/from `string[]`). Gambar shows placeholder text ("Muat naik gambar akan ditambah kemudian").

### Key Technical Decisions
- `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` on both API route files
- Next.js 16 `params` is `Promise` -- used `await params` in pages and `extractId()` helper in API routes
- Used existing project conventions: `withErrorHandling` wrapper, `successResponse`/`errorResponse`, `validateBody`, Bahasa Malaysia error messages
- Button variants match existing UI components (`primary`, `secondary`, `danger`) -- no nonexistent `outline` variant
- Modal uses `isOpen` prop (matching the project's `Modal` component signature)
- TypeScript compiles cleanly with zero errors

### API Routes
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/pakej/route.ts` -- GET (list all with `_count` for tiers/sections/tempahan) + POST (create pakej with tiers + sections in a transaction). Uses `withErrorHandling` wrapper.
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/pakej/[id]/route.ts` -- GET (single with tiers+sections), PUT (update by deleting all existing tiers/sections then recreating in a transaction), DELETE (blocks deletion if `_count.tempahan &gt; 0`). Uses `await extractId(context)` to handle Next.js 16's `Promise&lt;params&gt;` pattern.

### Admin Pages
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/pakej/page.tsx` -- Server component list page that queries Prisma directly and renders `PakejTable`.
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/pakej/baru/page.tsx` -- Create page rendering `PakejForm` with no initial data.
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/pakej/[id]/edit/page.tsx` -- Edit page that loads pakej from DB (with `await params` per Next.js 16), converts Decimal harga to Number, and passes `initialData` to `PakejForm`.

### Client Components
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/pakej/pakej-table.tsx` -- Table with columns: Nama Pakej (with tempahan badge), Warna (colour swatch + hex), Bilangan Tier, Gambar (thumbnail or "Tiada"), Tindakan (edit/delete). Delete uses confirmation modal and checks API response for tempahan conflict.
- `/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/pakej/pakej-form.tsx` -- Full form used by both create and edit pages. Uses `react-hook-form` + `useFieldArray` for dynamic tiers (min 1) and sections. Colour picker is `&lt;input type="color"&gt;` + hex text input + preview swatch. Section items use textarea (one item per line, converted to/from `string[]`). Gambar shows placeholder text ("Muat naik gambar akan ditambah kemudian").

### Key Technical Decisions
- `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` on both API route files
- Next.js 16 `params` is `Promise` -- used `await params` in pages and `extractId()` helper in API routes
- Used existing project conventions: `withErrorHandling` wrapper, `successResponse`/`errorResponse`, `validateBody`, Bahasa Malaysia error messages
- Button variants match existing UI components (`primary`, `secondary`, `danger`) -- no nonexistent `outline` variant
- Modal uses `isOpen` prop (matching the project's `Modal` component signature)
- TypeScript compiles cleanly with zero errors</result>

You are working on the MawarBiru project at /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru. Build the Temujanji (Consultation Booking) admin management module (task 6.4).

IMPORTANT: This is Next.js 16. Check `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` if unsure about conventions. Params in route handlers and pages are `Promise<params>` — use `await params`.

## Context
- Admin layout and sidebar already exist with nav link to `/admin/temujanji`
- Prisma schema:
  - `Temujanji`: id, pelangganId, slotTemujanjiId (unique), nota (Text?), createdAt
  - Relations: pelanggan (Pelanggan), slotTemujanji (SlotTemujanji)
  - `Pelanggan`: id, nama, noTelefon
  - `SlotTemujanji`: id, tarikh (Date), masaMula, masaTamat, status (TERSEDIA/DITEMPAH/DIBATALKAN)
- Existing API helpers: `import { successResponse, errorResponse, withErrorHandling } from '@/lib/api'`
- Prisma: `import { prisma } from '@/lib/db'`
- UI: `import { Button, Card, CardHeader, CardBody, Badge, Modal, Input, Label } from '@/components/ui'`
- SWR available, react-hook-form available
- Slot Temujanji CRUD already exists at `/admin/slot-temujanji` with its own API routes

## Files to create

### 1. API Routes
**`app/api/admin/temujanji/route.ts`** — GET with pagination + search + filters
- Query params: `page`, `limit` (default 20), `search` (pelanggan nama or noTelefon), `status` (slot status filter), `dateFrom`, `dateTo`
- Include pelanggan and slotTemujanji relations
- Response: `{ data: temujanji[], meta: { total, page, limit } }`

**`app/api/admin/temujanji/[id]/route.ts`** — GET (single detail) + DELETE
- GET: include full pelanggan and slotTemujanji data
- DELETE: delete temujanji AND update linked SlotTemujanji status back to TERSEDIA (transaction)
- No create — visitors create temujanji via public page
- No update needed per spec

### 2. Admin Page
**`app/admin/temujanji/page.tsx`** — server component rendering client table

### 3. Client Components
**`components/admin/temujanji/temujanji-table.tsx`** — list table with:
- Columns: Pelanggan (Nama + No. Telefon), Tarikh, Masa (Mula - Tamat), Nota (truncated), Status, Tindakan
- Search input (searches pelanggan nama or phone)
- Filter by status dropdown, date range filter
- Pagination controls
- Delete action with confirmation
- Click row/view button to open detail modal

**`components/admin/temujanji/temujanji-detail.tsx`** — detail modal:
- Full pelanggan info (nama, noTelefon)
- Full slot info (tarikh, masaMula, masaTamat, status)
- Full nota text
- Delete button in the modal

### Technical notes
- Use SWR for data fetching
- Delete must revert slot status — the API handles this in a transaction
- Status badges: TERSEDIA=green, DITEMPAH=amber, DIBATALKAN=red
- `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` on API routes
- Standard rigor — functional, not fancy
- All UI text in Bahasa Malaysia

You are working on the MawarBiru project at /home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru. Build the Tempahan (Venue Booking) admin management module (task 6.6).

IMPORTANT: This is Next.js 16. Check `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` if unsure about conventions. Params in route handlers and pages are `Promise<params>` — use `await params`.

## Context
- Admin layout and sidebar exist with nav link to `/admin/tempahan`
- Prisma schema:
  - `Tempahan`: id, namaTempahan, slotTempahanId (unique), pakejId, pelangganId, nota (Text?), createdAt
  - Relations: slotTempahan (SlotTempahan), pakej (Pakej), pelanggan (Pelanggan)
  - `SlotTempahan`: id, tarikh (Date), status (TERSEDIA/DITEMPAH/DIBATALKAN)
  - `Pakej`: id, namaPakej, warna
  - `Pelanggan`: id, nama, noTelefon
- Existing modules:
  - Slot Tempahan API at `/api/admin/slot-tempahan` (GET by month, POST, PUT, DELETE)
  - Pakej API at `/api/admin/pakej` (GET list)
  - Pelanggan API at `/api/admin/pelanggan` (GET list with search)
- API helpers: `import { successResponse, errorResponse, withErrorHandling, validateBody } from '@/lib/api'`
- Prisma: `import { prisma } from '@/lib/db'`
- UI: `import { Button, Card, CardHeader, CardBody, Badge, Modal, Input, Label } from '@/components/ui'`
- SWR, react-hook-form, Zod available

## Files to create

### 1. Zod Validation
**`lib/validations/tempahan.ts`** — schemas for create/update
- Create: namaTempahan (required, 2-200 chars), slotTempahanId (required), pakejId (required), pelangganId (required), nota (optional, max 500)
- Update: namaTempahan, pakejId, pelangganId, nota (all optional)

### 2. API Routes
**`app/api/admin/tempahan/route.ts`** — GET (list with pagination, search, filters) + POST (create)
- GET: query params `page`, `limit`, `search` (namaTempahan or pelanggan nama), `pakejId`, `dateFrom`, `dateTo`
- Include slotTempahan, pakej, pelanggan relations
- POST: create tempahan + set SlotTempahan status to DITEMPAH (transaction)
  - Validate slot exists and is TERSEDIA before booking

**`app/api/admin/tempahan/[id]/route.ts`** — GET + PUT + DELETE
- GET: single with all relations
- PUT: update namaTempahan, pakejId, pelangganId, nota (NOT slot — can't change date)
- DELETE: delete tempahan + revert SlotTempahan to TERSEDIA (transaction)

### 3. Admin Page
**`app/admin/tempahan/page.tsx`** — server component rendering client components

### 4. Client Components
**`components/admin/tempahan/tempahan-table.tsx`** — list table:
- Columns: Nama Tempahan, Tarikh, Pakej (with colour dot), Pelanggan, Tindakan
- Search, filter by pakej, date range filter
- Pagination
- Edit/Delete actions

**`components/admin/tempahan/tempahan-form.tsx`** — create/edit form (in Modal):
- Nama Tempahan text input
- Pakej dropdown (fetched from `/api/admin/pakej`)
- Pelanggan searchable dropdown (fetched from `/api/admin/pelanggan?search=...` with debounce)
- Slot Tempahan: for create, pass in slotTempahanId from calendar click; for edit, show date read-only
- Nota textarea
- On create, a `slotTempahanId` prop is required (pre-selected from calendar)

**`components/admin/tempahan/tempahan-calendar.tsx`** — calendar view for creating bookings:
- Monthly calendar showing slot tempahan status
- Click TERSEDIA date → opens tempahan creation form with that slotTempahanId
- DITEMPAH dates show the tempahan name and pakej colour
- Month navigation
- Fetches slots from `/api/admin/slot-tempahan?month=YYYY-MM`
- Fetches tempahan for the month to overlay on calendar

### Technical notes
- Use SWR for all data fetching
- Use react-hook-form with Zod
- Pelanggan select: fetch results as user types (debounced), show nama + noTelefon
- Pakej select: simple dropdown, loaded once
- Calendar colour-coding: use pakej.warna as the dot/badge colour on booked dates
- Transactions for create/delete to keep slot status in sync
- `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` on API routes
- Standard rigor — functional, not fancy
- All UI text in Bahasa Malaysia

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	import {
4	  successResponse,
5	  errorResponse,
6	  withErrorHandling,
7	  validateBody,
8	  createRateLimiter,
9	} from '@/lib/api';
10	import {
11	  createSlotSchema,
12	  bulkCreateSlotSchema,
13	} from '@/lib/validations/slot-temujanji';
14	
15	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
16	
17	const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
18	  interval: 60_000,
19	  maxRequests: 60,
20	});
21	
22	export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
23	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
24	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
25	
26	  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
27	  const page = Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('page') ?? '1'));
28	  const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20')));
29	  const tarikh = searchParams.get('tarikh');
30	  const status = searchParams.get('status');
31	
32	  const where: Record<string, unknown> = {};
33	
34	  if (tarikh) {
35	    const date = new Date(tarikh);
36	    if (!isNaN(date.getTime())) {
37	      where.tarikh = date;
38	    }
39	  }
40	
41	  if (status && ['TERSEDIA', 'DITEMPAH', 'DIBATALKAN'].includes(status)) {
42	    where.status = status;
43	  }
44	
45	  const [slots, total] = await Promise.all([
46	    prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
47	      where,
48	      orderBy: [{ tarikh: 'desc' }, { masaMula: 'asc' }],
49	      skip: (page - 1) * limit,
50	      take: limit,
51	    }),
52	    prisma.slotTemujanji.count({ where }),
53	  ]);
54	
55	  return successResponse({ data: slots, meta: { total, page, limit } });
56	});
57	
58	export const POST = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
59	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
60	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
61	
62	  const body = await req.json();
63	
64	  // Determine if bulk or single create
65	  const isBulk = Array.isArray(body.slots);
66	
67	  if (isBulk) {
68	    const validated = validateBody(bulkCreateSlotSchema, body);
69	    const tarikh = new Date(validated.tarikh);
70	
71	    // Check for overlapping slots
72	    const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
73	      where: { tarikh, status: { not: 'DIBATALKAN' } },
74	      select: { masaMula: true, masaTamat: true },
75	    });
76	
77	    for (const slot of validated.slots) {
78	      const hasOverlap = existing.some(
79	        (e) => slot.masaMula < e.masaTamat && slot.masaTamat > e.masaMula,
80	      );
81	      if (hasOverlap) {
82	        return errorResponse(
83	          `Slot ${slot.masaMula} - ${slot.masaTamat} bertindih dengan slot sedia ada`,
84	          409,
85	        );
86	      }
87	    }
88	
89	    // Check for overlaps within the submitted batch
90	    for (let i = 0; i < validated.slots.length; i++) {
91	      for (let j = i + 1; j < validated.slots.length; j++) {
92	        const a = validated.slots[i];
93	        const b = validated.slots[j];
94	        if (a.masaMula < b.masaTamat && a.masaTamat > b.masaMula) {
95	          return errorResponse(
96	            `Slot ${a.masaMula} - ${a.masaTamat} bertindih dengan ${b.masaMula} - ${b.masaTamat}`,
97	            409,
98	          );
99	        }
100	      }
101	    }
102	
103	    const created = await prisma.slotTemujanji.createMany({
104	      data: validated.slots.map((s) => ({
105	        tarikh,
106	        masaMula: s.masaMula,
107	        masaTamat: s.masaTamat,
108	        status: 'TERSEDIA' as const,
109	      })),
110	    });
111	
112	    return successResponse({ count: created.count }, 201);
113	  }
114	
115	  // Single create
116	  const validated = validateBody(createSlotSchema, body);
117	  const tarikh = new Date(validated.tarikh);
118	
119	  // Check for overlapping slots
120	  const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
121	    where: { tarikh, status: { not: 'DIBATALKAN' } },
122	    select: { masaMula: true, masaTamat: true },
123	  });
124	
125	  const hasOverlap = existing.some(
126	    (e) => validated.masaMula < e.masaTamat && validated.masaTamat > e.masaMula,
127	  );
128	  if (hasOverlap) {
129	    return errorResponse('Slot bertindih dengan slot sedia ada', 409);
130	  }
131	
132	  const slot = await prisma.slotTemujanji.create({
133	    data: {
134	      tarikh,
135	      masaMula: validated.masaMula,
136	      masaTamat: validated.masaTamat,
137	      status: 'TERSEDIA',
138	    },
139	  });
140	
141	  return successResponse(slot, 201);
142	});
143
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/api/admin/slot-temujanji/[id]/route.ts`

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	import {
4	  successResponse,
5	  errorResponse,
6	  withErrorHandling,
7	  validateBody,
8	  createRateLimiter,
9	} from '@/lib/api';
10	import { updateSlotSchema } from '@/lib/validations/slot-temujanji';
11	
12	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
13	
14	const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
15	  interval: 60_000,
16	  maxRequests: 60,
17	});
18	
19	type RouteParams = { params: Promise<{ id: string }> };
20	
21	export const PUT = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context: unknown) => {
22	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
23	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
24	
25	  const { id } = await (context as RouteParams).params;
26	
27	  if (!id) {
28	    return errorResponse('ID diperlukan', 400);
29	  }
30	
31	  const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findUnique({ where: { id } });
32	  if (!existing) {
33	    return errorResponse('Slot tidak dijumpai', 404);
34	  }
35	
36	  if (existing.status !== 'TERSEDIA') {
37	    return errorResponse(
38	      'Hanya slot dengan status TERSEDIA boleh dikemaskini',
39	      400,
40	    );
41	  }
42	
43	  const body = await req.json();
44	  const validated = validateBody(updateSlotSchema, body);
45	
46	  const tarikh = validated.tarikh ? new Date(validated.tarikh) : existing.tarikh;
47	  const masaMula = validated.masaMula ?? existing.masaMula;
48	  const masaTamat = validated.masaTamat ?? existing.masaTamat;
49	
50	  // Validate masaTamat > masaMula after merging
51	  if (masaTamat <= masaMula) {
52	    return errorResponse('Masa tamat mestilah selepas masa mula', 400);
53	  }
54	
55	  // Check for overlapping slots (excluding this one)
56	  const others = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
57	    where: {
58	      tarikh,
59	      status: { not: 'DIBATALKAN' },
60	      id: { not: id },
61	    },
62	    select: { masaMula: true, masaTamat: true },
63	  });
64	
65	  const hasOverlap = others.some(
66	    (e) => masaMula < e.masaTamat && masaTamat > e.masaMula,
67	  );
68	  if (hasOverlap) {
69	    return errorResponse('Slot bertindih dengan slot sedia ada', 409);
70	  }
71	
72	  const updated = await prisma.slotTemujanji.update({
73	    where: { id },
74	    data: { tarikh, masaMula, masaTamat },
75	  });
76	
77	  return successResponse(updated);
78	});
79	
80	export const DELETE = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context: unknown) => {
81	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
82	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
83	
84	  const { id } = await (context as RouteParams).params;
85	
86	  if (!id) {
87	    return errorResponse('ID diperlukan', 400);
88	  }
89	
90	  const existing = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findUnique({ where: { id } });
91	  if (!existing) {
92	    return errorResponse('Slot tidak dijumpai', 404);
93	  }
94	
95	  if (existing.status === 'DITEMPAH') {
96	    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
97	    const force = searchParams.get('force');
98	    if (force !== 'true') {
99	      return errorResponse(
100	        'Slot ini telah ditempah. Gunakan force=true untuk memadamkan.',
101	        400,
102	      );
103	    }
104	  }
105	
106	  await prisma.slotTemujanji.delete({ where: { id } });
107	
108	  return successResponse({ deleted: true });
109	});
110
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	'use client';
2	
3	import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
4	import useSWR from 'swr';
5	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
6	import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
7	import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
8	import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
9	import { Card, CardBody } from '@/components/ui/card';
10	import { Spinner } from '@/components/ui/spinner';
11	import { Modal } from '@/components/ui/modal';
12	import { toast } from '@/components/ui/toast';
13	import { SlotTemujanjiForm } from './slot-temujanji-form';
14	
15	interface SlotTemujanji {
16	  id: string;
17	  tarikh: string;
18	  masaMula: string;
19	  masaTamat: string;
20	  status: 'TERSEDIA' | 'DITEMPAH' | 'DIBATALKAN';
21	  createdAt: string;
22	}
23	
24	interface ApiResponse {
25	  success: boolean;
26	  data: {
27	    data: SlotTemujanji[];
28	    meta: { total: number; page: number; limit: number };
29	  } | null;
30	  error: string | null;
31	}
32	
33	const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((r) => r.json());
34	
35	function formatTarikh(dateStr: string): string {
36	  const date = new Date(dateStr);
37	  return date.toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
38	    day: 'numeric',
39	    month: 'short',
40	    year: 'numeric',
41	  });
42	}
43	
44	function statusBadgeVariant(
45	  status: string,
46	): 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'default' {
47	  switch (status) {
48	    case 'TERSEDIA':
49	      return 'success';
50	    case 'DITEMPAH':
51	      return 'warning';
52	    case 'DIBATALKAN':
53	      return 'error';
54	    default:
55	      return 'default';
56	  }
57	}
58	
59	export function SlotTemujanjiTable() {
60	  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
61	  const [tarikh, setTarikh] = useState('');
62	  const [status, setStatus] = useState('');
63	  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
64	  const [editingSlot, setEditingSlot] = useState<SlotTemujanji | null>(null);
65	  const limit = 20;
66	
67	  const params = new URLSearchParams();
68	  params.set('page', String(page));
69	  params.set('limit', String(limit));
70	  if (tarikh) params.set('tarikh', tarikh);
71	  if (status) params.set('status', status);
72	
73	  const { data, error, isLoading, mutate } = useSWR<ApiResponse>(
74	    `/api/admin/slot-temujanji?${params.toString()}`,
75	    fetcher,
76	  );
77	
78	  const slots = data?.data?.data ?? [];
79	  const meta = data?.data?.meta ?? { total: 0, page: 1, limit };
80	  const totalPages = Math.ceil(meta.total / meta.limit);
81	
82	  const handleDelete = useCallback(
83	    async (slot: SlotTemujanji) => {
84	      const message =
85	        slot.status === 'DITEMPAH'
86	          ? 'Slot ini telah ditempah. Adakah anda pasti mahu memadamkan?'
87	          : 'Adakah anda pasti mahu memadamkan slot ini?';
88	
89	      if (!confirm(message)) return;
90	
91	      const force = slot.status === 'DITEMPAH' ? '?force=true' : '';
92	      const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/slot-temujanji/${slot.id}${force}`, {
93	        method: 'DELETE',
94	      });
95	      const result = await res.json();
96	
97	      if (result.success) {
98	        toast.success('Slot berjaya dipadamkan');
99	        mutate();
100	      } else {
101	        toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal memadamkan slot');
102	      }
103	    },
104	    [mutate],
105	  );
106	
107	  const handleEdit = useCallback((slot: SlotTemujanji) => {
108	    setEditingSlot(slot);
109	    setIsFormOpen(true);
110	  }, []);
111	
112	  const handleCreate = useCallback(() => {
113	    setEditingSlot(null);
114	    setIsFormOpen(true);
115	  }, []);
116	
117	  const handleFormClose = useCallback(() => {
118	    setIsFormOpen(false);
119	    setEditingSlot(null);
120	  }, []);
121	
122	  const handleFormSuccess = useCallback(() => {
123	    setIsFormOpen(false);
124	    setEditingSlot(null);
125	    mutate();
126	  }, [mutate]);
127	
128	  return (
129	    <>
130	      <Card className="bg-white">
131	        <CardBody>
132	          {/* Filters */}
133	          <div className="mb-6 flex flex-col gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-end">
134	            <div className="flex-1">
135	              <Label htmlFor="filter-tarikh">Cari mengikut tarikh</Label>
136	              <Input
137	                id="filter-tarikh"
138	                type="date"
139	                value={tarikh}
140	                onChange={(e) => {
141	                  setTarikh(e.target.value);
142	                  setPage(1);
143	                }}
144	              />
145	            </div>
146	            <div className="flex-1">
147	              <Label htmlFor="filter-status">Status</Label>
148	              <select
149	                id="filter-status"
150	                value={status}
151	                onChange={(e) => {
152	                  setStatus(e.target.value);
153	                  setPage(1);
154	                }}
155	                className="w-full rounded-button border border-navy/20 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-navy focus:border-dusty-rose focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-dusty-rose/20"
156	              >
157	                <option value="">Semua</option>
158	                <option value="TERSEDIA">Tersedia</option>
159	                <option value="DITEMPAH">Ditempah</option>
160	                <option value="DIBATALKAN">Dibatalkan</option>
161	              </select>
162	            </div>
163	            <div>
164	              <Button onClick={handleCreate}>Tambah Slot</Button>
165	            </div>
166	          </div>
167	
168	          {/* Table */}
169	          {isLoading ? (
170	            <div className="flex justify-center py-8">
171	              <Spinner />
172	            </div>
173	          ) : error ? (
174	            <p className="py-4 text-center text-red-600">
175	              Gagal memuatkan data
176	            </p>
177	          ) : slots.length === 0 ? (
178	            <p className="py-8 text-center text-navy/60">
179	              Tiada slot dijumpai.
180	            </p>
181	          ) : (
182	            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
183	              <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
184	                <thead>
185	                  <tr className="border-b border-navy/10">
186	                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
187	                      Tarikh
188	                    </th>
189	                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
190	                      Masa Mula
191	                    </th>
192	                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
193	                      Masa Tamat
194	                    </th>
195	                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
196	                      Status
197	                    </th>
198	                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
199	                      Tindakan
200	                    </th>
201	                  </tr>
202	                </thead>
203	                <tbody>
204	                  {slots.map((slot) => (
205	                    <tr
206	                      key={slot.id}
207	                      className="border-b border-navy/5 last:border-0"
208	                    >
209	                      <td className="px-3 py-3">{formatTarikh(slot.tarikh)}</td>
210	                      <td className="px-3 py-3">{slot.masaMula}</td>
211	                      <td className="px-3 py-3">{slot.masaTamat}</td>
212	                      <td className="px-3 py-3">
213	                        <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(slot.status)}>
214	                          {slot.status}
215	                        </Badge>
216	                      </td>
217	                      <td className="px-3 py-3">
218	                        <div className="flex gap-2">
219	                          {slot.status === 'TERSEDIA' && (
220	                            <Button
221	                              variant="ghost"
222	                              size="sm"
223	                              onClick={() => handleEdit(slot)}
224	                            >
225	                              Edit
226	                            </Button>
227	                          )}
228	                          <Button
229	                            variant="ghost"
230	                            size="sm"
231	                            onClick={() => handleDelete(slot)}
232	                          >
233	                            Padam
234	                          </Button>
235	                        </div>
236	                      </td>
237	                    </tr>
238	                  ))}
239	                </tbody>
240	              </table>
241	            </div>
242	          )}
243	
244	          {/* Pagination */}
245	          {totalPages > 1 && (
246	            <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-between">
247	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">
248	                Halaman {meta.page} daripada {totalPages} ({meta.total} rekod)
249	              </p>
250	              <div className="flex gap-2">
251	                <Button
252	                  variant="secondary"
253	                  size="sm"
254	                  disabled={page <= 1}
255	                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p - 1)}
256	                >
257	                  Sebelum
258	                </Button>
259	                <Button
260	                  variant="secondary"
261	                  size="sm"
262	                  disabled={page >= totalPages}
263	                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p + 1)}
264	                >
265	                  Seterusnya
266	                </Button>
267	              </div>
268	            </div>
269	          )}
270	        </CardBody>
271	      </Card>
272	
273	      {/* Form Modal */}
274	      <Modal
275	        isOpen={isFormOpen}
276	        onClose={handleFormClose}
277	        title={editingSlot ? 'Kemaskini Slot' : 'Tambah Slot Temujanji'}
278	        size="md"
279	      >
280	        <SlotTemujanjiForm
281	          slot={editingSlot}
282	          onSuccess={handleFormSuccess}
283	          onCancel={handleFormClose}
284	        />
285	      </Modal>
286	    </>
287	  );
288	}
289
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./app/api/admin/slot-tempahan/route.ts`

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	import {
4	  successResponse,
5	  errorResponse,
6	  withErrorHandling,
7	  validateBody,
8	  createRateLimiter,
9	} from '@/lib/api';
10	import {
11	  createSlotTempahanSchema,
12	  bulkCreateSlotTempahanSchema,
13	} from '@/lib/validations/slot-tempahan';
14	
15	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
16	
17	const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
18	  interval: 60_000,
19	  maxRequests: 60,
20	});
21	
22	export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
23	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
24	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
25	
26	  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
27	  const month = searchParams.get('month'); // YYYY-MM
28	
29	  if (!month || !/^\d{4}-\d{2}$/.test(month)) {
30	    return errorResponse('Parameter "month" diperlukan dalam format YYYY-MM', 400);
31	  }
32	
33	  const [year, monthNum] = month.split('-').map(Number);
34	  const startDate = new Date(Date.UTC(year, monthNum - 1, 1));
35	  const endDate = new Date(Date.UTC(year, monthNum, 1));
36	
37	  const slots = await prisma.slotTempahan.findMany({
38	    where: {
39	      tarikh: {
40	        gte: startDate,
41	        lt: endDate,
42	      },
43	    },
44	    orderBy: { tarikh: 'asc' },
45	    include: {
46	      tempahan: {
47	        select: { id: true, namaTempahan: true },
48	      },
49	    },
50	  });
51	
52	  return successResponse({ data: slots, meta: { total: slots.length } });
53	});
54	
55	export const POST = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
56	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
57	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
58	
59	  const body = await req.json();
60	
61	  // Determine if bulk (date range) or single create
62	  const isBulk = 'startDate' in body && 'endDate' in body;
63	
64	  if (isBulk) {
65	    const validated = validateBody(bulkCreateSlotTempahanSchema, body);
66	    const start = new Date(validated.startDate);
67	    const end = new Date(validated.endDate);
68	
69	    // Generate all dates in range
70	    const dates: Date[] = [];
71	    const current = new Date(start);
72	    while (current <= end) {
73	      dates.push(new Date(current));
74	      current.setDate(current.getDate() + 1);
75	    }
76	
77	    if (dates.length > 90) {
78	      return errorResponse('Julat tarikh tidak boleh melebihi 90 hari', 400);
79	    }
80	
81	    // Find existing slots in the date range to skip
82	    const existing = await prisma.slotTempahan.findMany({
83	      where: {
84	        tarikh: { gte: start, lte: end },
85	      },
86	      select: { tarikh: true },
87	    });
88	
89	    const existingDates = new Set(
90	      existing.map((s) => s.tarikh.toISOString().split('T')[0]),
91	    );
92	
93	    const newDates = dates.filter(
94	      (d) => !existingDates.has(d.toISOString().split('T')[0]),
95	    );
96	
97	    if (newDates.length === 0) {
98	      return successResponse({ count: 0, skipped: dates.length }, 200);
99	    }
100	
101	    const created = await prisma.slotTempahan.createMany({
102	      data: newDates.map((d: Date) => ({
103	        tarikh: d,
104	        status: 'TERSEDIA' as const,
105	      })),
106	    });
107	
108	    return successResponse(
109	      { count: created.count, skipped: dates.length - newDates.length },
110	      201,
111	    );
112	  }
113	
114	  // Single create
115	  const validated = validateBody(createSlotTempahanSchema, body);
116	  const tarikh = new Date(validated.tarikh);
117	
118	  // Check if slot already exists for this date
119	  const existing = await prisma.slotTempahan.findFirst({
120	    where: { tarikh },
121	  });
122	
123	  if (existing) {
124	    return errorResponse('Slot untuk tarikh ini sudah wujud', 409);
125	  }
126	
127	  const slot = await prisma.slotTempahan.create({
128	    data: {
129	      tarikh,
130	      status: 'TERSEDIA',
131	    },
132	  });
133	
134	  return successResponse(slot, 201);
135	});
136
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-20 12:10:03Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/api/admin/pelanggan/route.ts`

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	import {
4	  successResponse,
5	  errorResponse,
6	  withErrorHandling,
7	  validateBody,
8	} from '@/lib/api';
9	import { pelangganCreateSchema } from '@/lib/validations/pelanggan';
10	
11	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
12	
13	export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
14	  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
15	  const page = Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('page') ?? '1'));
16	  const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20')));
17	  const search = searchParams.get('search')?.trim() ?? '';
18	
19	  const where = search
20	    ? {
21	        OR: [
22	          { nama: { contains: search } },
23	          { noTelefon: { contains: search } },
24	        ],
25	      }
26	    : {};
27	
28	  const [pelanggan, total] = await Promise.all([
29	    prisma.pelanggan.findMany({
30	      where,
31	      include: {
32	        _count: { select: { temujanji: true, tempahan: true } },
33	      },
34	      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
35	      skip: (page - 1) * limit,
36	      take: limit,
37	    }),
38	    prisma.pelanggan.count({ where }),
39	  ]);
40	
41	  return successResponse({
42	    items: pelanggan,
43	    meta: { total, page, limit },
44	  });
45	});
46	
47	export const POST = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
48	  const body: unknown = await req.json();
49	  const data = validateBody(pelangganCreateSchema, body);
50	
51	  const noTelefonNormalized = data.noTelefon.replace(/-/g, '');
52	
53	  const existing = await prisma.pelanggan.findUnique({
54	    where: { noTelefon: noTelefonNormalized },
55	  });
56	
57	  if (existing) {
58	    return errorResponse(
59	      `Pelanggan dengan nombor telefon ${noTelefonNormalized} sudah wujud`,
60	      409,
61	    );
62	  }
63	
64	  const pelanggan = await prisma.pelanggan.create({
65	    data: {
66	      nama: data.nama,
67	      noTelefon: noTelefonNormalized,
68	      nota: data.nota ?? null,
69	    },
70	    include: {
71	      _count: { select: { temujanji: true, tempahan: true } },
72	    },
73	  });
74	
75	  return successResponse(pelanggan, 201);
76	});
77
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./prisma/schema.prisma`

```text
0	generator client {
1	  provider = "prisma-client-js"
2	}
3	
4	datasource db {
5	  provider = "mysql"
6	  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
7	}
8	
9	enum StatusSlot {
10	  TERSEDIA
11	  DITEMPAH
12	  DIBATALKAN
13	}
14	
15	model User {
16	  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
17	  email        String   @unique
18	  passwordHash String
19	  nama         String
20	  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
21	
22	  @@map("users")
23	}
24	
25	model Pelanggan {
26	  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
27	  nama      String
28	  noTelefon String   @unique
29	  nota      String?  @db.Text
30	  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
31	
32	  temujanji Temujanji[]
33	  tempahan  Tempahan[]
34	
35	  @@map("pelanggan")
36	}
37	
38	model SlotTemujanji {
39	  id        String     @id @default(cuid())
40	  tarikh    DateTime   @db.Date
41	  masaMula  String
42	  masaTamat String
43	  status    StatusSlot @default(TERSEDIA)
44	  createdAt DateTime   @default(now())
45	
46	  temujanji Temujanji?
47	
48	  @@map("slot_temujanji")
49	}
50	
51	model Temujanji {
52	  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
53	  pelangganId     String
54	  slotTemujanjiId String   @unique
55	  nota            String?  @db.Text
56	  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
57	
58	  pelanggan     Pelanggan     @relation(fields: [pelangganId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
59	  slotTemujanji SlotTemujanji @relation(fields: [slotTemujanjiId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
60	
61	  @@map("temujanji")
62	}
63	
64	model SlotTempahan {
65	  id        String     @id @default(cuid())
66	  tarikh    DateTime   @db.Date
67	  status    StatusSlot @default(TERSEDIA)
68	  createdAt DateTime   @default(now())
69	
70	  tempahan Tempahan?
71	
72	  @@map("slot_tempahan")
73	}
74	
75	model Tempahan {
76	  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
77	  namaTempahan   String
78	  slotTempahanId String   @unique
79	  pakejId        String
80	  pelangganId    String
81	  nota           String?  @db.Text
82	  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
83	
84	  slotTempahan SlotTempahan @relation(fields: [slotTempahanId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
85	  pakej        Pakej        @relation(fields: [pakejId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
86	  pelanggan    Pelanggan    @relation(fields: [pelangganId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
87	
88	  @@map("tempahan")
89	}
90	
91	model Pakej {
92	  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
93	  namaPakej String   @unique
94	  warna     String
95	  gambar    String?
96	  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
97	
98	  tiers    PakejTier[]
99	  sections PakejSection[]
```
</details></tool-use>
