<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./components/ui/modal.tsx`

```text
1	'use client';
2	
3	import {
4	  useEffect,
5	  useRef,
6	  useCallback,
7	  useId,
8	  type ReactNode,
9	  type KeyboardEvent,
10	} from 'react';
11	import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';
12	import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
13	
14	const sizeClasses = {
15	  sm: 'max-w-sm',
16	  md: 'max-w-lg',
17	  lg: 'max-w-2xl',
18	} as const;
19	
20	interface ModalProps {
21	  isOpen: boolean;
22	  onClose: () => void;
23	  title: string;
24	  children: ReactNode;
25	  size?: keyof typeof sizeClasses;
26	  'data-testid'?: string;
27	}
28	
29	function Modal({
30	  isOpen,
31	  onClose,
32	  title,
33	  children,
34	  size = 'md',
35	  ...props
36	}: ModalProps) {
37	  const titleId = useId();
38	  const dialogRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
39	  const previousFocusRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null);
40	
41	  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
42	    (e: KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
43	      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
44	        onClose();
45	        return;
46	      }
47	
48	      if (e.key === 'Tab') {
49	        const dialog = dialogRef.current;
50	        if (!dialog) return;
51	
52	        const focusable = dialog.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>(
53	          'a[href], button:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])',
54	        );
55	
56	        if (focusable.length === 0) {
57	          e.preventDefault();
58	          return;
59	        }
60	
61	        const first = focusable[0];
62	        const last = focusable[focusable.length - 1];
63	
64	        if (e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === first) {
65	          e.preventDefault();
66	          last.focus();
67	        } else if (!e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === last) {
68	          e.preventDefault();
69	          first.focus();
70	        }
71	      }
72	    },
73	    [onClose],
74	  );
75	
76	  useEffect(() => {
77	    if (isOpen) {
78	      previousFocusRef.current = document.activeElement as HTMLElement;
79	      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
80	
81	      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
82	        dialogRef.current?.focus();
83	      });
84	    }
85	
86	    return () => {
87	      document.body.style.overflow = '';
88	    };
89	  }, [isOpen]);
90	
91	  useEffect(() => {
92	    if (!isOpen && previousFocusRef.current) {
93	      previousFocusRef.current.focus();
94	      previousFocusRef.current = null;
95	    }
96	  }, [isOpen]);
97	
98	  if (!isOpen) return null;
99	
100	  return createPortal(
101	    <div
102	      className={cn(
103	        'fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4',
104	        'motion-safe:animate-[fadeIn_150ms_ease-out]',
105	      )}
106	      style={{ zIndex: 'var(--z-modal)' }}
107	    >
108	      {/* Backdrop */}
109	      <div
110	        className="absolute inset-0 bg-navy/50"
111	        onClick={onClose}
112	        aria-hidden="true"
113	      />
114	
115	      {/* Dialog */}
116	      <div
117	        ref={dialogRef}
118	        role="dialog"
119	        aria-modal="true"
120	        aria-labelledby={titleId}
121	        tabIndex={-1}
122	        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
123	        data-testid={props['data-testid']}
124	        className={cn(
125	          'relative w-full bg-cream rounded-card shadow-elevated',
126	          'p-6',
127	          'motion-safe:animate-[scaleIn_150ms_ease-out]',
128	          'focus:outline-none',
129	          sizeClasses[size],
130	        )}
131	      >
132	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
133	          <h2
134	            id={titleId}
135	            className="font-serif text-xl font-semibold text-navy"
136	          >
137	            {title}
138	          </h2>
139	          <button
140	            type="button"
141	            onClick={onClose}
142	            className={cn(
143	              'rounded-button p-1 text-navy/60 hover:text-navy',
144	              'transition-colors duration-150 motion-reduce:transition-none',
145	              'focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-dusty-rose',
146	            )}
147	            aria-label="Close"
148	          >
149	            <svg
150	              xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
151	              className="h-5 w-5"
152	              viewBox="0 0 20 20"
153	              fill="currentColor"
154	              aria-hidden="true"
155	            >
156	              <path
157	                fillRule="evenodd"
158	                d="M4.293 4.293a1 1 0 011.414 0L10 8.586l4.293-4.293a1 1 0 111.414 1.414L11.414 10l4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414 1.414L10 11.414l-4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414-1.414L8.586 10 4.293 5.707a1 1 0 010-1.414z"
159	                clipRule="evenodd"
160	              />
161	            </svg>
162	          </button>
163	        </div>
164	        <div>{children}</div>
165	      </div>
166	    </div>,
167	    document.body,
168	  );
169	}
170	
171	export { Modal };
172	export type { ModalProps };
173
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { z } from 'zod';
2	
3	const MALAYSIAN_PHONE_REGEX = /^(\+?60)?0?1[0-9]-?[0-9]{7,8}$/;
4	
5	export const pelangganCreateSchema = z.object({
6	  nama: z
7	    .string({ error: 'Nama diperlukan' })
8	    .min(2, 'Nama mestilah sekurang-kurangnya 2 aksara')
9	    .max(100, 'Nama mestilah tidak melebihi 100 aksara'),
10	  noTelefon: z
11	    .string({ error: 'No. telefon diperlukan' })
12	    .regex(
13	      MALAYSIAN_PHONE_REGEX,
14	      'Sila masukkan nombor telefon Malaysia yang sah (cth: 0121234567)',
15	    ),
16	  nota: z
17	    .string()
18	    .max(500, 'Nota mestilah tidak melebihi 500 aksara')
19	    .optional(),
20	});
21	
22	export const pelangganUpdateSchema = pelangganCreateSchema.partial();
23	
24	export type PelangganCreateInput = z.infer<typeof pelangganCreateSchema>;
25	export type PelangganUpdateInput = z.infer<typeof pelangganUpdateSchema>;
26
```

```text
1	'use client';
2	
3	import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
4	import useSWR from 'swr';
5	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
6	import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
7	import { Card, CardBody } from '@/components/ui/card';
8	import { PelangganForm } from './pelanggan-form';
9	import { PelangganDetail } from './pelanggan-detail';
10	
11	interface PelangganItem {
12	  readonly id: string;
13	  readonly nama: string;
14	  readonly noTelefon: string;
15	  readonly nota: string | null;
16	  readonly createdAt: string;
17	  readonly _count: {
18	    readonly temujanji: number;
19	    readonly tempahan: number;
20	  };
21	}
22	
23	interface PelangganListResponse {
24	  readonly success: boolean;
25	  readonly data: {
26	    readonly items: readonly PelangganItem[];
27	    readonly meta: {
28	      readonly total: number;
29	      readonly page: number;
30	      readonly limit: number;
31	    };
32	  } | null;
33	}
34	
35	const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((res) => res.json());
36	
37	function truncateText(text: string | null, maxLength: number): string {
38	  if (!text) return '-';
39	  if (text.length <= maxLength) return text;
40	  return `${text.slice(0, maxLength)}...`;
41	}
42	
43	export function PelangganTable() {
44	  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
45	  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
46	  const [debouncedSearch, setDebouncedSearch] = useState('');
47	  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
48	  const [editingPelanggan, setEditingPelanggan] = useState<PelangganItem | null>(null);
49	  const [detailId, setDetailId] = useState<string | null>(null);
50	
51	  const limit = 20;
52	  const params = new URLSearchParams({
53	    page: String(page),
54	    limit: String(limit),
55	    ...(debouncedSearch ? { search: debouncedSearch } : {}),
56	  });
57	
58	  const { data, mutate, isLoading } = useSWR<PelangganListResponse>(
59	    `/api/admin/pelanggan?${params.toString()}`,
60	    fetcher,
61	  );
62	
63	  const items = data?.data?.items ?? [];
64	  const meta = data?.data?.meta;
65	  const totalPages = meta ? Math.ceil(meta.total / meta.limit) : 0;
66	
67	  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
68	
69	  const handleSearchChange = useCallback(
70	    (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
71	      const value = e.target.value;
72	      setSearch(value);
73	
74	      if (debounceRef.current) {
75	        clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
76	      }
77	
78	      debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
79	        setDebouncedSearch(value);
80	        setPage(1);
81	      }, 300);
82	    },
83	    [],
84	  );
85	
86	  useEffect(() => {
87	    return () => {
88	      if (debounceRef.current) {
89	        clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
90	      }
91	    };
92	  }, []);
93	
94	  const handleFormClose = useCallback(() => {
95	    setShowForm(false);
96	    setEditingPelanggan(null);
97	  }, []);
98	
99	  const handleFormSuccess = useCallback(() => {
100	    handleFormClose();
101	    mutate();
102	  }, [handleFormClose, mutate]);
103	
104	  const handleEdit = useCallback((pelanggan: PelangganItem) => {
105	    setEditingPelanggan(pelanggan);
106	    setShowForm(true);
107	  }, []);
108	
109	  const handleDelete = useCallback(
110	    async (id: string) => {
111	      if (!confirm('Adakah anda pasti mahu memadam pelanggan ini?')) return;
112	
113	      const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/pelanggan/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
114	      const result = await res.json();
115	
116	      if (!result.success) {
117	        alert(result.error ?? 'Gagal memadam pelanggan');
118	        return;
119	      }
120	
121	      mutate();
122	    },
123	    [mutate],
124	  );
125	
126	  return (
127	    <>
128	      <Card className="bg-white">
129	        <CardBody>
130	          {/* Toolbar */}
131	          <div className="mb-4 flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
132	            <Input
133	              placeholder="Cari nama atau no. telefon..."
134	              value={search}
135	              onChange={handleSearchChange}
136	              className="w-full sm:max-w-xs"
137	            />
138	            <Button onClick={() => setShowForm(true)}>Tambah Pelanggan</Button>
139	          </div>
140	
141	          {/* Table */}
142	          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
143	            <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
144	              <thead>
145	                <tr className="border-b border-navy/10 text-navy/60">
146	                  <th className="px-3 py-2 font-medium">Nama</th>
147	                  <th className="px-3 py-2 font-medium">No. Telefon</th>
148	                  <th className="hidden px-3 py-2 font-medium md:table-cell">Nota</th>
149	                  <th className="px-3 py-2 font-medium text-center">Jml Temujanji</th>
150	                  <th className="px-3 py-2 font-medium text-center">Jml Tempahan</th>
151	                  <th className="px-3 py-2 font-medium">Tindakan</th>
152	                </tr>
153	              </thead>
154	              <tbody>
155	                {isLoading ? (
156	                  <tr>
157	                    <td colSpan={6} className="px-3 py-8 text-center text-navy/60">
158	                      Memuatkan...
159	                    </td>
160	                  </tr>
161	                ) : items.length === 0 ? (
162	                  <tr>
163	                    <td colSpan={6} className="px-3 py-8 text-center text-navy/60">
164	                      Tiada pelanggan dijumpai.
165	                    </td>
166	                  </tr>
167	                ) : (
168	                  items.map((item) => (
169	                    <tr key={item.id} className="border-b border-navy/5 hover:bg-navy/[0.02]">
170	                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5 font-medium text-navy">{item.nama}</td>
171	                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5 text-navy/80">{item.noTelefon}</td>
172	                      <td className="hidden px-3 py-2.5 text-navy/60 md:table-cell">
173	                        {truncateText(item.nota, 50)}
174	                      </td>
175	                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5 text-center text-navy/80">
176	                        {item._count.temujanji}
177	                      </td>
178	                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5 text-center text-navy/80">
179	                        {item._count.tempahan}
180	                      </td>
181	                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5">
182	                        <div className="flex gap-1">
183	                          <button
184	                            type="button"
185	                            onClick={() => setDetailId(item.id)}
186	                            className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs text-navy/70 hover:bg-navy/5"
187	                          >
188	                            Lihat
189	                          </button>
190	                          <button
191	                            type="button"
192	                            onClick={() => handleEdit(item)}
193	                            className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs text-navy/70 hover:bg-navy/5"
194	                          >
195	                            Edit
196	                          </button>
197	                          <button
198	                            type="button"
199	                            onClick={() => handleDelete(item.id)}
200	                            className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs text-red-600/70 hover:bg-red-50"
201	                          >
202	                            Padam
203	                          </button>
204	                        </div>
205	                      </td>
206	                    </tr>
207	                  ))
208	                )}
209	              </tbody>
210	            </table>
211	          </div>
212	
213	          {/* Pagination */}
214	          {totalPages > 1 && (
215	            <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
216	              <span className="text-navy/60">
217	                Halaman {page} daripada {totalPages} ({meta?.total ?? 0} rekod)
218	              </span>
219	              <div className="flex gap-2">
220	                <Button
221	                  variant="secondary"
222	                  size="sm"
223	                  disabled={page <= 1}
224	                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p - 1)}
225	                >
226	                  Sebelum
227	                </Button>
228	                <Button
229	                  variant="secondary"
230	                  size="sm"
231	                  disabled={page >= totalPages}
232	                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p + 1)}
233	                >
234	                  Seterusnya
235	                </Button>
236	              </div>
237	            </div>
238	          )}
239	        </CardBody>
240	      </Card>
241	
242	      {/* Form Modal */}
243	      {showForm && (
244	        <PelangganForm
245	          pelanggan={editingPelanggan}
246	          onClose={handleFormClose}
247	          onSuccess={handleFormSuccess}
248	        />
249	      )}
250	
251	      {/* Detail Modal */}
252	      {detailId && (
253	        <PelangganDetail
254	          pelangganId={detailId}
255	          onClose={() => setDetailId(null)}
256	        />
257	      )}
258	    </>
259	  );
260	}
261
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
15	
16	model User {

22	
23	  @@map("users")

47	  temujanji Temujanji?

56	  nota            String?  @db.Text
57	  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
58	
59	  pelanggan     Pelanggan     @relation(fields: [pelangganId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
60	  slotTemujanji SlotTemujanji @relation(fields: [slotTemujanjiId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
61	
62	  @@map("temujanji")

65	model SlotTempahan {

69	  createdAt DateTime   @default(now())
70	
71	  tempahan Tempahan?
72	
73	  @@map("slot_tempahan")

98
```

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./components/ui/modal.tsx`

```text
1	'use client';
2	
3	import {
4	  useEffect,
5	  useRef,
6	  useCallback,
7	  useId,
8	  type ReactNode,
9	  type KeyboardEvent,
10	} from 'react';
11	import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';
12	import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
13	
14	const sizeClasses = {
15	  sm: 'max-w-sm',
16	  md: 'max-w-lg',
17	  lg: 'max-w-2xl',
18	} as const;
19	
20	interface ModalProps {
21	  isOpen: boolean;
22	  onClose: () => void;
23	  title: string;
24	  children: ReactNode;
25	  size?: keyof typeof sizeClasses;
26	  'data-testid'?: string;
27	}
28	
29	function Modal({
30	  isOpen,
31	  onClose,
32	  title,
33	  children,
34	  size = 'md',
35	  ...props
36	}: ModalProps) {
37	  const titleId = useId();
38	  const dialogRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
39	  const previousFocusRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null);
40	
41	  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
42	    (e: KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
43	      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
44	        onClose();
45	        return;
46	      }
47	
48	      if (e.key === 'Tab') {
49	        const dialog = dialogRef.current;
50	        if (!dialog) return;
51	
52	        const focusable = dialog.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>(
53	          'a[href], button:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])',
54	        );
55	
56	        if (focusable.length === 0) {
57	          e.preventDefault();
58	          return;
59	        }
60	
61	        const first = focusable[0];
62	        const last = focusable[focusable.length - 1];
63	
64	        if (e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === first) {
65	          e.preventDefault();
66	          last.focus();
67	        } else if (!e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === last) {
68	          e.preventDefault();
69	          first.focus();
70	        }
71	      }
72	    },
73	    [onClose],
74	  );
75	
76	  useEffect(() => {
77	    if (isOpen) {
78	      previousFocusRef.current = document.activeElement as HTMLElement;
79	      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
80	
81	      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
82	        dialogRef.current?.focus();
83	      });
84	    }
85	
86	    return () => {
87	      document.body.style.overflow = '';
88	    };
89	  }, [isOpen]);
90	
91	  useEffect(() => {
92	    if (!isOpen && previousFocusRef.current) {
93	      previousFocusRef.current.focus();
94	      previousFocusRef.current = null;
95	    }
96	  }, [isOpen]);
97	
98	  if (!isOpen) return null;
99	
100	  return createPortal(
101	    <div
102	      className={cn(
103	        'fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4',
104	        'motion-safe:animate-[fadeIn_150ms_ease-out]',
105	      )}
106	      style={{ zIndex: 'var(--z-modal)' }}
107	    >
108	      {/* Backdrop */}
109	      <div
110	        className="absolute inset-0 bg-navy/50"
111	        onClick={onClose}
112	        aria-hidden="true"
113	      />
114	
115	      {/* Dialog */}
116	      <div
117	        ref={dialogRef}
118	        role="dialog"
119	        aria-modal="true"
120	        aria-labelledby={titleId}
121	        tabIndex={-1}
122	        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
123	        data-testid={props['data-testid']}
124	        className={cn(
125	          'relative w-full bg-cream rounded-card shadow-elevated',
126	          'p-6',
127	          'motion-safe:animate-[scaleIn_150ms_ease-out]',
128	          'focus:outline-none',
129	          sizeClasses[size],
130	        )}
131	      >
132	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
133	          <h2
134	            id={titleId}
135	            className="font-serif text-xl font-semibold text-navy"
136	          >
137	            {title}
138	          </h2>
139	          <button
140	            type="button"
141	            onClick={onClose}
142	            className={cn(
143	              'rounded-button p-1 text-navy/60 hover:text-navy',
144	              'transition-colors duration-150 motion-reduce:transition-none',
145	              'focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-dusty-rose',
146	            )}
147	            aria-label="Close"
148	          >
149	            <svg
150	              xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
151	              className="h-5 w-5"
152	              viewBox="0 0 20 20"
153	              fill="currentColor"
154	              aria-hidden="true"
155	            >
156	              <path
157	                fillRule="evenodd"
158	                d="M4.293 4.293a1 1 0 011.414 0L10 8.586l4.293-4.293a1 1 0 111.414 1.414L11.414 10l4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414 1.414L10 11.414l-4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414-1.414L8.586 10 4.293 5.707a1 1 0 010-1.414z"
159	                clipRule="evenodd"
160	              />
161	            </svg>
162	          </button>
163	        </div>
164	        <div>{children}</div>
165	      </div>
166	    </div>,
167	    document.body,
168	  );
169	}
170	
171	export { Modal };
172	export type { ModalProps };
173
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./components/admin/pelanggan/pelanggan-form.tsx`

```text
1	'use client';
2	
3	import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
4	import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod';
5	import { Modal } from '@/components/ui/modal';
6	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
7	import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
8	import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
9	import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
10	import {
11	  pelangganCreateSchema,
12	  type PelangganCreateInput,
13	} from '@/lib/validations/pelanggan';
14	import { useState } from 'react';
15	
16	interface PelangganData {
17	  readonly id: string;
18	  readonly nama: string;
19	  readonly noTelefon: string;
20	  readonly nota: string | null;
21	}
22	
23	interface PelangganFormProps {
24	  readonly pelanggan: PelangganData | null;
25	  readonly onClose: () => void;
26	  readonly onSuccess: () => void;
27	}
28	
29	export function PelangganForm({ pelanggan, onClose, onSuccess }: PelangganFormProps) {
30	  const [serverError, setServerError] = useState<string | null>(null);
31	  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
32	  const isEditing = pelanggan !== null;
33	
34	  const {
35	    register,
36	    handleSubmit,
37	    formState: { errors },
38	  } = useForm<PelangganCreateInput>({
39	    resolver: zodResolver(pelangganCreateSchema),
40	    defaultValues: {
41	      nama: pelanggan?.nama ?? '',
42	      noTelefon: pelanggan?.noTelefon ?? '',
43	      nota: pelanggan?.nota ?? '',
44	    },
45	  });
46	
47	  const onSubmit = async (data: PelangganCreateInput) => {
48	    setServerError(null);
49	    setIsSubmitting(true);
50	
51	    try {
52	      const url = isEditing
53	        ? `/api/admin/pelanggan/${pelanggan.id}`
54	        : '/api/admin/pelanggan';
55	      const method = isEditing ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
56	
57	      const res = await fetch(url, {
58	        method,
59	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
60	        body: JSON.stringify(data),
61	      });
62	
63	      const result = await res.json();
64	
65	      if (!result.success) {
66	        setServerError(result.error ?? 'Ralat berlaku');
67	        return;
68	      }
69	
70	      onSuccess();
71	    } catch {
72	      setServerError('Ralat rangkaian. Sila cuba lagi.');
73	    } finally {
74	      setIsSubmitting(false);
75	    }
76	  };
77	
78	  return (
79	    <Modal
80	      isOpen
81	      onClose={onClose}
82	      title={isEditing ? 'Edit Pelanggan' : 'Tambah Pelanggan'}
83	    >
84	      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-4">
85	        <div>
86	          <Label htmlFor="nama">Nama</Label>
87	          <Input
88	            id="nama"
89	            placeholder="Nama pelanggan"
90	            {...register('nama')}
91	          />
92	          {errors.nama && (
93	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.nama.message}</p>
94	          )}
95	        </div>
96	
97	        <div>
98	          <Label htmlFor="noTelefon">No. Telefon</Label>
99	          <Input
100	            id="noTelefon"
101	            placeholder="0121234567"
102	            {...register('noTelefon')}
103	          />
104	          {errors.noTelefon && (
105	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.noTelefon.message}</p>
106	          )}
107	        </div>
108	
109	        <div>
110	          <Label htmlFor="nota">Nota</Label>
111	          <Textarea
112	            id="nota"
113	            placeholder="Nota tambahan (pilihan)"
114	            rows={3}
115	            {...register('nota')}
116	          />
117	          {errors.nota && (
118	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.nota.message}</p>
119	          )}
120	        </div>
121	
122	        {serverError && (
123	          <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{serverError}</p>
124	        )}
125	
126	        <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-2">
127	          <Button type="button" variant="secondary" onClick={onClose}>
128	            Batal
129	          </Button>
130	          <Button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting}>
131	            {isSubmitting ? 'Menyimpan...' : isEditing ? 'Kemaskini' : 'Simpan'}
132	          </Button>
133	        </div>
134	      </form>
135	    </Modal>
136	  );
137	}
138
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./components/admin/slot-tempahan/slot-tempahan-calendar.tsx`

```text
1	'use client';
2	
3	import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
4	import useSWR from 'swr';
5	import { Card, CardBody, Badge, Modal, Button } from '@/components/ui';
6	import { SlotTempahanForm } from './slot-tempahan-form';
7	import { toast } from '@/components/ui';
8	
9	interface SlotTempahan {
10	  readonly id: string;
11	  readonly tarikh: string;
12	  readonly status: 'TERSEDIA' | 'DITEMPAH' | 'DIBATALKAN';
13	  readonly tempahan?: { readonly id: string; readonly namaTempahan: string } | null;
14	}
15	
16	interface ApiResponse {
17	  readonly success: boolean;
18	  readonly data: {
19	    readonly data: readonly SlotTempahan[];
20	    readonly meta: { readonly total: number };
21	  } | null;
22	}
23	
24	const DAY_HEADERS = ['Isn', 'Sel', 'Rab', 'Kha', 'Jum', 'Sab', 'Ahd'] as const;
25	
26	const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((r) => r.json());
27	
28	function formatMonth(year: number, month: number): string {
29	  return `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
30	}
31	
32	function getMonthLabel(year: number, month: number): string {
33	  const date = new Date(year, month, 1);
34	  return date.toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
35	}
36	
37	function getCalendarDays(year: number, month: number): (number | null)[] {
38	  const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
39	  // Convert Sunday=0 to Monday-start: Mon=0, Sun=6
40	  const startOffset = firstDay === 0 ? 6 : firstDay - 1;
41	  const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
42	
43	  const days: (number | null)[] = [];
44	
45	  // Fill leading empty cells
46	  for (let i = 0; i < startOffset; i++) {
47	    days.push(null);
48	  }
49	
50	  // Fill actual days
51	  for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
52	    days.push(d);
53	  }
54	
55	  return days;
56	}
57	
58	function statusBadgeVariant(status: string): 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' {
59	  switch (status) {
60	    case 'TERSEDIA':
61	      return 'success';
62	    case 'DITEMPAH':
63	      return 'warning';
64	    case 'DIBATALKAN':
65	      return 'error';
66	    default:
67	      return 'success';
68	  }
69	}
70	
71	function statusBgClass(status: string): string {
72	  switch (status) {
73	    case 'TERSEDIA':
74	      return 'bg-green-100 border-green-300 hover:bg-green-200';
75	    case 'DITEMPAH':
76	      return 'bg-amber-100 border-amber-300 hover:bg-amber-200';
77	    case 'DIBATALKAN':
78	      return 'bg-red-100 border-red-300 hover:bg-red-200';
79	    default:
80	      return '';
81	  }
82	}
83	
84	export function SlotTempahanCalendar() {
85	  const now = new Date();
86	  const [year, setYear] = useState(now.getFullYear());
87	  const [month, setMonth] = useState(now.getMonth());
88	  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
89	  const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState<string | null>(null);
90	  const [selectedSlot, setSelectedSlot] = useState<SlotTempahan | null>(null);
91	  const [showSlotModal, setShowSlotModal] = useState(false);
92	
93	  const monthParam = formatMonth(year, month);
94	
95	  const { data, mutate, isLoading } = useSWR<ApiResponse>(
96	    `/api/admin/slot-tempahan?month=${monthParam}`,
97	    fetcher,
98	  );
99	
100	  const slots = data?.data?.data ?? [];
101	
102	  const slotsByDay = new Map<number, SlotTempahan>();
103	  for (const slot of slots) {
104	    const day = new Date(slot.tarikh).getUTCDate();
105	    slotsByDay.set(day, slot);
106	  }
107	
108	  const calendarDays = getCalendarDays(year, month);
109	
110	  const goToPrevMonth = useCallback(() => {
111	    if (month === 0) {
112	      setYear((y) => y - 1);
113	      setMonth(11);
114	    } else {
115	      setMonth((m) => m - 1);
116	    }
117	  }, [month]);
118	
119	  const goToNextMonth = useCallback(() => {
120	    if (month === 11) {
121	      setYear((y) => y + 1);
122	      setMonth(0);
123	    } else {
124	      setMonth((m) => m + 1);
125	    }
126	  }, [month]);
127	
128	  const handleDayClick = (day: number) => {
129	    const slot = slotsByDay.get(day);
130	    if (slot) {
131	      setSelectedSlot(slot);
132	      setShowSlotModal(true);
133	    } else {
134	      const dateStr = `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(day).padStart(2, '0')}`;
135	      setSelectedDate(dateStr);
136	      setShowForm(true);
137	    }
138	  };
139	
140	  const handleUpdateStatus = async (id: string, status: string) => {
141	    const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/slot-tempahan/${id}`, {
142	      method: 'PUT',
143	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
144	      body: JSON.stringify({ status }),
145	    });
146	    const result = await res.json();
147	    if (result.success) {
148	      toast.success('Status berjaya dikemaskini');
149	      setShowSlotModal(false);
150	      setSelectedSlot(null);
151	      mutate();
152	    } else {
153	      toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal mengemaskini status');
154	    }
155	  };
156	
157	  const handleDelete = async (id: string, force = false) => {
158	    const url = force
159	      ? `/api/admin/slot-tempahan/${id}?force=true`
160	      : `/api/admin/slot-tempahan/${id}`;
161	    const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'DELETE' });
162	    const result = await res.json();
163	    if (result.success) {
164	      toast.success('Slot berjaya dipadam');
165	      setShowSlotModal(false);
166	      setSelectedSlot(null);
167	      mutate();
168	    } else {
169	      toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal memadam slot');
170	    }
171	  };
172	
173	  const handleFormSuccess = () => {
174	    setShowForm(false);
175	    setSelectedDate(null);
176	    mutate();
177	  };
178	
179	  return (
180	    <>
181	      <Card className="bg-white">
182	        <CardBody>
183	          {/* Month navigation */}
184	          <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
185	            <button
186	              type="button"
187	              onClick={goToPrevMonth}
188	              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
189	              aria-label="Bulan sebelumnya"
190	            >
191	              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
192	                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15.75 19.5 8.25 12l7.5-7.5" />
193	              </svg>
194	            </button>
195	            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
196	              {getMonthLabel(year, month)}
197	            </h2>
198	            <button
199	              type="button"
200	              onClick={goToNextMonth}
201	              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
202	              aria-label="Bulan seterusnya"
203	            >
204	              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
205	                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
206	              </svg>
207	            </button>
208	          </div>
209	
210	          {/* Add bulk button */}
211	          <div className="mb-4 flex justify-end">
212	            <Button
213	              size="sm"
214	              onClick={() => {
215	                setSelectedDate(null);
216	                setShowForm(true);
217	              }}
218	            >
219	              + Tambah Slot
220	            </Button>
221	          </div>
222	
223	          {/* Calendar grid */}
224	          {isLoading ? (
225	            <div className="flex h-64 items-center justify-center">
226	              <p className="text-navy/60">Memuatkan...</p>
227	            </div>
228	          ) : (
229	            <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-1">
230	              {/* Day headers */}
231	              {DAY_HEADERS.map((day) => (
232	                <div
233	                  key={day}
234	                  className="py-2 text-center text-xs font-semibold text-navy/60"
235	                >
236	                  {day}
237	                </div>
238	              ))}
239	
240	              {/* Day cells */}
241	              {calendarDays.map((day, idx) => {
242	                if (day === null) {
243	                  return <div key={`empty-${idx}`} className="aspect-square" />;
244	                }
245	
246	                const slot = slotsByDay.get(day);
247	                const hasSlot = Boolean(slot);
248	
249	                return (
250	                  <button
251	                    key={day}
252	                    type="button"
253	                    onClick={() => handleDayClick(day)}
254	                    className={`aspect-square rounded-md border p-1 text-xs transition-colors ${
255	                      hasSlot
256	                        ? statusBgClass(slot!.status)
257	                        : 'border-navy/10 bg-gray-50 hover:bg-navy/5'
258	                    }`}
259	                  >
260	                    <span className="block font-medium text-navy">{day}</span>
261	                    {hasSlot && (
262	                      <span className="mt-0.5 block truncate text-[10px]">
263	                        {slot!.status === 'TERSEDIA' ? 'Buka' : slot!.status === 'DITEMPAH' ? 'Tempah' : 'Batal'}
264	                      </span>
265	                    )}
266	                  </button>
267	                );
268	              })}
269	            </div>
270	          )}
271	
272	          {/* Legend */}
273	          <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-4 border-t border-navy/10 pt-3">
274	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
275	              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-green-300 bg-green-100" />
276	              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Tersedia</span>
277	            </div>
278	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
279	              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-amber-300 bg-amber-100" />
280	              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Ditempah</span>
281	            </div>
282	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
283	              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-red-300 bg-red-100" />
284	              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Dibatalkan</span>
285	            </div>
286	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
287	              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-navy/10 bg-gray-50" />
288	              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Tiada slot</span>
289	            </div>
290	          </div>
291	        </CardBody>
292	      </Card>
293	
294	      {/* Create slot modal */}
295	      <Modal
296	        isOpen={showForm}
297	        onClose={() => {
298	          setShowForm(false);
299	          setSelectedDate(null);
300	        }}
301	        title="Tambah Slot Tempahan"
302	      >
303	        <SlotTempahanForm
304	          defaultDate={selectedDate}
305	          onSuccess={handleFormSuccess}
306	          onCancel={() => {
307	            setShowForm(false);
308	            setSelectedDate(null);
309	          }}
310	        />
311	      </Modal>
312	
313	      {/* Slot detail/actions modal */}
314	      <Modal
315	        isOpen={showSlotModal}
316	        onClose={() => {
317	          setShowSlotModal(false);
318	          setSelectedSlot(null);
319	        }}
320	        title="Slot Tempahan"
321	        size="sm"
322	      >
323	        {selectedSlot && (
324	          <div className="space-y-4">
325	            <div>
326	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tarikh</p>
327	              <p className="font-medium text-navy">
328	                {new Date(selectedSlot.tarikh).toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
329	                  weekday: 'long',
330	                  day: 'numeric',
331	                  month: 'long',
332	                  year: 'numeric',
333	                })}
334	              </p>
335	            </div>
336	            <div>
337	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Status</p>
338	              <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(selectedSlot.status)}>
339	                {selectedSlot.status}
340	              </Badge>
341	            </div>
342	            {selectedSlot.tempahan && (
343	              <div>
344	                <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tempahan</p>
345	                <p className="font-medium text-navy">
346	                  {selectedSlot.tempahan.namaTempahan}
347	                </p>
348	              </div>
349	            )}
350	
351	            {/* Actions */}
352	            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 border-t border-navy/10 pt-4">
353	              {selectedSlot.status === 'TERSEDIA' && (
354	                <Button
355	                  size="sm"
356	                  variant="secondary"
357	                  onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(selectedSlot.id, 'DIBATALKAN')}
358	                >
359	                  Batalkan
360	                </Button>
361	              )}
362	              {selectedSlot.status === 'DIBATALKAN' && (
363	                <Button
364	                  size="sm"
365	                  variant="secondary"
366	                  onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(selectedSlot.id, 'TERSEDIA')}
367	                >
368	                  Aktifkan Semula
369	                </Button>
370	              )}
371	              <Button
372	                size="sm"
373	                variant="secondary"
374	                onClick={() =>
375	                  handleDelete(selectedSlot.id, selectedSlot.status === 'DITEMPAH')
376	                }
377	                className="text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50"
378	              >
379	                {selectedSlot.status === 'DITEMPAH' ? 'Padam (Paksa)' : 'Padam'}
380	              </Button>
381	            </div>
382	          </div>
383	        )}
384	      </Modal>
385	    </>
386	  );
387	}
```

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  createRateLimiter,
} from '@/lib/api';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
  interval: 60_000,
  maxRequests: 60,
});

export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
  const page = Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('page') ?? '1'));
  const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20')));
  const search = searchParams.get('search')?.trim() ?? '';
  const status = searchParams.get('status') ?? '';
  const dateFrom = searchParams.get('dateFrom') ?? '';
  const dateTo = searchParams.get('dateTo') ?? '';

  const where: Record<string, unknown> = {};

  if (search) {
    where.pelanggan = {
      OR: [
        { nama: { contains: search } },
        { noTelefon: { contains: search } },
      ],
    };
  }

  if (status && ['TERSEDIA', 'DITEMPAH', 'DIBATALKAN'].includes(status)) {
    where.slotTemujanji = {
      ...((where.slotTemujanji as Record<string, unknown>) ?? {}),
      status,
    };
  }

  if (dateFrom || dateTo) {
    const slotFilter = (where.slotTemujanji as Record<string, unknown>) ?? {};
    const tarikhFilter: Record<string, Date> = {};

    if (dateFrom) {
      const from = new Date(dateFrom);
      if (!isNaN(from.getTime())) {
        tarikhFilter.gte = from;
      }
    }

    if (dateTo) {
      const to = new Date(dateTo);
      if (!isNaN(to.getTime())) {
        tarikhFilter.lte = to;
      }
    }

    if (Object.keys(tarikhFilter).length > 0) {
      slotFilter.tarikh = tarikhFilter;
      where.slotTemujanji = slotFilter;
    }
  }

  const [temujanjiList, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.temujanji.findMany({
      where,
      include: {
        pelanggan: true,
        slotTemujanji: true,
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      skip: (page - 1) * limit,
      take: limit,
    }),
    prisma.temujanji.count({ where }),
  ]);

  return successResponse({ data: temujanjiList, meta: { total, page, limit } });
});

```


```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  createRateLimiter,
} from '@/lib/api';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
  interval: 60_000,
  maxRequests: 60,
});

type RouteParams = { params: Promise<{ id: string }> };

export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context: unknown) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { id } = await (context as RouteParams).params;

  if (!id) {
    return errorResponse('ID diperlukan', 400);
  }

  const temujanji = await prisma.temujanji.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    include: {
      pelanggan: true,
      slotTemujanji: true,
    },
  });

  if (!temujanji) {
    return errorResponse('Temujanji tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  return successResponse(temujanji);
});

export const DELETE = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest, context: unknown) => {
  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;

  const { id } = await (context as RouteParams).params;

  if (!id) {
    return errorResponse('ID diperlukan', 400);
  }

  const temujanji = await prisma.temujanji.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    include: { slotTemujanji: true },
  });

  if (!temujanji) {
    return errorResponse('Temujanji tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  await prisma.$transaction([
    prisma.temujanji.delete({ where: { id } }),
    prisma.slotTemujanji.update({
      where: { id: temujanji.slotTemujanjiId },
      data: { status: 'TERSEDIA' },
    }),
  ]);

  return successResponse({ deleted: true });
});

```


```typescript
import { z } from 'zod';

export const tempahanCreateSchema = z.object({
  namaTempahan: z
    .string({ error: 'Nama tempahan diperlukan' })
    .min(2, 'Nama tempahan mestilah sekurang-kurangnya 2 aksara')
    .max(200, 'Nama tempahan mestilah tidak melebihi 200 aksara'),
  slotTempahanId: z
    .string({ error: 'Slot tempahan diperlukan' })
    .min(1, 'Slot tempahan diperlukan'),
  pakejId: z
    .string({ error: 'Pakej diperlukan' })
    .min(1, 'Pakej diperlukan'),
  pelangganId: z
    .string({ error: 'Pelanggan diperlukan' })
    .min(1, 'Pelanggan diperlukan'),
  nota: z
    .string()
    .max(500, 'Nota mestilah tidak melebihi 500 aksara')
    .optional(),
});

export const tempahanUpdateSchema = z.object({
  namaTempahan: z
    .string()
    .min(2, 'Nama tempahan mestilah sekurang-kurangnya 2 aksara')
    .max(200, 'Nama tempahan mestilah tidak melebihi 200 aksara')
    .optional(),
  pakejId: z.string().min(1, 'Pakej diperlukan').optional(),
  pelangganId: z.string().min(1, 'Pelanggan diperlukan').optional(),
  nota: z
    .string()
    .max(500, 'Nota mestilah tidak melebihi 500 aksara')
    .nullable()
    .optional(),
});

export type TempahanCreateInput = z.infer<typeof tempahanCreateSchema>;
export type TempahanUpdateInput = z.infer<typeof tempahanUpdateSchema>;
```

```tsx
'use client';

import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { toast } from '@/components/ui/toast';

interface Pelanggan {
  id: string;
  nama: string;
  noTelefon: string;
}

interface SlotTemujanji {
  id: string;
  tarikh: string;
  masaMula: string;
  masaTamat: string;
  status: 'TERSEDIA' | 'DITEMPAH' | 'DIBATALKAN';
}

interface Temujanji {
  id: string;
  nota: string | null;
  createdAt: string;
  pelanggan: Pelanggan;
  slotTemujanji: SlotTemujanji;
}

interface TemujanjiDetailProps {
  temujanji: Temujanji;
  onClose: () => void;
  onDeleted: () => void;
}

function formatTarikh(dateStr: string): string {
  const date = new Date(dateStr);
  return date.toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
    weekday: 'long',
    day: 'numeric',
    month: 'long',
    year: 'numeric',
  });
}

function statusBadgeVariant(
  status: string,
): 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'default' {
  switch (status) {
    case 'TERSEDIA':
      return 'success';
    case 'DITEMPAH':
      return 'warning';
    case 'DIBATALKAN':
      return 'error';
    default:
      return 'default';
  }
}

function TemujanjiDetail({ temujanji, onClose, onDeleted }: TemujanjiDetailProps) {
  const handleDelete = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!confirm('Adakah anda pasti mahu memadamkan temujanji ini? Slot akan dikembalikan kepada status TERSEDIA.')) {
      return;
    }

    const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/temujanji/${temujanji.id}`, {
      method: 'DELETE',
    });
    const result = await res.json();

    if (result.success) {
      toast.success('Temujanji berjaya dipadamkan');
      onDeleted();
    } else {
      toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal memadamkan temujanji');
    }
  }, [temujanji.id, onDeleted]);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Maklumat Pelanggan */}
      <div>
        <h3 className="mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-navy/60">Maklumat Pelanggan</h3>
        <div className="space-y-1 text-sm">
          <p>
            <span className="font-medium text-navy">Nama:</span>{' '}
            {temujanji.pelanggan.nama}
          </p>
          <p>
            <span className="font-medium text-navy">No. Telefon:</span>{' '}
            {temujanji.pelanggan.noTelefon}
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Maklumat Slot */}
      <div>
        <h3 className="mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-navy/60">Maklumat Slot</h3>
        <div className="space-y-1 text-sm">
          <p>
            <span className="font-medium text-navy">Tarikh:</span>{' '}
            {formatTarikh(temujanji.slotTemujanji.tarikh)}
          </p>
          <p>
            <span className="font-medium text-navy">Masa:</span>{' '}
            {temujanji.slotTemujanji.masaMula} - {temujanji.slotTemujanji.masaTamat}
          </p>
          <p>
            <span className="font-medium text-navy">Status:</span>{' '}
            <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(temujanji.slotTemujanji.status)}>
              {temujanji.slotTemujanji.status}
            </Badge>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Nota */}
      <div>
        <h3 className="mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-navy/60">Nota</h3>
        <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm text-navy">
          {temujanji.nota ?? 'Tiada nota'}
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Tarikh Dibuat */}
      <div>
        <p className="text-xs text-navy/40">
          Dibuat pada {formatTarikh(temujanji.createdAt)}
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Tindakan */}
      <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 border-t border-navy/10 pt-4">
        <Button variant="secondary" size="sm" onClick={onClose}>
          Tutup
        </Button>
        <Button variant="danger" size="sm" onClick={handleDelete}>
          Padam Temujanji
        </Button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export { TemujanjiDetail };
export type { Temujanji, Pelanggan, SlotTemujanji };

```

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
} from '@/lib/api';
import { tempahanCreateSchema } from '@/lib/validations/tempahan';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
  const page = Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('page') ?? '1'));
  const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20')));
  const search = searchParams.get('search')?.trim() ?? '';
  const pakejId = searchParams.get('pakejId')?.trim() ?? '';
  const dateFrom = searchParams.get('dateFrom')?.trim() ?? '';
  const dateTo = searchParams.get('dateTo')?.trim() ?? '';

  const where: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  const andConditions: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];

  if (search) {
    andConditions.push({
      OR: [
        { namaTempahan: { contains: search } },
        { pelanggan: { nama: { contains: search } } },
      ],
    });
  }

  if (pakejId) {
    andConditions.push({ pakejId });
  }

  if (dateFrom || dateTo) {
    const slotCondition: Record<string, unknown> = {};
    if (dateFrom) {
      slotCondition.gte = new Date(dateFrom);
    }
    if (dateTo) {
      slotCondition.lte = new Date(dateTo);
    }
    andConditions.push({
      slotTempahan: { tarikh: slotCondition },
    });
  }

  if (andConditions.length > 0) {
    where.AND = andConditions;
  }

  const [tempahan, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.tempahan.findMany({
      where,
      include: {
        slotTempahan: true,
        pakej: { select: { id: true, namaPakej: true, warna: true } },
        pelanggan: { select: { id: true, nama: true, noTelefon: true } },
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      skip: (page - 1) * limit,
      take: limit,
    }),
    prisma.tempahan.count({ where }),
  ]);

  return successResponse({
    items: tempahan,
    meta: { total, page, limit },
  });
});

export const POST = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const body: unknown = await req.json();
  const data = validateBody(tempahanCreateSchema, body);

  // Verify slot exists and is TERSEDIA
  const slot = await prisma.slotTempahan.findUnique({
    where: { id: data.slotTempahanId },
  });

  if (!slot) {
    return errorResponse('Slot tempahan tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  if (slot.status !== 'TERSEDIA') {
    return errorResponse('Slot ini tidak tersedia untuk tempahan', 400);
  }

  // Verify pakej exists
  const pakej = await prisma.pakej.findUnique({
    where: { id: data.pakejId },
  });

  if (!pakej) {
    return errorResponse('Pakej tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  // Verify pelanggan exists
  const pelanggan = await prisma.pelanggan.findUnique({
    where: { id: data.pelangganId },
  });

  if (!pelanggan) {
    return errorResponse('Pelanggan tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  // Create tempahan and update slot status in a transaction
  const tempahan = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    const created = await tx.tempahan.create({
      data: {
        namaTempahan: data.namaTempahan,
        slotTempahanId: data.slotTempahanId,
        pakejId: data.pakejId,
        pelangganId: data.pelangganId,
        nota: data.nota ?? null,
      },
      include: {
        slotTempahan: true,
        pakej: { select: { id: true, namaPakej: true, warna: true } },
        pelanggan: { select: { id: true, nama: true, noTelefon: true } },
      },
    });

    await tx.slotTempahan.update({
      where: { id: data.slotTempahanId },
      data: { status: 'DITEMPAH' },
    });

    return created;
  });

  return successResponse(tempahan, 201);
});

```

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
} from '@/lib/api';
import { tempahanUpdateSchema } from '@/lib/validations/tempahan';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

export const GET = withErrorHandling(
  async (_req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) => {
    const { id } = await params;

    const tempahan = await prisma.tempahan.findUnique({
      where: { id },
      include: {
        slotTempahan: true,
        pakej: { select: { id: true, namaPakej: true, warna: true } },
        pelanggan: { select: { id: true, nama: true, noTelefon: true } },
      },
    });

    if (!tempahan) {
      return errorResponse('Tempahan tidak dijumpai', 404);
    }

    return successResponse(tempahan);
  },
);

export const PUT = withErrorHandling(
  async (req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) => {
    const { id } = await params;

    const existing = await prisma.tempahan.findUnique({
      where: { id },
    });

    if (!existing) {
      return errorResponse('Tempahan tidak dijumpai', 404);
    }

    const body: unknown = await req.json();
    const data = validateBody(tempahanUpdateSchema, body);

    // Verify pakej if changing
    if (data.pakejId) {
      const pakej = await prisma.pakej.findUnique({
        where: { id: data.pakejId },
      });
      if (!pakej) {
        return errorResponse('Pakej tidak dijumpai', 404);
      }
    }

    // Verify pelanggan if changing
    if (data.pelangganId) {
      const pelanggan = await prisma.pelanggan.findUnique({
        where: { id: data.pelangganId },
      });
      if (!pelanggan) {
        return errorResponse('Pelanggan tidak dijumpai', 404);
      }
    }

    const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
    if (data.namaTempahan !== undefined) updateData.namaTempahan = data.namaTempahan;
    if (data.pakejId !== undefined) updateData.pakejId = data.pakejId;
    if (data.pelangganId !== undefined) updateData.pelangganId = data.pelangganId;
    if (data.nota !== undefined) updateData.nota = data.nota;

    const tempahan = await prisma.tempahan.update({
      where: { id },
      data: updateData,
      include: {
        slotTempahan: true,
        pakej: { select: { id: true, namaPakej: true, warna: true } },
        pelanggan: { select: { id: true, nama: true, noTelefon: true } },
      },
    });

    return successResponse(tempahan);
  },
);

export const DELETE = withErrorHandling(
  async (_req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) => {
    const { id } = await params;

    const existing = await prisma.tempahan.findUnique({
      where: { id },
      select: { id: true, slotTempahanId: true },
    });

    if (!existing) {
      return errorResponse('Tempahan tidak dijumpai', 404);
    }

    // Delete tempahan and revert slot to TERSEDIA in a transaction
    await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
      await tx.tempahan.delete({
        where: { id },
      });

      await tx.slotTempahan.update({
        where: { id: existing.slotTempahanId },
        data: { status: 'TERSEDIA' },
      });
    });

    return successResponse({ message: 'Tempahan berjaya dipadam' });
  },
);

```

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import useSWR from 'swr';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Card, CardBody } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Spinner } from '@/components/ui/spinner';
import { Modal } from '@/components/ui/modal';
import { toast } from '@/components/ui/toast';
import { TemujanjiDetail } from './temujanji-detail';
import type { Temujanji } from './temujanji-detail';

interface ApiResponse {
  success: boolean;
  data: {
    data: Temujanji[];
    meta: { total: number; page: number; limit: number };
  } | null;
  error: string | null;
}

const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((r) => r.json());

function formatTarikh(dateStr: string): string {
  const date = new Date(dateStr);
  return date.toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
    day: 'numeric',
    month: 'short',
    year: 'numeric',
  });
}

function truncateText(text: string | null, maxLength: number): string {
  if (!text) return '-';
  if (text.length <= maxLength) return text;
  return text.slice(0, maxLength) + '...';
}

function statusBadgeVariant(
  status: string,
): 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'default' {
  switch (status) {
    case 'TERSEDIA':
      return 'success';
    case 'DITEMPAH':
      return 'warning';
    case 'DIBATALKAN':
      return 'error';
    default:
      return 'default';
  }
}

export function TemujanjiTable() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [status, setStatus] = useState('');
  const [dateFrom, setDateFrom] = useState('');
  const [dateTo, setDateTo] = useState('');
  const [selectedTemujanji, setSelectedTemujanji] = useState<Temujanji | null>(null);
  const limit = 20;

  const params = new URLSearchParams();
  params.set('page', String(page));
  params.set('limit', String(limit));
  if (search) params.set('search', search);
  if (status) params.set('status', status);
  if (dateFrom) params.set('dateFrom', dateFrom);
  if (dateTo) params.set('dateTo', dateTo);

  const { data, error, isLoading, mutate } = useSWR<ApiResponse>(
    `/api/admin/temujanji?${params.toString()}`,
    fetcher,
  );

  const temujanjiList = data?.data?.data ?? [];
  const meta = data?.data?.meta ?? { total: 0, page: 1, limit };
  const totalPages = Math.ceil(meta.total / meta.limit);

  const handleDelete = useCallback(
    async (temujanji: Temujanji) => {
      if (!confirm('Adakah anda pasti mahu memadamkan temujanji ini? Slot akan dikembalikan kepada status TERSEDIA.')) {
        return;
      }

      const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/temujanji/${temujanji.id}`, {
        method: 'DELETE',
      });
      const result = await res.json();

      if (result.success) {
        toast.success('Temujanji berjaya dipadamkan');
        mutate();
      } else {
        toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal memadamkan temujanji');
      }
    },
    [mutate],
  );

  const handleView = useCallback((temujanji: Temujanji) => {
    setSelectedTemujanji(temujanji);
  }, []);

  const handleDetailClose = useCallback(() => {
    setSelectedTemujanji(null);
  }, []);

  const handleDetailDeleted = useCallback(() => {
    setSelectedTemujanji(null);
    mutate();
  }, [mutate]);

  return (
    <>
      <Card className="bg-white">
        <CardBody>
          {/* Filters */}
          <div className="mb-6 flex flex-col gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:flex-wrap">
            <div className="flex-1 min-w-[200px]">
              <Label htmlFor="filter-search">Carian</Label>
              <Input
                id="filter-search"
                type="text"
                placeholder="Cari nama atau no. telefon..."
                value={search}
                onChange={(e) => {
                  setSearch(e.target.value);
                  setPage(1);
                }}
              />
            </div>
            <div className="min-w-[150px]">
              <Label htmlFor="filter-status">Status</Label>
              <select
                id="filter-status"
                value={status}
                onChange={(e) => {
                  setStatus(e.target.value);
                  setPage(1);
                }}
                className="w-full rounded-button border border-navy/20 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-navy focus:border-dusty-rose focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-dusty-rose/20"
              >
                <option value="">Semua</option>
                <option value="TERSEDIA">Tersedia</option>
                <option value="DITEMPAH">Ditempah</option>
                <option value="DIBATALKAN">Dibatalkan</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div className="min-w-[150px]">
              <Label htmlFor="filter-date-from">Dari tarikh</Label>
              <Input
                id="filter-date-from"
                type="date"
                value={dateFrom}
                onChange={(e) => {
                  setDateFrom(e.target.value);
                  setPage(1);
                }}
              />
            </div>
            <div className="min-w-[150px]">
              <Label htmlFor="filter-date-to">Hingga tarikh</Label>
              <Input
                id="filter-date-to"
                type="date"
                value={dateTo}
                onChange={(e) => {
                  setDateTo(e.target.value);
                  setPage(1);
                }}
              />
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Table */}
          {isLoading ? (
            <div className="flex justify-center py-8">
              <Spinner />
            </div>
          ) : error ? (
            <p className="py-4 text-center text-red-600">
              Gagal memuatkan data
            </p>
          ) : temujanjiList.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="py-8 text-center text-navy/60">
              Tiada temujanji dijumpai.
            </p>
          ) : (
            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
              <table className="w-full text-left text-sm">
                <thead>
                  <tr className="border-b border-navy/10">
                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
                      Pelanggan
                    </th>
                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
                      Tarikh
                    </th>
                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
                      Masa
                    </th>
                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
                      Nota
                    </th>
                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
                      Status
                    </th>
                    <th className="px-3 py-3 font-medium text-navy/70">
                      Tindakan
                    </th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {temujanjiList.map((item) => (
                    <tr
                      key={item.id}
                      className="cursor-pointer border-b border-navy/5 last:border-0 hover:bg-navy/5"
                      onClick={() => handleView(item)}
                    >
                      <td className="px-3 py-3">
                        <div>
                          <p className="font-medium text-navy">
                            {item.pelanggan.nama}
                          </p>
                          <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">
                            {item.pelanggan.noTelefon}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-3">
                        {formatTarikh(item.slotTemujanji.tarikh)}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-3">
                        {item.slotTemujanji.masaMula} - {item.slotTemujanji.masaTamat}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-3 text-navy/70">
                        {truncateText(item.nota, 40)}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-3">
                        <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(item.slotTemujanji.status)}>
                          {item.slotTemujanji.status}
                        </Badge>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-3">
                        <div className="flex gap-2" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
                          <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="sm"
                            onClick={() => handleView(item)}
                          >
                            Lihat
                          </Button>
                          <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="sm"
                            onClick={() => handleDelete(item)}
                          >
                            Padam
                          </Button>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Pagination */}
          {totalPages > 1 && (
            <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-between">
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">
                Halaman {meta.page} daripada {totalPages} ({meta.total} rekod)
              </p>
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Button
                  variant="secondary"
                  size="sm"
                  disabled={page <= 1}
                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p - 1)}
                >
                  Sebelum
                </Button>
                <Button
                  variant="secondary"
                  size="sm"
                  disabled={page >= totalPages}
                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p + 1)}
                >
                  Seterusnya
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      {/* Detail Modal */}
      <Modal
        isOpen={selectedTemujanji !== null}
        onClose={handleDetailClose}
        title="Butiran Temujanji"
        size="md"
      >
        {selectedTemujanji && (
          <TemujanjiDetail
            temujanji={selectedTemujanji}
            onClose={handleDetailClose}
            onDeleted={handleDetailDeleted}
          />
        )}
      </Modal>
    </>
  );
}

```

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod';
import useSWR from 'swr';
import { Modal } from '@/components/ui/modal';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import {
  tempahanCreateSchema,
  type TempahanCreateInput,
} from '@/lib/validations/tempahan';

interface PakejOption {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly namaPakej: string;
  readonly warna: string;
}

interface PelangganOption {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly nama: string;
  readonly noTelefon: string;
}

interface TempahanData {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly namaTempahan: string;
  readonly pakejId: string;
  readonly pelangganId: string;
  readonly nota: string | null;
  readonly slotTempahan: {
    readonly id: string;
    readonly tarikh: string;
  };
  readonly pelanggan: {
    readonly id: string;
    readonly nama: string;
    readonly noTelefon: string;
  };
}

interface TempahanFormProps {
  readonly tempahan?: TempahanData | null;
  readonly slotTempahanId?: string;
  readonly slotTarikh?: string;
  readonly onClose: () => void;
  readonly onSuccess: () => void;
}

const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((r) => r.json());

export function TempahanForm({
  tempahan,
  slotTempahanId,
  slotTarikh,
  onClose,
  onSuccess,
}: TempahanFormProps) {
  const isEditing = Boolean(tempahan);
  const [serverError, setServerError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [pelangganSearch, setPelangganSearch] = useState('');
  const [debouncedPelangganSearch, setDebouncedPelangganSearch] = useState('');
  const [showPelangganDropdown, setShowPelangganDropdown] = useState(false);
  const [selectedPelanggan, setSelectedPelanggan] = useState<PelangganOption | null>(
    tempahan ? { id: tempahan.pelanggan.id, nama: tempahan.pelanggan.nama, noTelefon: tempahan.pelanggan.noTelefon } : null,
  );
  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
  const pelangganRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // Fetch pakej list
  const { data: pakejData } = useSWR<{ success: boolean; data: { items: readonly PakejOption[] } }>(
    '/api/admin/pakej',
    fetcher,
  );
  const pakejList = pakejData?.data?.items ?? [];

  // Fetch pelanggan with search
  const { data: pelangganData } = useSWR<{ success: boolean; data: { items: readonly PelangganOption[] } }>(
    debouncedPelangganSearch
      ? `/api/admin/pelanggan?search=${encodeURIComponent(debouncedPelangganSearch)}&limit=10`
      : null,
    fetcher,
  );
  const pelangganList = pelangganData?.data?.items ?? [];

  const {
    register,
    handleSubmit,
    setValue,
    formState: { errors },
  } = useForm<TempahanCreateInput>({
    resolver: zodResolver(tempahanCreateSchema),
    defaultValues: {
      namaTempahan: tempahan?.namaTempahan ?? '',
      slotTempahanId: slotTempahanId ?? tempahan?.slotTempahan.id ?? '',
      pakejId: tempahan?.pakejId ?? '',
      pelangganId: tempahan?.pelangganId ?? '',
      nota: tempahan?.nota ?? '',
    },
  });

  // Debounce pelanggan search
  const handlePelangganSearchChange = useCallback(
    (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      const value = e.target.value;
      setPelangganSearch(value);
      setShowPelangganDropdown(true);

      if (debounceRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
      }

      debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setDebouncedPelangganSearch(value);
      }, 300);
    },
    [],
  );

  // Close dropdown on outside click
  useEffect(() => {
    function handleClickOutside(e: MouseEvent) {
      if (pelangganRef.current && !pelangganRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {
        setShowPelangganDropdown(false);
      }
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (debounceRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
      }
    };
  }, []);

  const handleSelectPelanggan = (pelanggan: PelangganOption) => {
    setSelectedPelanggan(pelanggan);
    setPelangganSearch(`${pelanggan.nama} (${pelanggan.noTelefon})`);
    setValue('pelangganId', pelanggan.id);
    setShowPelangganDropdown(false);
  };

  const onSubmit = async (data: TempahanCreateInput) => {
    setServerError(null);
    setIsSubmitting(true);

    try {
      const url = isEditing
        ? `/api/admin/tempahan/${tempahan!.id}`
        : '/api/admin/tempahan';
      const method = isEditing ? 'PUT' : 'POST';

      // For editing, don't send slotTempahanId
      const payload = isEditing
        ? { namaTempahan: data.namaTempahan, pakejId: data.pakejId, pelangganId: data.pelangganId, nota: data.nota }
        : data;

      const res = await fetch(url, {
        method,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload),
      });

      const result = await res.json();

      if (!result.success) {
        setServerError(result.error ?? 'Ralat berlaku');
        return;
      }

      onSuccess();
    } catch {
      setServerError('Ralat rangkaian. Sila cuba lagi.');
    } finally {
      setIsSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  const displayDate = slotTarikh ?? tempahan?.slotTempahan.tarikh;
  const formattedDate = displayDate
    ? new Date(displayDate).toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
        weekday: 'long',
        day: 'numeric',
        month: 'long',
        year: 'numeric',
      })
    : '';

  return (
    <Modal
      isOpen
      onClose={onClose}
      title={isEditing ? 'Edit Tempahan' : 'Tambah Tempahan'}
      size="lg"
    >
      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-4">
        {/* Tarikh (read-only) */}
        <div>
          <Label htmlFor="tarikh">Tarikh</Label>
          <Input
            id="tarikh"
            value={formattedDate}
            disabled
            className="bg-navy/5"
          />
          <input type="hidden" {...register('slotTempahanId')} />
        </div>

        {/* Nama Tempahan */}
        <div>
          <Label htmlFor="namaTempahan">Nama Tempahan</Label>
          <Input
            id="namaTempahan"
            placeholder="Nama acara / tempahan"
            {...register('namaTempahan')}
          />
          {errors.namaTempahan && (
            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.namaTempahan.message}</p>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Pakej */}
        <div>
          <Label htmlFor="pakejId">Pakej</Label>
          <select
            id="pakejId"
            {...register('pakejId')}
            className="w-full rounded-md border border-navy/20 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-navy focus:border-dusty-rose focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-dusty-rose"
          >
            <option value="">Pilih pakej...</option>
            {pakejList.map((p) => (
              <option key={p.id} value={p.id}>
                {p.namaPakej}
              </option>
            ))}
          </select>
          {errors.pakejId && (
            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.pakejId.message}</p>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Pelanggan (searchable) */}
        <div ref={pelangganRef} className="relative">
          <Label htmlFor="pelangganSearch">Pelanggan</Label>
          {isEditing && selectedPelanggan && !showPelangganDropdown ? (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Input
                id="pelangganSearch"
                value={`${selectedPelanggan.nama} (${selectedPelanggan.noTelefon})`}
                onChange={handlePelangganSearchChange}
                onFocus={() => {
                  setPelangganSearch('');
                  setShowPelangganDropdown(true);
                }}
                placeholder="Cari pelanggan..."
              />
            </div>
          ) : (
            <Input
              id="pelangganSearch"
              value={pelangganSearch}
              onChange={handlePelangganSearchChange}
              onFocus={() => setShowPelangganDropdown(true)}
              placeholder="Cari nama atau no. telefon pelanggan..."
            />
          )}
          <input type="hidden" {...register('pelangganId')} />
          {errors.pelangganId && (
            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.pelangganId.message}</p>
          )}

          {/* Dropdown */}
          {showPelangganDropdown && pelangganList.length > 0 && (
            <div className="absolute z-10 mt-1 w-full rounded-md border border-navy/10 bg-white shadow-lg">
              <ul className="max-h-48 overflow-y-auto py-1">
                {pelangganList.map((p) => (
                  <li key={p.id}>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => handleSelectPelanggan(p)}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm hover:bg-navy/5"
                    >
                      <span className="font-medium text-navy">{p.nama}</span>
                      <span className="ml-2 text-navy/60">{p.noTelefon}</span>
                    </button>
                  </li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            </div>
          )}

          {showPelangganDropdown && debouncedPelangganSearch && pelangganList.length === 0 && (
            <div className="absolute z-10 mt-1 w-full rounded-md border border-navy/10 bg-white p-3 text-sm text-navy/60 shadow-lg">
              Tiada pelanggan dijumpai.
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Nota */}
        <div>
          <Label htmlFor="nota">Nota</Label>
          <Textarea
            id="nota"
            placeholder="Nota tambahan (pilihan)"
            rows={3}
            {...register('nota')}
          />
          {errors.nota && (
            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.nota.message}</p>
          )}
        </div>

        {serverError && (
          <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{serverError}</p>
        )}

        <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-2">
          <Button type="button" variant="secondary" onClick={onClose}>
            Batal
          </Button>
          <Button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting}>
            {isSubmitting ? 'Menyimpan...' : isEditing ? 'Kemaskini' : 'Simpan'}
          </Button>
        </div>
      </form>
    </Modal>
  );
}

```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-20 12:17:20Z)**_

Those are pre-existing errors in a different file (tempahan), not from my code. My files use the same `context: unknown` pattern as the slot-temujanji routes which avoids this issue.

All files are created successfully:

1. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/temujanji/route.ts`** -- GET with pagination, search (pelanggan nama/noTelefon), status filter, date range filter. Includes pelanggan and slotTemujanji relations.

2. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/temujanji/[id]/route.ts`** -- GET (single with full relations) and DELETE (transactional: deletes temujanji and reverts slot status to TERSEDIA).

3. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/temujanji/page.tsx`** -- Server component that renders the client table.

4. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/temujanji/temujanji-table.tsx`** -- Client table with search, status filter, date range filter, pagination, delete with confirmation, row click to open detail modal.

5. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/temujanji/temujanji-detail.tsx`** -- Detail modal showing full pelanggan info, slot info with status badge, full nota text, and delete button.

Key implementation details:
- Uses `context: unknown` with cast pattern (matching existing slot-temujanji routes) to avoid the TypeScript issue with `Promise<params>`
- SWR for data fetching with URL-based cache keys
- `$transaction` for delete to ensure atomicity of temujanji deletion + slot status revert
- Status badges: TERSEDIA=success(green), DITEMPAH=warning(amber), DIBATALKAN=error(red)
- All UI text in Bahasa Malaysia
- `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` on both API routes
- Rate limiting consistent with other admin routes
