```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import useSWR from 'swr';
import { Card, CardBody } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { toast } from '@/components/ui/toast';
import { TempahanForm } from './tempahan-form';

interface SlotTempahan {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly tarikh: string;
  readonly status: 'TERSEDIA' | 'DITEMPAH' | 'DIBATALKAN';
  readonly tempahan?: { readonly id: string; readonly namaTempahan: string } | null;
}

interface TempahanItem {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly namaTempahan: string;
  readonly nota: string | null;
  readonly createdAt: string;
  readonly slotTempahanId: string;
  readonly slotTempahan: { readonly id: string; readonly tarikh: string; readonly status: string };
  readonly pakej: { readonly id: string; readonly namaPakej: string; readonly warna: string };
  readonly pelanggan: { readonly id: string; readonly nama: string; readonly noTelefon: string };
}

interface SlotApiResponse {
  readonly success: boolean;
  readonly data: {
    readonly data: readonly SlotTempahan[];
    readonly meta: { readonly total: number };
  } | null;
}

interface TempahanApiResponse {
  readonly success: boolean;
  readonly data: {
    readonly items: readonly TempahanItem[];
    readonly meta: { readonly total: number; readonly page: number; readonly limit: number };
  } | null;
}

const DAY_HEADERS = ['Isn', 'Sel', 'Rab', 'Kha', 'Jum', 'Sab', 'Ahd'] as const;

const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((r) => r.json());

function formatMonth(year: number, month: number): string {
  return `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

function getMonthLabel(year: number, month: number): string {
  const date = new Date(year, month, 1);
  return date.toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
}

function getCalendarDays(year: number, month: number): (number | null)[] {
  const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
  const startOffset = firstDay === 0 ? 6 : firstDay - 1;
  const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();

  const days: (number | null)[] = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < startOffset; i++) {
    days.push(null);
  }
  for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
    days.push(d);
  }
  return days;
}

export function TempahanCalendar() {
  const now = new Date();
  const [year, setYear] = useState(now.getFullYear());
  const [month, setMonth] = useState(now.getMonth());
  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
  const [selectedSlotId, setSelectedSlotId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const monthParam = formatMonth(year, month);

  // Fetch slots for the month
  const { data: slotData, isLoading: slotsLoading } = useSWR<SlotApiResponse>(
    `/api/admin/slot-tempahan?month=${monthParam}`,
    fetcher,
  );

  // Fetch tempahan for the month to overlay pakej colours
  const dateFrom = `${monthParam}-01`;
  const lastDay = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
  const dateTo = `${monthParam}-${String(lastDay).padStart(2, '0')}`;

  const { data: tempahanData, mutate: mutateTempahan } = useSWR<TempahanApiResponse>(
    `/api/admin/tempahan?dateFrom=${dateFrom}&dateTo=${dateTo}&limit=100`,
    fetcher,
  );

  const slots = slotData?.data?.data ?? [];
  const tempahanItems = tempahanData?.data?.items ?? [];

  // Map slot by day
  const slotsByDay = new Map<number, SlotTempahan>();
  for (const slot of slots) {
    const day = new Date(slot.tarikh).getUTCDate();
    slotsByDay.set(day, slot);
  }

  // Map tempahan by slotTempahanId
  const tempahanBySlotId = new Map<string, TempahanItem>();
  for (const t of tempahanItems) {
    tempahanBySlotId.set(t.slotTempahanId, t);
  }

  const calendarDays = getCalendarDays(year, month);

  const goToPrevMonth = useCallback(() => {
    if (month === 0) {
      setYear((y) => y - 1);
      setMonth(11);
    } else {
      setMonth((m) => m - 1);
    }
  }, [month]);

  const goToNextMonth = useCallback(() => {
    if (month === 11) {
      setYear((y) => y + 1);
      setMonth(0);
    } else {
      setMonth((m) => m + 1);
    }
  }, [month]);

  const handleDayClick = (day: number) => {
    const slot = slotsByDay.get(day);
    if (!slot) {
      toast.error('Tiada slot untuk tarikh ini. Sila buat slot terlebih dahulu.');
      return;
    }

    if (slot.status === 'DITEMPAH') {
      toast.error('Slot ini sudah ditempah.');
      return;
    }

    if (slot.status === 'DIBATALKAN') {
      toast.error('Slot ini telah dibatalkan.');
      return;
    }

    // TERSEDIA — open booking form
    const dateStr = `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(day).padStart(2, '0')}`;
    setSelectedSlotId(slot.id);
    setSelectedDate(dateStr);
    setShowForm(true);
  };

  const handleFormSuccess = () => {
    setShowForm(false);
    setSelectedSlotId(null);
    setSelectedDate(null);
    toast.success('Tempahan berjaya dibuat');
    mutateTempahan();
  };

  return (
    <>
      <Card className="bg-white">
        <CardBody>
          {/* Month navigation */}
          <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={goToPrevMonth}
              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
              aria-label="Bulan sebelumnya"
            >
              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15.75 19.5 8.25 12l7.5-7.5" />
              </svg>
            </button>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
              {getMonthLabel(year, month)}
            </h2>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={goToNextMonth}
              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
              aria-label="Bulan seterusnya"
            >
              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
              </svg>
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Calendar grid */}
          {slotsLoading ? (
            <div className="flex h-64 items-center justify-center">
              <p className="text-navy/60">Memuatkan...</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-1">
              {/* Day headers */}
              {DAY_HEADERS.map((day) => (
                <div
                  key={day}
                  className="py-2 text-center text-xs font-semibold text-navy/60"
                >
                  {day}
                </div>
              ))}

              {/* Day cells */}
              {calendarDays.map((day, idx) => {
                if (day === null) {
                  return <div key={`empty-${idx}`} className="aspect-square" />;
                }

                const slot = slotsByDay.get(day);
                const tempahan = slot ? tempahanBySlotId.get(slot.id) : undefined;
                const isBooked = slot?.status === 'DITEMPAH' && tempahan;

                let cellClass = 'border-navy/10 bg-gray-50 hover:bg-navy/5';
                if (slot) {
                  if (slot.status === 'TERSEDIA') {
                    cellClass = 'bg-green-100 border-green-300 hover:bg-green-200 cursor-pointer';
                  } else if (slot.status === 'DITEMPAH') {
                    cellClass = 'bg-amber-100 border-amber-300';
                  } else {
                    cellClass = 'bg-red-100 border-red-300';
                  }
                }

                return (
                  <button
                    key={day}
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => handleDayClick(day)}
                    disabled={!slot || slot.status !== 'TERSEDIA'}
                    className={`aspect-square rounded-md border p-1 text-xs transition-colors ${cellClass} ${
                      !slot || slot.status !== 'TERSEDIA' ? 'cursor-default' : ''
                    }`}
                  >
                    <span className="block font-medium text-navy">{day}</span>
                    {isBooked && tempahan && (
                      <>
                        <span
                          className="mt-0.5 inline-block h-2 w-2 rounded-full"
                          style={{ backgroundColor: tempahan.pakej.warna }}
                        />
                        <span className="block truncate text-[9px] text-navy/70">
                          {tempahan.namaTempahan}
                        </span>
                      </>
                    )}
                    {slot && slot.status === 'TERSEDIA' && (
                      <span className="mt-0.5 block text-[10px] text-green-700">Buka</span>
                    )}
                    {slot && slot.status === 'DIBATALKAN' && (
                      <span className="mt-0.5 block text-[10px] text-red-700">Batal</span>
                    )}
                  </button>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Legend */}
          <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-4 border-t border-navy/10 pt-3">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-green-300 bg-green-100" />
              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Tersedia</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-amber-300 bg-amber-100" />
              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Ditempah</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-red-300 bg-red-100" />
              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Dibatalkan</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-navy/10 bg-gray-50" />
              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Tiada slot</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      {/* Create Tempahan Form */}
      {showForm && selectedSlotId && (
        <TempahanForm
          slotTempahanId={selectedSlotId}
          slotDate={selectedDate ?? undefined}
          onClose={() => {
            setShowForm(false);
            setSelectedSlotId(null);
            setSelectedDate(null);
          }}
          onSuccess={handleFormSuccess}
        />
      )}
    </>
  );
}

```

5	
6	// Map Prisma error codes to Bahasa Malaysia messages
7	const prismaErrorMessages: Readonly<
8	  Record<string, { readonly message: string; readonly status: number }>
9	> = {
10	  P2002: { message: 'Rekod sudah wujud', status: 409 },
11	  P2025: { message: 'Rekod tidak dijumpai', status: 404 },
12	};
13	
14	type RouteHandler = (req: NextRequest, context?: unknown) => Promise<Response>;
15	
16	export function withErrorHandling(handler: RouteHandler): RouteHandler {
17	  return async (req, context) => {
18	    try {
19	      return await handler(req, context);
20	    } catch (error) {
21	      console.error('[API Error]', error);
22	
23	      if (error instanceof Prisma.PrismaClientKnownRequestError) {
24	        const mapped = prismaErrorMessages[error.code];
25	        if (mapped) {
26	          return errorResponse(mapped.message, mapped.status);
27	        }
28	      }
29	
30	      if (error instanceof ValidationError) {
31	        return errorResponse(error.message, 400);
32	      }
33	
34	      return errorResponse('Ralat dalaman pelayan', 500);
35	    }
36	  };
37	}

```typescript
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
import {
  successResponse,
  errorResponse,
  withErrorHandling,
  validateBody,
} from '@/lib/api';
import { tempahanUpdateSchema } from '@/lib/validations/tempahan';

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';

function extractId(req: NextRequest): string {
  const segments = new URL(req.url).pathname.split('/');
  return segments[segments.length - 1];
}

export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const id = extractId(req);

  const tempahan = await prisma.tempahan.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    include: {
      slotTempahan: true,
      pakej: { select: { id: true, namaPakej: true, warna: true } },
      pelanggan: { select: { id: true, nama: true, noTelefon: true } },
    },
  });

  if (!tempahan) {
    return errorResponse('Tempahan tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  return successResponse(tempahan);
});

export const PUT = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const id = extractId(req);

  const existing = await prisma.tempahan.findUnique({
    where: { id },
  });

  if (!existing) {
    return errorResponse('Tempahan tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  const body: unknown = await req.json();
  const data = validateBody(tempahanUpdateSchema, body);

  // Verify pakej if changing
  if (data.pakejId) {
    const pakej = await prisma.pakej.findUnique({
      where: { id: data.pakejId },
    });
    if (!pakej) {
      return errorResponse('Pakej tidak dijumpai', 404);
    }
  }

  // Verify pelanggan if changing
  if (data.pelangganId) {
    const pelanggan = await prisma.pelanggan.findUnique({
      where: { id: data.pelangganId },
    });
    if (!pelanggan) {
      return errorResponse('Pelanggan tidak dijumpai', 404);
    }
  }

  const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  if (data.namaTempahan !== undefined) updateData.namaTempahan = data.namaTempahan;
  if (data.pakejId !== undefined) updateData.pakejId = data.pakejId;
  if (data.pelangganId !== undefined) updateData.pelangganId = data.pelangganId;
  if (data.nota !== undefined) updateData.nota = data.nota;

  const tempahan = await prisma.tempahan.update({
    where: { id },
    data: updateData,
    include: {
      slotTempahan: true,
      pakej: { select: { id: true, namaPakej: true, warna: true } },
      pelanggan: { select: { id: true, nama: true, noTelefon: true } },
    },
  });

  return successResponse(tempahan);
});

export const DELETE = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
  const id = extractId(req);

  const existing = await prisma.tempahan.findUnique({
    where: { id },
    select: { id: true, slotTempahanId: true },
  });

  if (!existing) {
    return errorResponse('Tempahan tidak dijumpai', 404);
  }

  // Delete tempahan and revert slot to TERSEDIA in a transaction
  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    await tx.tempahan.delete({
      where: { id },
    });

    await tx.slotTempahan.update({
      where: { id: existing.slotTempahanId },
      data: { status: 'TERSEDIA' },
    });
  });

  return successResponse({ message: 'Tempahan berjaya dipadam' });
});

```

Zero TypeScript errors. All files compile cleanly. Here is a summary of what was created:

---

**Files created for the Tempahan (Venue Booking) admin module:**

1. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/lib/validations/tempahan.ts`** - Zod schemas for create (all required fields) and update (all optional), with proper Malay error messages.

2. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/tempahan/route.ts`** - GET (list with pagination, search by name/pelanggan, filter by pakejId, dateFrom/dateTo) + POST (create tempahan in transaction, validates slot is TERSEDIA, sets slot to DITEMPAH).

3. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/api/admin/tempahan/[id]/route.ts`** - GET (single with relations), PUT (update name/pakej/pelanggan/nota, not slot), DELETE (delete tempahan + revert slot to TERSEDIA in transaction).

4. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/app/admin/tempahan/page.tsx`** - Server component rendering the calendar and table.

5. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/tempahan/tempahan-calendar.tsx`** - Monthly calendar showing slot status. TERSEDIA dates are clickable and open the booking form. DITEMPAH dates show the tempahan name with pakej colour dot. Month navigation included.

6. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/tempahan/tempahan-table.tsx`** - List table with search, pakej filter, date range filter, pagination, and edit/delete actions.

7. **`/home/quantmis/projects/mawarbiru/components/admin/tempahan/tempahan-form.tsx`** - Modal form for create/edit. Pakej simple dropdown, pelanggan searchable with debounce, slot date shown read-only, nota textarea. Uses react-hook-form + Zod resolver.

All files pass `tsc --noEmit` with zero errors. The module follows the same patterns as existing admin modules (pelanggan, slot-tempahan) and uses SWR, react-hook-form, and the project's UI components.

1	import { z } from 'zod';

3	// ── Server-side environment variables ──────────────────────────────────
4	const serverSchema = z.object({
5	  DATABASE_URL: z.string().min(1, 'DATABASE_URL is required'),
6	  NEXTAUTH_SECRET: z.string().min(1, 'NEXTAUTH_SECRET is required'),
7	  NEXTAUTH_URL: z.string().url('NEXTAUTH_URL must be a valid URL'),
8	  ADMIN_EMAIL: z.string().email('ADMIN_EMAIL must be a valid email'),
9	  WHATSAPP_NUMBER: z.string().default(''),
10	});
11	
12	// ── Client-safe environment variables (NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix) ────────────
13	const clientSchema = z.object({
14	  NEXT_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_NUMBER: z.string().default(''),
15	});
16	
17	// ── Guard: prevent server env from leaking to client bundles ───────────
18	function validateServerEnv() {
19	  if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
20	    throw new Error(
21	      'Server environment variables must not be imported in client components. ' +
22	        'Use `clientEnv` instead.',
23	    );
24	  }
25	
26	  const result = serverSchema.safeParse(process.env);
27	
28	  if (!result.success) {
29	    const missing = result.error.issues
30	      .map((issue) => `  - ${issue.path.join('.')}: ${issue.message}`)
31	      .join('\n');
32	
33	    throw new Error(
34	      `Missing or invalid server environment variables:\n${missing}`,
35	    );
36	  }
37	
38	  return result.data;
39	}
40	
41	function validateClientEnv() {
42	  const result = clientSchema.safeParse({
43	    NEXT_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_NUMBER:
44	      process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_NUMBER ?? '',
45	  });
46	
47	  if (!result.success) {
48	    const missing = result.error.issues
49	      .map((issue) => `  - ${issue.path.join('.')}: ${issue.message}`)
50	      .join('\n');
51	
52	    throw new Error(
53	      `Missing or invalid client environment variables:\n${missing}`,
54	    );
55	  }
56	
57	  return result.data;
58	}
59	
60	// ── Exported validated env objects ──────────────────────────────────────
61	
62	/**
63	 * Server-only environment variables.
64	 * Throws at import time if any required variable is missing or invalid.
65	 * Throws if imported from a client component (browser context).
66	 */
67	export const serverEnv = validateServerEnv();
68	
69	/**
70	 * Client-safe environment variables (NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix only).
71	 * Safe to import from both server and client components.
72	 */
73	export const clientEnv = validateClientEnv();

11	  readonly tarikh: string;
12	  readonly status: 'TERSEDIA' | 'DITEMPAH' | 'DIBATALKAN';
13	  readonly tempahan?: { readonly id: string; readonly namaTempahan: string } | null;
14	}
15	
16	interface ApiResponse {
17	  readonly success: boolean;

19	    readonly data: readonly SlotTempahan[];
20	    readonly meta: { readonly total: number };
21	  } | null;

24	const DAY_HEADERS = ['Isn', 'Sel', 'Rab', 'Kha', 'Jum', 'Sab', 'Ahd'] as const;
25	
26	const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((r) => r.json());
27	
28	function formatMonth(year: number, month: number): string {
29	  return `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
30	}
31	
32	function getMonthLabel(year: number, month: number): string {
33	  const date = new Date(year, month, 1);
34	  return date.toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
35	}
36	
37	function getCalendarDays(year: number, month: number): (number | null)[] {
38	  const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
39	  // Convert Sunday=0 to Monday-start: Mon=0, Sun=6
40	  const startOffset = firstDay === 0 ? 6 : firstDay - 1;
41	  const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
42	
43	  const days: (number | null)[] = [];
44	
45	  // Fill leading empty cells
46	  for (let i = 0; i < startOffset; i++) {
47	    days.push(null);
48	  }
49	
50	  // Fill actual days
51	  for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
52	    days.push(d);
53	  }
54	
55	  return days;
56	}
57	
58	function statusBadgeVariant(status: string): 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' {
59	  switch (status) {
60	    case 'TERSEDIA':
61	      return 'success';
62	    case 'DITEMPAH':
63	      return 'warning';
64	    case 'DIBATALKAN':
65	      return 'error';
66	    default:
67	      return 'success';
68	  }
69	}
70	
71	function statusBgClass(status: string): string {
72	  switch (status) {
73	    case 'TERSEDIA':
74	      return 'bg-green-100 border-green-300 hover:bg-green-200';
75	    case 'DITEMPAH':
76	      return 'bg-amber-100 border-amber-300 hover:bg-amber-200';
77	    case 'DIBATALKAN':
78	      return 'bg-red-100 border-red-300 hover:bg-red-200';
79	    default:
80	      return '';
81	  }
82	}
83	
84	export function SlotTempahanCalendar() {
85	  const now = new Date();
86	  const [year, setYear] = useState(now.getFullYear());
87	  const [month, setMonth] = useState(now.getMonth());
88	  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
89	  const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState<string | null>(null);
90	  const [selectedSlot, setSelectedSlot] = useState<SlotTempahan | null>(null);
91	  const [showSlotModal, setShowSlotModal] = useState(false);
92	
93	  const monthParam = formatMonth(year, month);
94	
95	  const { data, mutate, isLoading } = useSWR<ApiResponse>(
96	    `/api/admin/slot-tempahan?month=${monthParam}`,
97	    fetcher,
98	  );
99	
100	  const slots = data?.data?.data ?? [];
101	
102	  const slotsByDay = new Map<number, SlotTempahan>();
103	  for (const slot of slots) {
104	    const day = new Date(slot.tarikh).getUTCDate();
105	    slotsByDay.set(day, slot);
106	  }
107	
108	  const calendarDays = getCalendarDays(year, month);
109	
110	  const goToPrevMonth = useCallback(() => {
111	    if (month === 0) {
112	      setYear((y) => y - 1);
113	      setMonth(11);
114	    } else {
115	      setMonth((m) => m - 1);
116	    }
117	  }, [month]);
118	
119	  const goToNextMonth = useCallback(() => {
120	    if (month === 11) {
121	      setYear((y) => y + 1);
122	      setMonth(0);
123	    } else {
124	      setMonth((m) => m + 1);
125	    }
126	  }, [month]);
127	
128	  const handleDayClick = (day: number) => {
129	    const slot = slotsByDay.get(day);
130	    if (slot) {
131	      setSelectedSlot(slot);
132	      setShowSlotModal(true);
133	    } else {
134	      const dateStr = `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(day).padStart(2, '0')}`;
135	      setSelectedDate(dateStr);
136	      setShowForm(true);
137	    }
138	  };
139	
140	  const handleUpdateStatus = async (id: string, status: string) => {
141	    const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/slot-tempahan/${id}`, {
142	      method: 'PUT',
143	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
144	      body: JSON.stringify({ status }),
145	    });
146	    const result = await res.json();
147	    if (result.success) {
148	      toast.success('Status berjaya dikemaskini');
149	      setShowSlotModal(false);
150	      setSelectedSlot(null);
151	      mutate();
152	    } else {
153	      toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal mengemaskini status');
154	    }
155	  };
156	
157	  const handleDelete = async (id: string, force = false) => {
158	    const url = force
159	      ? `/api/admin/slot-tempahan/${id}?force=true`
160	      : `/api/admin/slot-tempahan/${id}`;
161	    const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'DELETE' });
162	    const result = await res.json();
163	    if (result.success) {
164	      toast.success('Slot berjaya dipadam');
165	      setShowSlotModal(false);
166	      setSelectedSlot(null);
167	      mutate();
168	    } else {
169	      toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal memadam slot');
170	    }
171	  };
172	
173	  const handleFormSuccess = () => {
174	    setShowForm(false);
175	    setSelectedDate(null);
176	    mutate();
177	  };
178	
179	  return (
180	    <>
181	      <Card className="bg-white">
182	        <CardBody>
183	          {/* Month navigation */}
184	          <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
185	            <button
186	              type="button"
187	              onClick={goToPrevMonth}
188	              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
189	              aria-label="Bulan sebelumnya"
190	            >
191	              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
192	                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15.75 19.5 8.25 12l7.5-7.5" />
193	              </svg>
194	            </button>
195	            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
196	              {getMonthLabel(year, month)}
197	            </h2>
198	            <button
199	              type="button"
200	              onClick={goToNextMonth}
201	              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
202	              aria-label="Bulan seterusnya"
203	            >
204	              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
205	                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
206	              </svg>
207	            </button>
208	          </div>
209	
210	          {/* Add bulk button */}
211	          <div className="mb-4 flex justify-end">
212	            <Button
213	              size="sm"
214	              onClick={() => {
215	                setSelectedDate(null);
216	                setShowForm(true);
217	              }}
218	            >
219	              + Tambah Slot
220	            </Button>
221	          </div>
222	
223	          {/* Calendar grid */}
224	          {isLoading ? (
225	            <div className="flex h-64 items-center justify-center">
226	              <p className="text-navy/60">Memuatkan...</p>
227	            </div>
228	          ) : (
229	            <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-1">
230	              {/* Day headers */}
231	              {DAY_HEADERS.map((day) => (
232	                <div
233	                  key={day}
234	                  className="py-2 text-center text-xs font-semibold text-navy/60"
235	                >
236	                  {day}
237	                </div>
238	              ))}
239	
240	              {/* Day cells */}
241	              {calendarDays.map((day, idx) => {
242	                if (day === null) {
243	                  return <div key={`empty-${idx}`} className="aspect-square" />;
244	                }
245	
246	                const slot = slotsByDay.get(day);
247	                const hasSlot = Boolean(slot);
248	
249	                return (
250	                  <button
251	                    key={day}
252	                    type="button"
253	                    onClick={() => handleDayClick(day)}
254	                    className={`aspect-square rounded-md border p-1 text-xs transition-colors ${
255	                      hasSlot
256	                        ? statusBgClass(slot!.status)
257	                        : 'border-navy/10 bg-gray-50 hover:bg-navy/5'
258	                    }`}
259	                  >
260	                    <span className="block font-medium text-navy">{day}</span>
261	                    {hasSlot && (
262	                      <span className="mt-0.5 block truncate text-[10px]">
263	                        {slot!.status === 'TERSEDIA' ? 'Buka' : slot!.status === 'DITEMPAH' ? 'Tempah' : 'Batal'}
264	                      </span>
265	                    )}
266	                  </button>
267	                );
268	              })}
269	            </div>
270	          )}
271	
272	          {/* Legend */}
273	          <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-4 border-t border-navy/10 pt-3">
274	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
275	              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-green-300 bg-green-100" />
276	              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Tersedia</span>
277	            </div>
278	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
279	              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-amber-300 bg-amber-100" />
280	              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Ditempah</span>
281	            </div>
282	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
283	              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-red-300 bg-red-100" />
284	              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Dibatalkan</span>
285	            </div>
286	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
287	              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-navy/10 bg-gray-50" />
288	              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Tiada slot</span>
289	            </div>
290	          </div>
291	        </CardBody>
292	      </Card>
293	
294	      {/* Create slot modal */}
295	      <Modal
296	        isOpen={showForm}
297	        onClose={() => {
298	          setShowForm(false);
299	          setSelectedDate(null);
300	        }}
301	        title="Tambah Slot Tempahan"
302	      >
303	        <SlotTempahanForm
304	          defaultDate={selectedDate}
305	          onSuccess={handleFormSuccess}
306	          onCancel={() => {
307	            setShowForm(false);
308	            setSelectedDate(null);
309	          }}
310	        />
311	      </Modal>
312	
313	      {/* Slot detail/actions modal */}
314	      <Modal
315	        isOpen={showSlotModal}
316	        onClose={() => {
317	          setShowSlotModal(false);
318	          setSelectedSlot(null);
319	        }}
320	        title="Slot Tempahan"
321	        size="sm"
322	      >
323	        {selectedSlot && (
324	          <div className="space-y-4">
325	            <div>
326	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tarikh</p>
327	              <p className="font-medium text-navy">
328	                {new Date(selectedSlot.tarikh).toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
329	                  weekday: 'long',
330	                  day: 'numeric',
331	                  month: 'long',
332	                  year: 'numeric',
333	                })}
334	              </p>
335	            </div>
336	            <div>
337	              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Status</p>
338	              <Badge variant={statusBadgeVariant(selectedSlot.status)}>
339	                {selectedSlot.status}
340	              </Badge>
341	            </div>
342	            {selectedSlot.tempahan && (
343	              <div>
344	                <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tempahan</p>
345	                <p className="font-medium text-navy">
346	                  {selectedSlot.tempahan.namaTempahan}
347	                </p>
348	              </div>
349	            )}
350	
351	            {/* Actions */}
352	            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 border-t border-navy/10 pt-4">
353	              {selectedSlot.status === 'TERSEDIA' && (
354	                <Button
355	                  size="sm"
356	                  variant="secondary"
357	                  onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(selectedSlot.id, 'DIBATALKAN')}
358	                >
359	                  Batalkan
360	                </Button>
361	              )}
362	              {selectedSlot.status === 'DIBATALKAN' && (
363	                <Button
364	                  size="sm"
365	                  variant="secondary"
366	                  onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(selectedSlot.id, 'TERSEDIA')}
367	                >
368	                  Aktifkan Semula
369	                </Button>
370	              )}
371	              <Button
372	                size="sm"
373	                variant="secondary"
374	                onClick={() =>
375	                  handleDelete(selectedSlot.id, selectedSlot.status === 'DITEMPAH')
376	                }
377	                className="text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50"
378	              >
379	                {selectedSlot.status === 'DITEMPAH' ? 'Padam (Paksa)' : 'Padam'}
380	              </Button>
381	            </div>
382	          </div>
383	        )}
384	      </Modal>
385	    </>
386	  );
387	}

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-20 13:07:55Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/api/admin/temujanji/route.ts`

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	import {
4	  successResponse,
5	  withErrorHandling,
6	  createRateLimiter,
7	} from '@/lib/api';
8	
9	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
10	
11	const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
12	  interval: 60_000,
13	  maxRequests: 60,
14	});
15	
16	export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
17	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
18	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
19	
20	  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
21	  const page = Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('page') ?? '1'));
22	  const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20')));
23	  const search = searchParams.get('search')?.trim() ?? '';
24	  const status = searchParams.get('status') ?? '';
25	  const dateFrom = searchParams.get('dateFrom') ?? '';
26	  const dateTo = searchParams.get('dateTo') ?? '';
27	
28	  const where: Record<string, unknown> = {};
29	
30	  if (search) {
31	    where.pelanggan = {
32	      OR: [
33	        { nama: { contains: search } },
34	        { noTelefon: { contains: search } },
35	      ],
36	    };
37	  }
38	
39	  if (status && ['TERSEDIA', 'DITEMPAH', 'DIBATALKAN'].includes(status)) {
40	    where.slotTemujanji = {
41	      ...((where.slotTemujanji as Record<string, unknown>) ?? {}),
42	      status,
43	    };
44	  }
45	
46	  if (dateFrom || dateTo) {
47	    const slotFilter = (where.slotTemujanji as Record<string, unknown>) ?? {};
48	    const tarikhFilter: Record<string, Date> = {};
49	
50	    if (dateFrom) {
51	      const from = new Date(dateFrom);
52	      if (!isNaN(from.getTime())) {
53	        tarikhFilter.gte = from;
54	      }
55	    }
56	
57	    if (dateTo) {
58	      const to = new Date(dateTo);
59	      if (!isNaN(to.getTime())) {
60	        tarikhFilter.lte = to;
61	      }
62	    }
63	
64	    if (Object.keys(tarikhFilter).length > 0) {
65	      slotFilter.tarikh = tarikhFilter;
66	      where.slotTemujanji = slotFilter;
67	    }
68	  }
69	
70	  const [temujanjiList, total] = await Promise.all([
71	    prisma.temujanji.findMany({
72	      where,
73	      include: {
74	        pelanggan: true,
75	        slotTemujanji: true,
76	      },
77	      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
78	      skip: (page - 1) * limit,
79	      take: limit,
80	    }),
81	    prisma.temujanji.count({ where }),
82	  ]);
83	
84	  return successResponse({ data: temujanjiList, meta: { total, page, limit } });
85	});
86
```
</details></tool-use>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import useSWR from 'swr';
import { Card, CardBody, Badge, Modal, Button } from '@/components/ui';
import { toast } from '@/components/ui';

interface SlotTemujanji {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly tarikh: string;
  readonly masaMula: string;
  readonly masaTamat: string;
  readonly status: 'TERSEDIA' | 'DITEMPAH' | 'DIBATALKAN';
}

interface Pelanggan {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly nama: string;
  readonly noTelefon: string;
}

interface Temujanji {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly nota: string | null;
  readonly createdAt: string;
  readonly pelanggan: Pelanggan;
  readonly slotTemujanji: SlotTemujanji;
}

interface ApiResponse {
  readonly success: boolean;
  readonly data: {
    readonly data: readonly Temujanji[];
    readonly meta: { readonly total: number };
  } | null;
}

const DAY_HEADERS = ['Isn', 'Sel', 'Rab', 'Kha', 'Jum', 'Sab', 'Ahd'] as const;

const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((r) => r.json());

function formatMonth(year: number, month: number): string {
  return `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

function getMonthLabel(year: number, month: number): string {
  const date = new Date(year, month, 1);
  return date.toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
}

function getCalendarDays(year: number, month: number): (number | null)[] {
  const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
  const startOffset = firstDay === 0 ? 6 : firstDay - 1;
  const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();

  const days: (number | null)[] = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < startOffset; i++) {
    days.push(null);
  }
  for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
    days.push(d);
  }
  return days;
}

interface DaySlots {
  readonly tersedia: number;
  readonly ditempah: number;
  readonly dibatalkan: number;
  readonly temujanjiList: readonly Temujanji[];
}

function getDaySummaryClass(summary: DaySlots): string {
  if (summary.ditempah > 0 && summary.tersedia === 0) {
    return 'bg-amber-100 border-amber-300';
  }
  if (summary.ditempah > 0 && summary.tersedia > 0) {
    return 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-300';
  }
  if (summary.tersedia > 0) {
    return 'bg-green-100 border-green-300';
  }
  return 'border-navy/10 bg-gray-50';
}

export function TemujanjiCalendar() {
  const now = new Date();
  const [year, setYear] = useState(now.getFullYear());
  const [month, setMonth] = useState(now.getMonth());
  const [selectedDay, setSelectedDay] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [showDayModal, setShowDayModal] = useState(false);
  const [selectedTemujanji, setSelectedTemujanji] = useState<Temujanji | null>(null);
  const [showDetailModal, setShowDetailModal] = useState(false);

  const monthStr = formatMonth(year, month);
  const firstOfMonth = `${monthStr}-01`;
  const lastDay = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
  const lastOfMonth = `${monthStr}-${String(lastDay).padStart(2, '0')}`;

  const { data, mutate } = useSWR<ApiResponse>(
    `/api/admin/temujanji?limit=200&dateFrom=${firstOfMonth}&dateTo=${lastOfMonth}`,
    fetcher,
  );

  const temujanjiList = data?.data?.data ?? [];

  // Group by day
  const byDay = new Map<number, DaySlots>();
  for (const t of temujanjiList) {
    const day = new Date(t.slotTemujanji.tarikh).getUTCDate();
    const existing = byDay.get(day) ?? {
      tersedia: 0,
      ditempah: 0,
      dibatalkan: 0,
      temujanjiList: [] as Temujanji[],
    };

    const status = t.slotTemujanji.status;
    byDay.set(day, {
      tersedia: existing.tersedia + (status === 'TERSEDIA' ? 1 : 0),
      ditempah: existing.ditempah + (status === 'DITEMPAH' ? 1 : 0),
      dibatalkan: existing.dibatalkan + (status === 'DIBATALKAN' ? 1 : 0),
      temujanjiList: [...existing.temujanjiList, t],
    });
  }

  const calendarDays = getCalendarDays(year, month);

  const goToPrevMonth = useCallback(() => {
    if (month === 0) {
      setYear((y) => y - 1);
      setMonth(11);
    } else {
      setMonth((m) => m - 1);
    }
  }, [month]);

  const goToNextMonth = useCallback(() => {
    if (month === 11) {
      setYear((y) => y + 1);
      setMonth(0);
    } else {
      setMonth((m) => m + 1);
    }
  }, [month]);

  const handleDayClick = (day: number) => {
    const summary = byDay.get(day);
    if (summary && summary.temujanjiList.length > 0) {
      setSelectedDay(day);
      setShowDayModal(true);
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    if (!confirm('Padam temujanji ini? Slot akan dikembalikan ke status Tersedia.')) return;

    const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/temujanji/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
    const result = await res.json();
    if (result.success) {
      toast.success('Temujanji berjaya dipadam');
      setShowDetailModal(false);
      setSelectedTemujanji(null);
      mutate();
    } else {
      toast.error(result.error ?? 'Gagal memadam temujanji');
    }
  };

  const dayTemujanji = selectedDay ? (byDay.get(selectedDay)?.temujanjiList ?? []) : [];

  return (
    <>
      <Card className="bg-white">
        <CardBody>
          {/* Month navigation */}
          <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={goToPrevMonth}
              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
              aria-label="Bulan sebelumnya"
            >
              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15.75 19.5 8.25 12l7.5-7.5" />
              </svg>
            </button>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-navy">
              {getMonthLabel(year, month)}
            </h2>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={goToNextMonth}
              className="rounded-md p-2 text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy"
              aria-label="Bulan seterusnya"
            >
              <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
              </svg>
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Calendar grid */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-1">
            {/* Day headers */}
            {DAY_HEADERS.map((day) => (
              <div
                key={day}
                className="py-2 text-center text-xs font-semibold text-navy/60"
              >
                {day}
              </div>
            ))}

            {/* Day cells */}
            {calendarDays.map((day, idx) => {
              if (day === null) {
                return <div key={`empty-${idx}`} className="aspect-square" />;
              }

              const summary = byDay.get(day);
              const count = summary ? summary.temujanjiList.length : 0;

              return (
                <button
                  key={day}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => handleDayClick(day)}
                  disabled={count === 0}
                  className={`aspect-square rounded-md border p-1 text-xs transition-colors ${
                    count > 0
                      ? `${getDaySummaryClass(summary!)} cursor-pointer hover:opacity-80`
                      : 'border-navy/10 bg-gray-50 cursor-default opacity-60'
                  }`}
                >
                  <span className="block font-medium text-navy">{day}</span>
                  {count > 0 && (
                    <span className="mt-0.5 block text-[10px] font-medium text-navy/70">
                      {count} janji
                    </span>
                  )}
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>

          {/* Legend */}
          <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-4 border-t border-navy/10 pt-3">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-green-300 bg-green-100" />
              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Semua tersedia</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-blue-300 bg-blue-50" />
              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Sebahagian ditempah</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-amber-300 bg-amber-100" />
              <span className="text-xs text-navy/60">Penuh ditempah</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      {/* Day detail modal — list of temujanji for the day */}
      <Modal
        isOpen={showDayModal}
        onClose={() => {
          setShowDayModal(false);
          setSelectedDay(null);
        }}
        title={
          selectedDay
            ? `Temujanji — ${selectedDay} ${getMonthLabel(year, month)}`
            : 'Temujanji'
        }
      >
        <div className="space-y-3">
          {dayTemujanji.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tiada temujanji pada hari ini.</p>
          ) : (
            dayTemujanji.map((t) => (
              <button
                key={t.id}
                type="button"
                onClick={() => {
                  setSelectedTemujanji(t);
                  setShowDayModal(false);
                  setShowDetailModal(true);
                }}
                className="w-full rounded-lg border border-navy/10 p-3 text-left transition-colors hover:bg-navy/5"
              >
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <span className="text-sm font-medium text-navy">
                    {t.pelanggan.nama}
                  </span>
                  <Badge
                    variant={
                      t.slotTemujanji.status === 'DITEMPAH'
                        ? 'warning'
                        : t.slotTemujanji.status === 'TERSEDIA'
                          ? 'success'
                          : 'error'
                    }
                  >
                    {t.slotTemujanji.status}
                  </Badge>
                </div>
                <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-navy/60">
                  {t.slotTemujanji.masaMula} – {t.slotTemujanji.masaTamat} &middot;{' '}
                  {t.pelanggan.noTelefon}
                </p>
                {t.nota && (
                  <p className="mt-1 truncate text-xs text-navy/50">{t.nota}</p>
                )}
              </button>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </Modal>

      {/* Temujanji detail modal */}
      <Modal
        isOpen={showDetailModal}
        onClose={() => {
          setShowDetailModal(false);
          setSelectedTemujanji(null);
        }}
        title="Butiran Temujanji"
      >
        {selectedTemujanji && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Pelanggan</p>
              <p className="font-medium text-navy">{selectedTemujanji.pelanggan.nama}</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">{selectedTemujanji.pelanggan.noTelefon}</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Tarikh & Masa</p>
              <p className="font-medium text-navy">
                {new Date(selectedTemujanji.slotTemujanji.tarikh).toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
                  weekday: 'long',
                  day: 'numeric',
                  month: 'long',
                  year: 'numeric',
                })}
              </p>
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">
                {selectedTemujanji.slotTemujanji.masaMula} – {selectedTemujanji.slotTemujanji.masaTamat}
              </p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Status</p>
              <Badge
                variant={
                  selectedTemujanji.slotTemujanji.status === 'DITEMPAH'
                    ? 'warning'
                    : selectedTemujanji.slotTemujanji.status === 'TERSEDIA'
                      ? 'success'
                      : 'error'
                }
              >
                {selectedTemujanji.slotTemujanji.status}
              </Badge>
            </div>
            {selectedTemujanji.nota && (
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm text-navy/60">Nota</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-navy whitespace-pre-wrap">{selectedTemujanji.nota}</p>
              </div>
            )}
            <div className="border-t border-navy/10 pt-4">
              <Button
                size="sm"
                variant="secondary"
                onClick={() => handleDelete(selectedTemujanji.id)}
                className="text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50"
              >
                Padam Temujanji
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </Modal>
    </>
  );
}

```

'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui';
import { TemujanjiTable } from './temujanji-table';
import { TemujanjiCalendar } from './temujanji-calendar';

type ViewMode = 'calendar' | 'table';

export function TemujanjiView() {
  const [view, setView] = useState<ViewMode>('calendar');

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      {/* View toggle */}
      <div className="flex gap-2">
        <Button
          size="sm"
          variant={view === 'calendar' ? 'primary' : 'secondary'}
          onClick={() => setView('calendar')}
        >
          <svg className="mr-1.5 h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.75 3v2.25M17.25 3v2.25M3 18.75V7.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 2.25-2.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 21 7.5v11.25m-18 0A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 5.25 21h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21 18.75m-18 0v-7.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 5.25 9h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 21 11.25v7.5" />
          </svg>
          Kalendar
        </Button>
        <Button
          size="sm"
          variant={view === 'table' ? 'primary' : 'secondary'}
          onClick={() => setView('table')}
        >
          <svg className="mr-1.5 h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3.375 19.5h17.25m-17.25 0a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125M3.375 19.5h7.5c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125m-9.75 0V5.625m0 12.75v-1.5c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125m18.375 2.625V5.625m0 12.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125m1.125-1.125v-1.5c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125m0 3.75h-7.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 12 18.375m9.75-12.75c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3.375c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125m19.5 0v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M2.25 5.625v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m0 0h17.25m-17.25 0h7.5c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125M3.375 8.25c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m17.25-3.75h-7.5c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125m8.625-1.125c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125m-17.25 0h7.5m-7.5 0c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125M12 10.875v-1.5m0 1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M12 10.875c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m-2.25 0c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125M10.875 12h-7.5m8.625 0h7.5m-7.5 0c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125" />
          </svg>
          Jadual
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* View content */}
      {view === 'calendar' ? <TemujanjiCalendar /> : <TemujanjiTable />}
    </div>
  );
}

1	'use client';
2	
3	import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
4	import useSWR from 'swr';
5	import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';
6	import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod';
7	import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
8	import {
9	  Button,
10	  Input,
11	  Textarea,
12	  Card,
13	  CardBody,
14	  Skeleton,
15	  Alert,
16	  EmptyState,
17	  toast,
18	} from '@/components/ui';
19	import { temujanjiSchema, type TemujanjiInput } from '@/lib/validations/temujanji';
20	
21	/* ─── Types ─── */
22	
23	interface SlotTemujanji {
24	  readonly id: string;
25	  readonly tarikh: string;
26	  readonly masaMula: string;
27	  readonly masaTamat: string;
28	  readonly status: string;
29	}
30	
31	interface SlotsResponse {
32	  readonly success: boolean;
33	  readonly data: readonly SlotTemujanji[];
34	}
35	
36	/* ─── Helpers ─── */
37	
38	const WHATSAPP_NUMBER = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_NUMBER ?? '';
39	
40	const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('ms-MY', {
41	  weekday: 'long',
42	  day: 'numeric',
43	  month: 'long',
44	  year: 'numeric',
45	});
46	
47	function groupSlotsByDate(
48	  slots: readonly SlotTemujanji[],
49	): ReadonlyMap<string, readonly SlotTemujanji[]> {
50	  const grouped = new Map<string, SlotTemujanji[]>();
51	
52	  for (const slot of slots) {
53	    const dateKey = slot.tarikh.split('T')[0];
54	    const existing = grouped.get(dateKey);
55	    if (existing) {
56	      grouped.set(dateKey, [...existing, slot]);
57	    } else {
58	      grouped.set(dateKey, [slot]);
59	    }
60	  }
61	
62	  return grouped;
63	}
64	
65	function formatDateLabel(isoDate: string): string {
66	  const date = new Date(isoDate + 'T00:00:00');
67	  return dateFormatter.format(date);
68	}
69	
70	async function fetcher(url: string): Promise<SlotsResponse> {
71	  const res = await fetch(url);
72	  if (!res.ok) {
73	    throw new Error('Gagal memuatkan slot temujanji');
74	  }
75	  return res.json() as Promise<SlotsResponse>;
76	}
77	
78	/* ─── Skeleton Loader ─── */
79	
80	function SlotsSkeleton() {
81	  return (
82	    <div className="space-y-6" data-testid="slots-skeleton">
83	      {Array.from({ length: 3 }, (_, i) => (
84	        <div key={i} className="space-y-3">
85	          <Skeleton variant="text" className="h-5 w-48" />
86	          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
87	            {Array.from({ length: 4 }, (_, j) => (
88	              <Skeleton key={j} variant="rect" className="h-10 w-28" />
89	            ))}
90	          </div>
91	        </div>
92	      ))}
93	    </div>
94	  );
95	}
96	
97	/* ─── Checkmark Icon ─── */
98	
99	function CheckIcon() {
100	  return (
101	    <svg
102	      className="h-4 w-4"
103	      viewBox="0 0 20 20"
104	      fill="currentColor"
105	      aria-hidden="true"
106	    >
107	      <path
108	        fillRule="evenodd"
109	        d="M16.707 5.293a1 1 0 010 1.414l-8 8a1 1 0 01-1.414 0l-4-4a1 1 0 011.414-1.414L8 12.586l7.293-7.293a1 1 0 011.414 0z"
110	        clipRule="evenodd"
111	      />
112	    </svg>
113	  );
114	}
115	
116	/* ─── Main Component ─── */
117	
118	function TemujanjiForm() {
119	  const [selectedSlotId, setSelectedSlotId] = useState<string | null>(null);
120	  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
121	  const [submitSuccess, setSubmitSuccess] = useState(false);
122	
123	  const { data, error, isLoading, mutate } = useSWR<SlotsResponse>(
124	    '/api/temujanji/slots',
125	    fetcher,
126	  );
127	
128	  const {
129	    register,
130	    handleSubmit,
131	    reset,
132	    formState: { errors },
133	  } = useForm<TemujanjiInput>({
134	    resolver: zodResolver(temujanjiSchema),
135	    defaultValues: {
136	      nama: '',
137	      noTelefon: '',
138	      nota: '',
139	      slotTemujanjiId: '',
140	    },
141	  });
142	
143	  const handleSlotSelect = useCallback((slotId: string) => {
144	    setSelectedSlotId(slotId);
145	    setSubmitSuccess(false);
146	  }, []);
147	
148	  const onSubmit = useCallback(
149	    async (formData: Omit<TemujanjiInput, 'slotTemujanjiId'>) => {
150	      if (!selectedSlotId || isSubmitting) return;
151	
152	      setIsSubmitting(true);
153	      try {
154	        const res = await fetch('/api/temujanji', {
155	          method: 'POST',
156	          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
157	          body: JSON.stringify({
158	            ...formData,
159	            slotTemujanjiId: selectedSlotId,
160	          }),
161	        });
162	
163	        const body = await res.json();
164	
165	        if (!res.ok) {
166	          if (res.status === 409) {
167	            toast.error('Slot ini telah ditempah');
168	          } else {
169	            toast.error(body?.error ?? 'Ralat dalaman pelayan');
170	          }
171	          return;
172	        }
173	
174	        toast.success('Temujanji anda telah berjaya ditempah!');
175	        setSubmitSuccess(true);
176	        setSelectedSlotId(null);
177	        reset();
178	        await mutate();
179	      } catch {
180	        toast.error('Ralat dalaman pelayan');
181	      } finally {
182	        setIsSubmitting(false);
183	      }
184	    },
185	    [selectedSlotId, isSubmitting, reset, mutate],
186	  );
187	
188	  /* ─── Loading state ─── */
189	  if (isLoading) {
190	    return <SlotsSkeleton />;
191	  }
192	
193	  /* ─── Error state ─── */
194	  if (error) {
195	    return (
196	      <Alert
197	        variant="error"
198	        message="Gagal memuatkan slot temujanji. Sila muat semula halaman."
199	        data-testid="slots-error"
200	      />
201	    );
202	  }
203	
204	  const slots = data?.data ?? [];
205	
206	  /* ─── Empty state ─── */
207	  if (slots.length === 0) {
208	    return (
209	      <EmptyState
210	        title="Tiada slot temujanji yang tersedia"
211	        description="Sila hubungi kami melalui WhatsApp untuk membuat temujanji."
212	        icon={
213	          <svg
214	            className="h-12 w-12"
215	            viewBox="0 0 24 24"
216	            fill="none"
217	            stroke="currentColor"
218	            strokeWidth={1.5}
219	            aria-hidden="true"
220	          >
221	            <path
222	              strokeLinecap="round"
223	              strokeLinejoin="round"
224	              d="M6.75 3v2.25M17.25 3v2.25M3 18.75V7.5a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0121 7.5v11.25m-18 0A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 21h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 18.75m-18 0v-7.5A2.25 2.25 0 015.25 9h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0121 11.25v7.5"
225	            />
226	          </svg>
227	        }
228	        action={
229	          WHATSAPP_NUMBER
230	            ? {
231	                label: 'Hubungi WhatsApp',
232	                onClick: () =>
233	                  window.open(
234	                    `https://wa.me/${WHATSAPP_NUMBER}?text=${encodeURIComponent('Saya ingin membuat temujanji')}`,
235	                    '_blank',
236	                  ),
237	              }
238	            : undefined
239	        }
240	        data-testid="slots-empty"
241	      />
242	    );
243	  }
244	
245	  const groupedSlots = groupSlotsByDate(slots);
246	
247	  return (
248	    <div className="space-y-8" data-testid="temujanji-form">
249	      {/* Success alert */}
250	      {submitSuccess && (
251	        <Alert
252	          variant="success"
253	          message="Temujanji anda telah berjaya ditempah! Kami akan menghubungi anda untuk pengesahan."
254	          data-testid="submit-success"
255	        />
256	      )}
257	
258	      {/* Slot selection */}
259	      <div className="space-y-6" data-testid="slot-selection">
260	        <p className="text-sm text-navy/70">
261	          Sila pilih slot temujanji yang anda inginkan:
262	        </p>
263	
264	        {Array.from(groupedSlots.entries()).map(([dateKey, dateSlots]) => (
265	          <div key={dateKey} className="space-y-3">
266	            <h3 className="font-serif text-sm font-semibold text-navy capitalize">
267	              {formatDateLabel(dateKey)}
268	            </h3>
269	            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
270	              {dateSlots.map((slot) => {
271	                const isSelected = selectedSlotId === slot.id;
272	                return (
273	                  <button
274	                    key={slot.id}
275	                    type="button"
276	                    onClick={() => handleSlotSelect(slot.id)}
277	                    className={cn(
278	                      'inline-flex items-center gap-1.5',
279	                      'h-10 px-4 text-sm font-medium',
280	                      'rounded-button border',
281	                      'transition-colors duration-150',
282	                      'motion-reduce:transition-none',
283	                      'focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-dusty-rose',
284	                      isSelected
285	                        ? 'bg-navy text-cream border-navy'
286	                        : 'bg-cream text-navy border-navy/30 hover:border-navy hover:bg-cream-dark',
287	                    )}
288	                    aria-pressed={isSelected}
289	                    data-testid={`slot-${slot.id}`}
290	                  >
291	                    {isSelected && <CheckIcon />}
292	                    {slot.masaMula} - {slot.masaTamat}
293	                  </button>
294	                );
295	              })}
296	            </div>
297	          </div>
298	        ))}
299	      </div>
300	
301	      {/* Booking form */}
302	      {selectedSlotId && (
303	        <Card data-testid="booking-form">
304	          <CardBody>
305	            <form
306	              onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)}
307	              className="space-y-4"
308	              noValidate
309	            >
310	              <Input
311	                label="Nama"
312	                placeholder="Nama penuh anda"
313	                required
314	                error={errors.nama?.message}
315	                data-testid="input-nama"
316	                {...register('nama')}
317	              />
318	
319	              <Input
320	                label="No. Telefon"
321	                type="tel"
322	                placeholder="0121234567"
323	                required
324	                error={errors.noTelefon?.message}
325	                helperText="Format: 01X-XXXXXXX atau 01XXXXXXXX"
326	                data-testid="input-telefon"
327	                {...register('noTelefon')}
328	              />
329	
330	              <Textarea
331	                label="Nota"
332	                placeholder="Sebarang catatan tambahan (pilihan)"
333	                error={errors.nota?.message}
334	                autoResize
335	                data-testid="input-nota"
336	                {...register('nota')}
337	              />
338	
339	              <div className="pt-2">
340	                <Button
341	                  type="submit"
342	                  variant="accent"
343	                  size="lg"
344	                  loading={isSubmitting}
345	                  disabled={isSubmitting}
346	                  className="w-full"
347	                  data-testid="submit-btn"
348	                >
349	                  {isSubmitting ? 'Menempah...' : 'Tempah Temujanji'}
350	                </Button>
351	              </div>
352	            </form>
353	          </CardBody>
354	        </Card>
355	      )}
356	    </div>
357	  );
358	}
359	
360	TemujanjiForm.displayName = 'TemujanjiForm';
361	
362	export { TemujanjiForm };
363

 `./app/api/temujanji/slots/route.ts`

```text
1	import { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
3	
4	export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
5	import {
6	  successResponse,
7	  withErrorHandling,
8	  createRateLimiter,
9	} from '@/lib/api';
10	
11	const rateLimit = createRateLimiter({
12	  interval: 60_000,
13	  maxRequests: 30,
14	});
15	
16	export const GET = withErrorHandling(async (req: NextRequest) => {
17	  const rateLimited = rateLimit(req);
18	  if (rateLimited) return rateLimited;
19	
20	  const today = new Date();
21	  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
22	
23	  const maxDate = new Date(today);
24	  maxDate.setDate(maxDate.getDate() + 14);
25	
26	  const slots = await prisma.slotTemujanji.findMany({
27	    where: {
28	      status: 'TERSEDIA',
29	      tarikh: {
30	        gte: today,
31	        lt: maxDate,
32	      },
33	    },
34	    orderBy: [{ tarikh: 'asc' }, { masaMula: 'asc' }],
35	  });
36	
37	  return successResponse(slots);
38	});
39
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-20 13:15:56Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface SlotTemujanji {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly tarikh: string;
  readonly masaMula: string;
  readonly masaTamat: string;
}

interface TemujanjiCalendarProps {
  readonly slots: readonly SlotTemujanji[];
  readonly selectedDate: string | null;
  readonly onSelectDate: (dateKey: string | null) => void;
}

const DAY_HEADERS = ['Isn', 'Sel', 'Rab', 'Kha', 'Jum', 'Sab', 'Ahd'] as const;

function getCalendarDays(year: number, month: number): (number | null)[] {
  const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
  const startOffset = firstDay === 0 ? 6 : firstDay - 1;
  const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();

  const days: (number | null)[] = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < startOffset; i++) {
    days.push(null);
  }
  for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
    days.push(d);
  }
  return days;
}

function getMonthLabel(year: number, month: number): string {
  return new Date(year, month, 1).toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
    month: 'long',
    year: 'numeric',
  });
}

function toDateKey(year: number, month: number, day: number): string {
  return `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(day).padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

function TemujanjiCalendar({ slots, selectedDate, onSelectDate }: TemujanjiCalendarProps) {
  const now = new Date();
  const [year, setYear] = useState(now.getFullYear());
  const [month, setMonth] = useState(now.getMonth());

  // Count available slots per date key
  const slotCountByDate = useMemo(() => {
    const map = new Map<string, number>();
    for (const slot of slots) {
      const dateKey = slot.tarikh.split('T')[0];
      map.set(dateKey, (map.get(dateKey) ?? 0) + 1);
    }
    return map;
  }, [slots]);

  const calendarDays = useMemo(() => getCalendarDays(year, month), [year, month]);

  const todayKey = toDateKey(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate());

  const goToPrevMonth = useCallback(() => {
    if (month === 0) {
      setYear((y) => y - 1);
      setMonth(11);
    } else {
      setMonth((m) => m - 1);
    }
  }, [month]);

  const goToNextMonth = useCallback(() => {
    if (month === 11) {
      setYear((y) => y + 1);
      setMonth(0);
    } else {
      setMonth((m) => m + 1);
    }
  }, [month]);

  // Don't allow navigating to past months
  const canGoPrev = year > now.getFullYear() || (year === now.getFullYear() && month > now.getMonth());

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {/* Month navigation */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={goToPrevMonth}
          disabled={!canGoPrev}
          className={cn(
            'rounded-full p-2 transition-colors',
            'motion-reduce:transition-none',
            canGoPrev
              ? 'text-navy/60 hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy'
              : 'text-navy/20 cursor-not-allowed',
          )}
          aria-label="Bulan sebelumnya"
        >
          <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15.75 19.5 8.25 12l7.5-7.5" />
          </svg>
        </button>
        <h3 className="font-serif text-base font-semibold text-navy capitalize">
          {getMonthLabel(year, month)}
        </h3>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={goToNextMonth}
          className="rounded-full p-2 text-navy/60 transition-colors hover:bg-navy/5 hover:text-navy motion-reduce:transition-none"
          aria-label="Bulan seterusnya"
        >
          <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
          </svg>
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Calendar grid */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-1">
        {/* Day headers */}
        {DAY_HEADERS.map((day) => (
          <div
            key={day}
            className="py-2 text-center text-xs font-semibold text-navy/50"
          >
            {day}
          </div>
        ))}

        {/* Day cells */}
        {calendarDays.map((day, idx) => {
          if (day === null) {
            return <div key={`empty-${idx}`} className="aspect-square" />;
          }

          const dateKey = toDateKey(year, month, day);
          const slotCount = slotCountByDate.get(dateKey) ?? 0;
          const isToday = dateKey === todayKey;
          const isSelected = dateKey === selectedDate;
          const isPast = dateKey < todayKey;
          const hasSlots = slotCount > 0;

          return (
            <button
              key={day}
              type="button"
              disabled={!hasSlots || isPast}
              onClick={() => onSelectDate(isSelected ? null : dateKey)}
              className={cn(
                'aspect-square rounded-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-0.5 text-xs transition-all duration-150',
                'motion-reduce:transition-none',
                'focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-dusty-rose focus-visible:ring-offset-1',
                isSelected
                  ? 'bg-navy text-cream shadow-card scale-105'
                  : hasSlots && !isPast
                    ? 'bg-dusty-rose/20 text-navy border border-dusty-rose/40 hover:bg-dusty-rose/40 hover:border-dusty-rose cursor-pointer'
                    : isPast
                      ? 'text-navy/20 cursor-default'
                      : 'text-navy/30 cursor-default',
                isToday && !isSelected && 'ring-1 ring-navy/30',
              )}
              aria-label={
                hasSlots
                  ? `${day}, ${slotCount} slot tersedia`
                  : `${day}, tiada slot`
              }
              aria-pressed={isSelected}
            >
              <span className={cn('font-medium', isSelected ? 'text-cream' : '')}>
                {day}
              </span>
              {hasSlots && !isPast && (
                <span
                  className={cn(
                    'text-[9px] leading-none font-medium',
                    isSelected ? 'text-cream/80' : 'text-dusty-rose-dark',
                  )}
                >
                  {slotCount} slot
                </span>
              )}
            </button>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Legend */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4 pt-2">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
          <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded border border-dusty-rose/40 bg-dusty-rose/20" />
          <span className="text-xs text-navy/50">Slot tersedia</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
          <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded bg-navy" />
          <span className="text-xs text-navy/50">Dipilih</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

TemujanjiCalendar.displayName = 'TemujanjiCalendar';

export { TemujanjiCalendar };

```

Clean. The public `/temujanji` page now shows a calendar where users:

1. **Pick a date** — days with available slots are highlighted in dusty rose
2. **Pick a time slot** — time buttons appear below the calendar for that date

1	'use client';

3	import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
