```text
5	import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod';
6	import useSWR from 'swr';
7	import { Modal } from '@/components/ui/modal';
8	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
9	import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
10	import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
11	import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
12	import {
13	  tempahanCreateSchema,
14	  type TempahanCreateInput,
15	} from '@/lib/validations/tempahan';
16	
17	interface PakejOption {
18	  readonly id: string;
19	  readonly namaPakej: string;
20	  readonly warna: string;
21	}
22	
23	interface PelangganOption {
24	  readonly id: string;
25	  readonly nama: string;
26	  readonly noTelefon: string;
27	}
28	
29	interface TempahanData {
30	  readonly id: string;
31	  readonly namaTempahan: string;
32	  readonly pakejId: string;
33	  readonly pelangganId: string;
34	  readonly nota: string | null;
35	  readonly slotTempahan: {
36	    readonly id: string;
37	    readonly tarikh: string;
38	  };
39	  readonly pelanggan: {
40	    readonly id: string;
41	    readonly nama: string;
42	    readonly noTelefon: string;
43	  };
44	}
45	
46	interface TempahanFormProps {
47	  readonly tempahan?: TempahanData | null;
48	  readonly slotTempahanId?: string;
49	  readonly slotDate?: string;
50	  readonly onClose: () => void;
51	  readonly onSuccess: () => void;
52	}
53	
54	const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then((r) => r.json());
55	
56	export function TempahanForm({
57	  tempahan,
58	  slotTempahanId,
59	  slotDate,
60	  onClose,
61	  onSuccess,
62	}: TempahanFormProps) {
63	  const [serverError, setServerError] = useState<string | null>(null);
64	  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
65	  const [pelangganSearch, setPelangganSearch] = useState('');
66	  const [debouncedPelangganSearch, setDebouncedPelangganSearch] = useState('');
67	  const [showPelangganDropdown, setShowPelangganDropdown] = useState(false);
68	  const [selectedPelanggan, setSelectedPelanggan] = useState<PelangganOption | null>(
69	    tempahan ? { id: tempahan.pelanggan.id, nama: tempahan.pelanggan.nama, noTelefon: tempahan.pelanggan.noTelefon } : null,
70	  );
71	  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
72	  const pelangganDropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
73	
74	  const isEditing = Boolean(tempahan);
75	
76	  // Fetch pakej list
77	  const { data: pakejData } = useSWR<{ success: boolean; data: { items: readonly PakejOption[] } }>(
78	    '/api/admin/pakej',
79	    fetcher,
80	  );
81	  const pakejList = pakejData?.data?.items ?? [];
82	
83	  // Fetch pelanggan with search
84	  const { data: pelangganData } = useSWR<{ success: boolean; data: { items: readonly PelangganOption[] } }>(
85	    debouncedPelangganSearch
86	      ? `/api/admin/pelanggan?search=${encodeURIComponent(debouncedPelangganSearch)}&limit=10`
87	      : null,
88	    fetcher,
89	  );
90	  const pelangganList = pelangganData?.data?.items ?? [];
91	
92	  const {
93	    register,
94	    handleSubmit,
95	    setValue,
96	    formState: { errors },
97	  } = useForm<TempahanCreateInput>({
98	    resolver: zodResolver(tempahanCreateSchema),
99	    defaultValues: {
100	      namaTempahan: tempahan?.namaTempahan ?? '',
101	      slotTempahanId: tempahan?.slotTempahan.id ?? slotTempahanId ?? '',
102	      pakejId: tempahan?.pakejId ?? '',
103	      pelangganId: tempahan?.pelangganId ?? '',
104	      nota: tempahan?.nota ?? '',
105	    },
106	  });
107	
108	  // Debounce pelanggan search
109	  const handlePelangganSearchChange = useCallback(
110	    (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
111	      const value = e.target.value;
112	      setPelangganSearch(value);
113	      setShowPelangganDropdown(true);
114	
115	      if (debounceRef.current) {
116	        clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
117	      }
118	
119	      debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
120	        setDebouncedPelangganSearch(value);
121	      }, 300);
122	    },
123	    [],
124	  );
125	
126	  // Close dropdown on outside click
127	  useEffect(() => {
128	    function handleClickOutside(e: MouseEvent) {
129	      if (
130	        pelangganDropdownRef.current &&
131	        !pelangganDropdownRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)
132	      ) {
133	        setShowPelangganDropdown(false);
134	      }
135	    }
136	    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
137	    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
138	  }, []);
139	
140	  useEffect(() => {
141	    return () => {
142	      if (debounceRef.current) {
143	        clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
144	      }
145	    };
146	  }, []);
147	
148	  const handlePelangganSelect = (p: PelangganOption) => {
149	    setSelectedPelanggan(p);
150	    setPelangganSearch(`${p.nama} (${p.noTelefon})`);
151	    setValue('pelangganId', p.id);
152	    setShowPelangganDropdown(false);
153	  };
154	
155	  const onSubmit = async (data: TempahanCreateInput) => {
156	    setServerError(null);
157	    setIsSubmitting(true);
158	
159	    try {
160	      const url = isEditing
161	        ? `/api/admin/tempahan/${tempahan!.id}`
162	        : '/api/admin/tempahan';
163	      const method = isEditing ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
164	
165	      // For edit, don't send slotTempahanId
166	      const payload = isEditing
167	        ? {
168	            namaTempahan: data.namaTempahan,
169	            pakejId: data.pakejId,
170	            pelangganId: data.pelangganId,
171	            nota: data.nota || null,
172	          }
173	        : data;
174	
175	      const res = await fetch(url, {
176	        method,
177	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
178	        body: JSON.stringify(payload),
179	      });
180	
181	      const result = await res.json();
182	
183	      if (!result.success) {
184	        setServerError(result.error ?? 'Ralat berlaku');
185	        return;
186	      }
187	
188	      onSuccess();
189	    } catch {
190	      setServerError('Ralat rangkaian. Sila cuba lagi.');
191	    } finally {
192	      setIsSubmitting(false);
193	    }
194	  };
195	
196	  const dateLabel = tempahan
197	    ? new Date(tempahan.slotTempahan.tarikh).toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
198	        weekday: 'long',
199	        day: 'numeric',
200	        month: 'long',
201	        year: 'numeric',
202	      })
203	    : slotDate
204	      ? new Date(slotDate).toLocaleDateString('ms-MY', {
205	          weekday: 'long',
206	          day: 'numeric',
207	          month: 'long',
208	          year: 'numeric',
209	        })
210	      : '';
211	
212	  return (
213	    <Modal
214	      isOpen
215	      onClose={onClose}
216	      title={isEditing ? 'Edit Tempahan' : 'Tambah Tempahan'}
217	      size="lg"
218	    >
219	      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-4">
220	        {/* Slot date (read-only) */}
221	        <div>
222	          <Label>Tarikh Slot</Label>
223	          <p className="mt-1 rounded-md border border-navy/10 bg-navy/5 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-navy">
224	            {dateLabel}
225	          </p>
226	          <input type="hidden" {...register('slotTempahanId')} />
227	        </div>
228	
229	        {/* Nama Tempahan */}
230	        <div>
231	          <Label htmlFor="namaTempahan">Nama Tempahan</Label>
232	          <Input
233	            id="namaTempahan"
234	            placeholder="Cth: Majlis Perkahwinan Ahmad & Siti"
235	            {...register('namaTempahan')}
236	          />
237	          {errors.namaTempahan && (
238	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.namaTempahan.message}</p>
239	          )}
240	        </div>
241	
242	        {/* Pakej */}
243	        <div>
244	          <Label htmlFor="pakejId">Pakej</Label>
245	          <select
246	            id="pakejId"
247	            {...register('pakejId')}
248	            className="mt-1 w-full rounded-md border border-navy/20 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-navy focus:border-dusty-rose focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-dusty-rose/20"
249	          >
250	            <option value="">-- Pilih Pakej --</option>
251	            {pakejList.map((p) => (
252	              <option key={p.id} value={p.id}>
253	                {p.namaPakej}
254	              </option>
255	            ))}
256	          </select>
257	          {errors.pakejId && (
258	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.pakejId.message}</p>
259	          )}
260	        </div>
261	
262	        {/* Pelanggan */}
263	        <div ref={pelangganDropdownRef} className="relative">
264	          <Label htmlFor="pelangganSearch">Pelanggan</Label>
265	          <Input
266	            id="pelangganSearch"
267	            placeholder="Cari nama atau no. telefon..."
268	            value={pelangganSearch}
269	            onChange={handlePelangganSearchChange}
270	            onFocus={() => {
271	              if (pelangganSearch) setShowPelangganDropdown(true);
272	            }}
273	            autoComplete="off"
274	          />
275	          <input type="hidden" {...register('pelangganId')} />
276	          {errors.pelangganId && (
277	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.pelangganId.message}</p>
278	          )}
279	          {selectedPelanggan && !showPelangganDropdown && (
280	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-navy/60">
281	              Dipilih: {selectedPelanggan.nama} ({selectedPelanggan.noTelefon})
282	            </p>
283	          )}
284	
285	          {/* Dropdown */}
286	          {showPelangganDropdown && pelangganList.length > 0 && (
287	            <div className="absolute z-10 mt-1 w-full rounded-md border border-navy/10 bg-white shadow-lg">
288	              <ul className="max-h-40 overflow-y-auto py-1">
289	                {pelangganList.map((p) => (
290	                  <li key={p.id}>
291	                    <button
292	                      type="button"
293	                      onClick={() => handlePelangganSelect(p)}
294	                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm hover:bg-navy/5"
295	                    >
296	                      <span className="font-medium text-navy">{p.nama}</span>
297	                      <span className="ml-2 text-navy/60">{p.noTelefon}</span>
298	                    </button>
299	                  </li>
300	                ))}
301	              </ul>
302	            </div>
303	          )}
304	          {showPelangganDropdown && debouncedPelangganSearch && pelangganList.length === 0 && (
305	            <div className="absolute z-10 mt-1 w-full rounded-md border border-navy/10 bg-white p-3 shadow-lg">
306	              <p className="text-xs text-navy/60">Tiada pelanggan dijumpai</p>
307	            </div>
308	          )}
309	        </div>
310	
311	        {/* Nota */}
312	        <div>
313	          <Label htmlFor="nota">Nota</Label>
314	          <Textarea
315	            id="nota"
316	            placeholder="Nota tambahan (pilihan)"
317	            rows={3}
318	            {...register('nota')}
319	          />
320	          {errors.nota && (
321	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-600">{errors.nota.message}</p>
322	          )}
323	        </div>
324	
325	        {serverError && (
326	          <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{serverError}</p>
327	        )}
328	
329	        <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-2">
330	          <Button type="button" variant="secondary" onClick={onClose}>
331	            Batal
332	          </Button>
333	          <Button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting}>
334	            {isSubmitting ? 'Menyimpan...' : isEditing ? 'Kemaskini' : 'Simpan'}
335	          </Button>
336	        </div>
337	      </form>
338	    </Modal>
339	  );
340	}
341
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-20 13:28:26Z)**_

The issue is on line 77-81 — the SWR fetch expects `data.items` but the pakej API likely returns `data` directly as an array. Let me check.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-20 13:28:32Z)**_

Found it. The pakej API returns `successResponse(pakejList)` which wraps as `{ success: true, data: [...] }` — it's a flat array, not `{ items: [...] }`. Same issue with pelanggan.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-20 13:28:45Z)**_

OK so pelanggan returns `{ data: { items: [...] } }` — that's correct. But pakej returns `{ data: [...] }` directly (no `items` wrapper). The form expects `data.items` for both. Fix is simple — the pakej SWR type is wrong.
